name: Emilia Sykes
subject: Personally asking for your endorsement

body:
We need to prove we have the numbers to put up a fight.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120813428/587453377/985656574?nd&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.12.07_Personal-Endorsement_B2_F1_S1_C1_IA_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzBhODVkYS1jOGQzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Eym15OuSYkKVWbHQenKqXXObcfA64fo1iNFU66fJzw4=) Peter, I’m not asking for a contribution today — but I _am_ asking you to stand with me. My race in OH-13 is one of the most competitive in the country, and the GOP is already attacking me on TV. [**_We need to prove we have the numbers to put up a fight. That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you endorse my reelection campaign today? I’m counting on 10,000 supporters to add your name before midnight:_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120813431/587453409/-1893384049?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.12.07_Personal-Endorsement_B2_F1_S1_C1_IA_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzBhODVkYS1jOGQzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Eym15OuSYkKVWbHQenKqXXObcfA64fo1iNFU66fJzw4=&emci=cb00d299-c4d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=c30a85da-c8d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=11703046) | | [ ADD YOUR NAME >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120813434/587453412/-1893384049?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.12.07_Personal-Endorsement_B2_F1_S1_C1_IA_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzBhODVkYS1jOGQzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Eym15OuSYkKVWbHQenKqXXObcfA64fo1iNFU66fJzw4=&emci=cb00d299-c4d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=c30a85da-c8d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=11703046)

**Peter, I know how hard the people of Northeast Ohio work. I’ve seen it all my life.** But growing up in Akron, I quickly learned that working families throughout our community aren’t given the same opportunities or a level playing field that others enjoy.
That’s exactly why I entered a career in public service.
Our community knows we deserve an advocate on the federal level — someone who isn’t afraid to stand up to people who are standing in the way of progress; someone who will advocate for our jobs, healthcare, and freedoms; and someone who will work to make the day to day a little bit easier. And that’s exactly what I’m trying to do, every day, in Washington.
My promise to you is that I’ll always strive to be that type of leader, and that I’ll never stop fighting for the community I love. **When it comes to fighting for Northeast Ohio, I’m only just getting started.**
**But I can’t keep up this critical work if Republicans push me out of Congress.**
[**_I cannot win without your support, Peter. It may seem like a small and simple action, but adding your name to my personal endorsement list will show everyone we have what it takes to win. Please sign on today:_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120813438/587453415/-1893384049?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.12.07_Personal-Endorsement_B2_F1_S1_C1_IA_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzBhODVkYS1jOGQzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Eym15OuSYkKVWbHQenKqXXObcfA64fo1iNFU66fJzw4=&emci=cb00d299-c4d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=c30a85da-c8d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=11703046)
| [ ADD YOUR NAME >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120813442/587453419/-1893384049?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.12.07_Personal-Endorsement_B2_F1_S1_C1_IA_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzBhODVkYS1jOGQzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Eym15OuSYkKVWbHQenKqXXObcfA64fo1iNFU66fJzw4=&emci=cb00d299-c4d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=c30a85da-c8d3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=11703046)

Thank you so much. It’s an honor to have you on this team.
— Emilia Sykes

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

[**Can we count on you to chip in a few dollars to Emilia's campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120813445/587453423/1396089444?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.12.07_Personal-Endorsement_B2_F1_S1_C1_IA_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzBhODVkYS1jOGQzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Eym15OuSYkKVWbHQenKqXXObcfA64fo1iNFU66fJzw4=) | [CHIP IN $5 >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120813448/587453425/1396089444?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.12.07_Personal-Endorsement_B2_F1_S1_C1_IA_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzBhODVkYS1jOGQzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Eym15OuSYkKVWbHQenKqXXObcfA64fo1iNFU66fJzw4=)

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

This kind of collaboration helped spur technological revolutions in the past.

Now, this breakthrough supplier might be at the forefront of the next leap forward.

Jeff is sharing the company’s name, symbol, and his reasons for believing it could help transform the market.

Stay ahead — by the time the news spreads, this opportunity could be moving fast.

[👉 Click here to watch the footage and get the details.](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=ab1cfb7e878a4039a4152bb29307c1ab&_e=fiv7WUXJB4c_RxO0KWdhgxm0SB2QOh25mZdhQzldz20wuMtsVANOkMHN3AZtpbaA-Zj3cgfZdFrEXR0NJP7VDxgznuuy_WdPORuCU18bRXkw77sML56knjfTKY2H0tEBBuXYcPduBDk_Gzga_0RvmvdM9eL5PNytmBe-EOqoYTFMdzUtst_Y-ABY53fJ0Aw9dieHVOrZer1y_YKWi-A_yaowdJt7NoqOKtWq0-RAjQOi--gb0WbyBKHvoYU5QYX86PvXNHoNbtj2GxmDoRXq0cEFHjtTPZdnWBP_yFmfTmr2KDq6hquV3ynpshzxbnetKmF3aGIzzqRfmR1l787IsKA3si710eQP2mvrJjhvFNPpfhUDzQew2gsyUAIpNzVXn9U_mdG4hCbZecAe3JRj6fizN_q4UZ-s3oVIi4FvU61ZVif8tgXtG1UAgNNBq3Mqj4aULNJOuzp0CpZg-Qp4CdT8QvlOPWGFAEbW7Xu6t2nV2GzjhdLUu08skEDrr3KQxS6DdWD7Pd5bgepQMjGGmRsx-zq5T_Ae_QpHd5G_mH5QvbhE_ggWzzqCOO0AaarNCj2Lc-DavrQO4gWphJhVeQ%3D%3D)
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. body:
A Rare Win for Colorado Conservatives — And It’s Big
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**December 7, 2025** **SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST**
| | Dear Rocky Mountain Voice family,
Every once in a while, Colorado gives conservatives a reason to celebrate — a real, hard-fought victory that reminds us why persistence matters. This week, we witnessed one of those rare moments.
Eight Colorado school districts secured a **[landmark settlement](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** with CHSAA that restores their authority to protect girls’ sports, locker rooms, and overnight accommodations by _biological sex_ — without fear of punishment, sanction, or political retaliation. It’s the most significant statewide development to date in the fight for fairness, privacy, and the integrity of women’s athletics.
District 49 called it a decisive step toward “equal opportunity for girls” and praised CHSAA for finally doing the right thing. And for once, the national conversation reflected that momentum. Riley Gaines amplified [RMV’s original reporting](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), helping propel the story past 100,000 views in hours.
If you’ve spent any time fighting for conservative values in Colorado, you know victories rarely come easy — or often. This one did not fall from the sky. It came from local school boards who stood firm, parents who refused to back down, and attorneys willing to take the arrows. And it came because communities demanded fairness for female athletes who deserve a level playing field.
While the broader legal battle with the Civil Rights Commission and Attorney General Phil Weiser continues, this settlement marks a turning point. For the first time, the state’s activities association has agreed — in writing — that districts may classify sports teams and intimate facilities by biological sex, keep girls’ spaces protected, and speak openly about safety and competitive fairness without being treated as misconduct.
For Colorado parents and athletes, that’s not just a policy shift. It’s hope. Hope that common sense can prevail.
Hope that local control still means something.
Hope that courage can change the trajectory of this state.
Thank you for reading, sharing, and standing with us. When stories like this break through — when the truth can’t be buried — it’s because of you.
**Read the full article here** ➡ [Colorado schools win landmark settlement protecting female athletes](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
With gratitude and a rare but much-needed dose of good news, — Team RMV
---
| | |
---
| | **TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK**
---
**[“The DOJ can take a hike”: Jena Griswold rejects federal demand for voter data](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Colorado Secretary of State Jena Griswold escalated her standoff with the Trump administration this week, rejecting a request for the state’s full, unredacted voter file. “We will not comply with the Trump Department of Justice’s request for Coloradans’ sensitive voting information. The DOJ can take a hike...”
**[Colorado schools win landmark settlement protecting female athletes](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) In a move that reshapes how school athletics operate across the state, School District 49 and seven partner districts have secured a landmark settlement with the Colorado High School Activities Association. The agreement formally protects biological sex policies for sports, locker rooms and overnight travel, and it removes CHSAA from the center of Colorado’s most charged debate over fairness, privacy and Title IX.
__
**[Debunking the “Californians Turned Colorado Blue” Myth: Organic Change or Engineered Illusion?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY MARK COOK, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _The claim that an influx of liberal Californians (or even broader interstate migration) single-handedly flipped Colorado from a Republican-leaning swing state to a reliably Democratic one collapses under even modest scrutiny of the numbers. Between 2000 and 2024, Colorado absorbed roughly 2.8 million gross domestic in-migrants, with Californians making up about 25% (≈685,000)._
|

**STATE**
**[Inside the story Colorado rarely hears: Trauma, transition and the path back to truth](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) “It took me almost two decades to realize the error,” Antoinette De La Cruz told a Fort Collins audience on November 20. “Transitioning didn’t fix anything. It delayed the inevitable. Healing.”
**[Court Won’t Toss Suit Claiming Polis Violated Colorado’s Limits on ICE Cooperation](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A state judge dismissed Gov. Jared Polis’ request to throw out the case. A judge has denied Gov. Jared Polis’ request to dismiss the case against him in state court alleging his attempt to comply with a subpoena from Immigration and Customs Enforcement breaks state law.
**[State Regulators Move Colorado Toward All-Electric Heating by 2050 at Any Cost](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Colorado officials are making another major push toward electrification of home heating and deep cuts to carbon from natural gas, despite consumer cost concerns and the Trump administration’s attempt to revive the use of fossil fuels.

**[Liberty Vote’s Big Buy: What It Means for Colorado Voters and Why Questions Remain](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY COLORADO INSTITUTE FOR FAIR ELECTIONS, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Imagine this: You’re heading to your local polling place in Colorado, ready to cast your vote on a crisp November morning. You scan your ID at a digital check-in station, mark your paper ballot, and feed it into a machine that tallies it up. Sounds straightforward, right?_

**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[WASHINGTON EXAMINER](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) President Donald Trump took to Truth Social on Wednesday to scold Gov. Jared Polis (D-CO) regarding the case of former Mesa County Clerk Tina Peters, who was sentenced to nine years in prison in 2024 for charges of giving unauthorized individuals access to the county’s election systems.

**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[THE GATEWAY PUNDIT](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Minnesota Governor Tim Walz is under fire after employees from the Minnesota Department of Human Services (DHS) issued a bombshell statement accusing the far-left governor of orchestrating a sweeping cover-up to shield a sprawling Somali immigrant fraud ring that stole more than $1 billion in taxpayer funds and punishing whistleblowers who tried to stop it.

**[The quiet takeover: What early oaths and a Friday ultimatum meant for Douglas County Schools](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Douglas County’s newly elected school board majority took office days early and outside public view after a week of private oaths, a Friday deadline, and a dispute over whether a policy on the Healthy Kids Colorado Survey (HKCS) should be added to the December 2 meeting agenda.

**[Plaintiffs Win $10 Million Settlement in CU Anschutz Case Over COVID Vaccine Mandate](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The University of Colorado Anschutz will pay more than $10 million to settle a lawsuit brought by students and staff who sued in 2021 after being denied religious exemptions to the campus’s COVID-19 vaccination mandate, according to a group that represented the plaintiffs.
**[Copper Creek Wolves Linked to Another Livestock Killing in Gunnison County](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A heifer found dead in eastern Gunnison County on Nov. 22 was killed by one of the yearlings from the Copper Creek wolf pack, according to a rancher, who did not want to be identified. It’s the fourth livestock death in November attributed to wolves.

That request rests on unconstitutional assumptions and a series of demonstrably false claims—many of which CCCA Director Matt Crane repeated in his November 24, 2025 interview on 710 KNUS, spread across two morning segments — Let My Tina Go! and Should Tina Peters Be Pardoned?_

**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY HUNTER RIVERA,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _As the seventh-largest energy-producing state in the nation, Colorado has established itself as a leader in not only traditional energy, but renewable and next-generation sources as well. That’s why new, all-of-the-above energy legislation moving through Congress is so important for the Centennial State._

**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY DRAKE HUNTER,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _When you look for hope, peace, joy, and love in your relationships and reality during this Advent Season, what source is shaping who you are—the Good News or the fake news? Across Colorado, the nation, and around the world, people start their day scrolling through headlines, alerts, predictions, and debates._ __

**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY DRAKE HUNTER,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Let’s explore the Reason, Grace, Truth, and Revelation behind the Calling of God’s Children. And it came because communities demanded fairness for female athletes who deserve a level playing field. While the broader legal battle with the Civil Rights Commission and Attorney General Phil Weiser continues, this settlement marks a turning point. For the first time, the state’s activities association has agreed — in writing — that districts may classify sports teams and intimate facilities by biological sex, keep girls’ spaces protected, and speak openly about safety and competitive fairness without being treated as misconduct. For Colorado parents and athletes, that’s not just a policy shift. It’s hope. Hope that common sense can prevail. Hope that local control still means something. Hope that courage can change the trajectory of this state. Thank you for reading, sharing, and standing with us. When stories like this break through — when the truth can’t be buried — it’s because of you. Read the full article here ➡ With gratitude and a rare but much-needed dose of good news, — Team RMV | | | | | TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK BY JEN SCHUMANN, Colorado Secretary of State Jena Griswold escalated her standoff with the Trump administration this week, rejecting a request for the state’s full, unredacted voter file. “We will not comply with the Trump Department of Justice’s request for Coloradans’ sensitive voting information. The DOJ can take a hike...” BY JEN SCHUMANN, In a move that reshapes how school athletics operate across the state, School District 49 and seven partner districts have secured a landmark settlement with the Colorado High School Activities Association. The agreement formally protects biological sex policies for sports, locker rooms and overnight travel, and it removes CHSAA from the center of Colorado’s most charged debate over fairness, privacy and Title IX. BY MARK COOK, The claim that an influx of liberal Californians (or even broader interstate migration) single-handedly flipped Colorado from a Republican-leaning swing state to a reliably Democratic one collapses under even modest scrutiny of the numbers. Between 2000 and 2024, Colorado absorbed roughly 2.8 million gross domestic in-migrants, with Californians making up about 25% (≈685,000). | STATE BY JEN SCHUMANN, “It took me almost two decades to realize the error,” Antoinette De La Cruz told a Fort Collins audience on November 20. “Transitioning didn’t fix anything. It delayed the inevitable. Healing.” A state judge dismissed Gov. Jared Polis’ request to throw out the case. A judge has denied Gov. Jared Polis’ request to dismiss the case against him in state court alleging his attempt to comply with a subpoena from Immigration and Customs Enforcement breaks state law. Colorado officials are making another major push toward electrification of home heating and deep cuts to carbon from natural gas, despite consumer cost concerns and the Trump administration’s attempt to revive the use of fossil fuels. | NATIONAL BY COLORADO INSTITUTE FOR FAIR ELECTIONS, Imagine this: You’re heading to your local polling place in Colorado, ready to cast your vote on a crisp November morning. You scan your ID at a digital check-in station, mark your paper ballot, and feed it into a machine that tallies it up. Sounds straightforward, right? President Donald Trump took to Truth Social on Wednesday to scold Gov. Jared Polis (D-CO) regarding the case of former Mesa County Clerk Tina Peters, who was sentenced to nine years in prison in 2024 for charges of giving unauthorized individuals access to the county’s election systems. Minnesota Governor Tim Walz is under fire after employees from the Minnesota Department of Human Services (DHS) issued a bombshell statement accusing the far-left governor of orchestrating a sweeping cover-up to shield a sprawling Somali immigrant fraud ring that stole more than $1 billion in taxpayer funds and punishing whistleblowers who tried to stop it. | LOCAL BY SHAINA COLE, Douglas County’s newly elected school board majority took office days early and outside public view after a week of private oaths, a Friday deadline, and a dispute over whether a policy on the Healthy Kids Colorado Survey (HKCS) should be added to the December 2 meeting agenda. The University of Colorado Anschutz will pay more than $10 million to settle a lawsuit brought by students and staff who sued in 2021 after being denied religious exemptions to the campus’s COVID-19 vaccination mandate, according to a group that represented the plaintiffs. A heifer found dead in eastern Gunnison County on Nov. 22 was killed by one of the yearlings from the Copper Creek wolf pack, according to a rancher, who did not want to be identified. It’s the fourth livestock death in November attributed to wolves. | COMMENTARY BY A. L. GOODWIN, The Colorado County Clerks Association (CCCA) sent a letter urging Governor Polis to block the potential transfer of Tina Peters to federal custody. That request rests on unconstitutional assumptions and a series of demonstrably false claims—many of which CCCA Director Matt Crane repeated in his November 24, 2025 interview on 710 KNUS, spread across two morning segments — Let My Tina Go! and Should Tina Peters Be Pardoned? BY HUNTER RIVERA, As the seventh-largest energy-producing state in the nation, Colorado has established itself as a leader in not only traditional energy, but renewable and next-generation sources as well. That’s why new, all-of-the-above energy legislation moving through Congress is so important for the Centennial State. BY DRAKE HUNTER, When you look for hope, peace, joy, and love in your relationships and reality during this Advent Season, what source is shaping who you are—the Good News or the fake news? Across Colorado, the nation, and around the world, people start their day scrolling through headlines, alerts, predictions, and debates. BY DRAKE HUNTER, Let’s explore the Reason, Grace, Truth, and Revelation behind the Calling of God’s Children. Every follower of Jesus has two callings—a Primary Calling and a Secondary Calling. **High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**

name: Andrea
subject: Gerrymandering, ILEA, and other December Updates
body:
Here's how you can help the fight for fair maps and strong public schools | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/andreahunley/events-for-democracy-october-november-18253990?e=d9ebccf591)
---
| |
---
| |
# REDISTRICTING UPDATES
Dear Friends,
As many of you have likely seen, the Indiana House of Representatives approved a new set of [gerrymandered congressional maps](https://andreahunley.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=c6f532b85c&e=d9ebccf591) last week. These maps break up communities of interest, hurting both urban and rural representation, and dilute the power of Black and brown communities.

The push for these maps is a direct result of DC outsiders trying to control Indiana's governor and legislators. Each of us was elected to support our communities and help address Hoosier needs, like housing, childcare, healthcare and utility costs.

By pursuing naked partisan ambition and greed, the governor has turned his back on Hoosiers.**Fortunately, the fight's not over yet**. We can still stop these maps and return to working on the issues that really matter.

The Senate Elections Committee is meeting Monday, December 8 from 1:30 to 5:30 p.m. at the Indiana Statehouse to take public testimony on the maps. Show up and make your voice heard! Testimony sign-ups begin at 8:30 a.m. outside the Senate Chamber. Space may be limited, so arrive early if you want to speak.

If we all step up, and make our voices heard, we can protect our democracy and keep the legislature focused on improving the lives of all Hoosiers.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
# ILEA: THE FUTURE OF IPS
With all the noise at the State House, its also important to keep up with what is going on in our own communities. Last session, the legislature created the **Indianapolis Local Education Alliance (ILEA)** , an appointed group tasked with giving recommendations on the future of public schools in the Indianapolis Public Schools boundary.

At the ILEA meeting on 12/3, members of this appointed board voted to move forward options that dilute our elected school board's power to govern, operate transportation and run facilities. This move takes away power from the community, making our elected board essentially powerless.

As a public school principal, I understand how important it is for the community to have a voice in governance of schools. Our parents, students and teachers deserve representatives who answer directly to them, not a board beholden to special interests. We also cannot separate transportation and facilities from the day-to-day running of schools: all of these systems are interconnected.

That's why I'm supporting the People's Proposal, and calling for:
* A fully elected public school board that holds all schools, of all models, equally accountable.
* Every public school to provide transportation to all students, through an accountable and transparent transportation system.
* A limit on charter authorizers to make sure that we have the right number of schools for our students, better accountability, and fewer school closings.

You can help make your voice heard! The ILEA will hold two listening sessions where you can come and tell them about your priorities for IPS:
* 12/10 at KIPP Legacy High School, 6-8 pm
* 12/15 at the Madam Walker Legacy Center, 12-2 pm

The alliance will take a final vote on 12/17, where you can also speak up. Don't miss your chance to have your voice heard!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
# SENATOR HUNLEY IN THE NEWS
Here are just a few of the things I have been up to this month, in addition to fighting mid-decade redistricting: I know that even when Republicans are busy with culture wars, we still need to fight for safety in our city, rights for our workers, and respect for our Black youth.

‘[Rally for Safer Streets’ held in downtown Indianapolis](https://andreahunley.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=c56e5304ea&e=d9ebccf591 "'Rally for FOX 59: 'Rally for Safer Streets' held in downtown Indianapolis ") \- FOX 59:

State senator Andrea Hunley also spoke during Sunday’s event. At the rally, Hunley urged local and state lawmakers to take steps to improve traffic safety.

“This crisis requires leadership, urgency and solutions that center human life,” Hunley said. “Other cities are acting quickly with proven tools. Indianapolis can do the same. We cannot keep grieving children, parents and neighbors waiting years for safety projects. People deserve streets where they can move with confidence and ease.”

[Day 30 on strike: Horseshoe dealers mark ‘Labor Day in November’ with solidarity, music and rebuilt picket lines](https://andreahunley.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=28349b2b21&e=d9ebccf591) \- FIGHT BACK NEWS:

More than 100 Teamsters from other shops joined the celebration, alongside members of the UAW, USW, AFSCME, AFT, and other unions from across central Indiana. Indiana State Senator Andrea Hunley and Indianapolis City-County Commissioner Jesse Brown also attended, walking the lines and speaking directly with the dealers and dual rates who have held out for a month in the face of weather, corporate pressure and coordinated strike-breaking by the company and the city of Shelbyville.

[The Indianapolis Chapter of Jack and Jill of America, Inc. hosts Dayla at the Madam Walker Legacy Center](https://andreahunley.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=3b66ee446a&e=d9ebccf591) \- INDIANAPOLIS RECORDER:

WRTV’s Amber Grigley served as emcee for the event. Special guests State Representative Cherrish Pryor, State Senator J.D. Ford, State Senator Andrea Hunley, and Indiana Civil Rights Commission (ICRC) Chairwoman Adrianne Slash delivered engaging mini-sessions on the CROWN Act, how laws are made and the ICRC complaint process. Students shared powerful testimonies about the importance of their crowns and wrote heartfelt letters to their elected officials.

---
|
---
| | |
# HELP KEEP THE WORK GOING!
DONATE THROUGH ACT BLUE EXPRESS
**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express,_your donation will go through immediately:_** **[Express Donate: $50](https://andreahunley.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=f5cabcbd60&e=d9ebccf591)** **[Express Donate: $100](https://andreahunley.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=8c62585f82&e=d9ebccf591)** **[Express Donate: $250](https://andreahunley.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=e15c13beb6&e=d9ebccf591)** **[Or, donate another amount](https://andreahunley.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=c01718fc43&e=d9ebccf591)**
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| | | | [](https://andreahunley.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=5c4794d259&e=d9ebccf591)
---
[](https://andreahunley.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=87628429a8&e=d9ebccf591)
---

---

_Copyright © 2025 Andrea Hunley for Indy, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website or by signing up at an event.

**Our mailing address is:**
Andrea Hunley for IndyPO Box 44715Indianapolis, IN 46244-0715
[Add us to your address book](https://andreahunley.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=f3c9603900)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://andreahunley.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=f3c9603900&e=d9ebccf591&c=6b52804770) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://andreahunley.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=f3c9603900&t=b&e=d9ebccf591&c=6b52804770).

name: Air Force One Alert
subject: Obama just went NUCLEAR against President Trump
body:
This is truly a first...
| Peter,
---
The _UNTHINKABLE_ just happened...
---
First, Obama crept out of his “retirement” as the midterm elections grow near.
---
And now, he’s gone NUCLEAR against President Trump!
---
_**But mid-flight on Air Force One, the President just sounded the alarm on Obama’s latest PLOT to _STEAL_ our majorities at the midterm elections. **_

## **A Coherent National Security Strategy**
Regular readers of my work know that I have been closely watching America's foreign policy during Trump's second term. While others saw incoherence or contradictions - destroying drug boats in the Caribbean but not those of the Houthi's in the Red Sea, pulling back from much of the world while getting more engaged in South America, moving on from the War of Terror while still using its doctrines, tactics, and legal justifications - I have repeatedly [argued](https://substack.com/redirect/62966068-9c76-47f2-bf71-1b3d3fd557f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that these seemingly disconnected actions are the output of a coherent policy.
Many also still believe in the false dichotomy of an isolationist versus interventionist approach to foreign policy. This framing confounds useful analysis. A more useful consideration, I believe, is not whether or not to intervene, but rather where, if at all, intervention might make sense. Thinking on these terms helps make sense of what on first glance seems like inconsistent policy. So where does the White House think America should be willing to intervene to protect our interests? The answer is simple: The Western Hemisphere.
* * *
## [America's Evolving Global Role](https://substack.com/redirect/80254c37-3e22-4f52-9ce7-0d8ea531d2e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| Feb 27
[](https://substack.com/redirect/80254c37-3e22-4f52-9ce7-0d8ea531d2e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Since the day he descended an escalator to upend American politics, President Donald Trump has consistently delighted his supporters and confounded his critics. Seemingly on separate planets, these t...](https://substack.com/redirect/80254c37-3e22-4f52-9ce7-0d8ea531d2e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/80254c37-3e22-4f52-9ce7-0d8ea531d2e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Recent news confirms that the Trump Administration is worrying less about Chinese and Russian influence in Eastern Europe, Africa, and Southeast Asia and more about their operations in our backyard. Think of the approach as the second incarnation of the [Monroe Doctrine](https://substack.com/redirect/878e5a2f-284b-4b51-8c2e-9099521bb930?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a modern day version of the foreign policy framework that guided America during the early years of our republic. This is why we are seeing a massive military build-up off the coast of South America and not in Eastern Europe, and why many military analysts question whether the US would put American lives at risk to defend a small island off the coast of China.
* * *
## [A Coherent Strategy Incoherently Described](https://substack.com/redirect/45c5e80c-a800-454b-97f8-59d77d415ef7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

[](https://substack.com/redirect/45c5e80c-a800-454b-97f8-59d77d415ef7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Rising tensions in the Caribbean Sea and with Venezuela have led pundits and policymakers alike to ask questions about the coherence of the Trump Administration's foreign policy. Many are confused, n...](https://substack.com/redirect/45c5e80c-a800-454b-97f8-59d77d415ef7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/45c5e80c-a800-454b-97f8-59d77d415ef7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
This past week the Trump Administration released the ["National Security Strategy of the United States of America](https://substack.com/redirect/b7b471fb-1484-4133-9b25-a150a7813637?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)," a policy document that confirms much of this thinking. In fact, it proclaims a ["Trump Corollary"](https://substack.com/redirect/421b96cc-c725-46fe-8e08-377cfac686db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the Monroe Doctrine, which clearly states that "**The United States must be preeminent in the Western Hemisphere as a condition of our security and prosperity -- a condition that allows us to assert ourselves confidently where and when we need to in the region." **Trump is telegraphing to the entire world that America will have a strong military presence in ...

name: Voter Action Project
subject: DOJ's state voter data requests
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Democracy Docket: Trump Administration Snubs States Asking Why the DOJ Wants Their Voter Data [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120725_2&amount=25]
Team: If you didn't know, the MAGA-ified U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) has been demanding voter data from the states since May, requesting that election officials turn over unredacted copies of voter rolls and every voter registration application submitted in the past 18 months.
Several states with MAGA-aligned Secretaries of State and opponents of voting rights in charge of elections have complied, but 10 states are holding out to protect voters from intimidation, requesting information on how DOJ and the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) intend to use the state voter data they’ve demanded.
The agencies have released contradictory statements on how the data is being used, leading the secretaries of state from Arizona, California, Colorado, Maine, Minnesota, Nevada, New Mexico, Oregon, Vermont and Washington to send a joint letter demanding clarity before they turn over the sensitive registration information and expressing concerns about the “ potential lack of compliance with federal law .”
The issue is simple: The U.S. Constitution entrusts the states, not the president or his agencies, to run elections. There's no legal basis for the DOJ to demand such sensitive and personally identifying information. It's yet another overreach by a president fueled by lies and taken by sycophants who are more loyal to his every whim than the rule of law they swore an oath to uphold.
Team, voters across the country deserve safe, secure, and private elections, free from intimidation or interference. Help us defend our fundamental right to vote with $25 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120725_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120725_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120725_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120725_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120725_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120725_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120725_2&amount=35]
MAGA officials at DOJ have escalated their attacks on these states, with suppressive former Trump lawyer, now Assistant Attorney General Harmeet Dhillon demanding electronic copies of voter registration lists that “ must contain all fields, including the registrant’s full name, date of birth, residential address, his or her state driver’s license number or the last four digits of the registrant’s social security number ” despite the Trump administration not providing notice required under federal privacy and administrative laws for changes to DHS's Systemic Alien Verification for Entitlements (SAVE) database.
“ The Trump Administration’s requests for voter data are unprecedented. Americans deserve to know that when they register to vote, the Trump administration will not misuse their information,” Colorado Secretary of State Jena Griswold said.
“ The Department of Justice hasn’t shown any compelling reason for wanting the sensitive voter information of every American. They can’t even get their stories straight about what they plan to use it for or who will have access, and their demands appear to violate federal privacy laws and the Constitution,” Maine Secretary of State Shenna Bellows also said.
Folks, this is all about trying to suppress as many voters as they can through intimidation ahead of next year's midterm elections. We have to do everything we can to inform voters of what is at stake and what their rights are.
Our elections are a sacred part of our democracy. Fuel efforts to protect them with $25 or however much you can >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120725_2&amount=25]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=120725_2&amount=20]

clean_body: Voter Action Project [] Democracy Docket: Trump Administration Snubs States Asking Why the DOJ Wants Their Voter Data [] Team: If you didn't know, the MAGA-ified U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) has been demanding voter data from the states since May, requesting that election officials turn over unredacted copies of voter rolls and every voter registration application submitted in the past 18 months. name: Powered by People
subject: We’re on the ground now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

The Supreme Court ruled that Texas must use Greg Abbott’s gerrymandered
maps—once again changing district lines and leaving Texans confused about
where they vote and who they vote for. The chaos is exactly what the GOP
hoped for: a chance to rig the maps in their favor ahead of the midterm
elections.

But Powered by People isn’t sitting back and waiting to see what happens.
We’re on the ground right now, because waiting until a few months before
the 2026 elections is not an option.

The truth is, we can win even under these gerrymandered maps. That’s why
we’re organizing in urban and rural communities alike, recruiting
candidates and volunteers, heading to college campuses to register young
voters, and meeting people where they are to make sure they know how
critical it is to get involved.

This work doesn’t just flip a few votes. It builds a foundation: a base of
voters who know where and how to make their voice heard, who understand
what’s at stake, and who will be ready to act when the time comes.

But running an on-the-ground program like this—registering voters,
connecting with communities, and preparing for the fights ahead—takes a
lot of resources. And we can’t do it without the support of this team.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251207-2.v8PEGI&refcode=ema20251207-240514&t=1002&akid=240514%2E444211%2EA1knH7 ]Will you chip in $3 today to keep this work going
strong? Republicans may think they can rig elections in their favor, but
we won’t let them get away with it.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251207-2.v8PEGI&refcode=ema20251207-240514&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=240514%2E444211%2EA1knH7 ]DONATE $3

Thank you,

Powered by People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=240514%2E444211%2EA1knH7

name: Team Marsha Blackburn
subject: Sign President Trump’s Christmas Card before this offer disappears!
body:
🎄 The season of joy is in full swing! 🎄

subject: Republicans are fleeing congress:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Thirty Republicans in Congress just announced they’re not coming back in 2026.
This is what happens when incumbents see shifting numbers, shrinking margins, and a political map that suddenly looks a lot less safe for the party in power.
For Democrats, this creates real, concrete opportunities: Open seats. No entrenched incumbents. Competitive primaries.
So we're asking directly: will you chip in to help GOTV PAC launch programs in these newly-open districts and build a real Democratic path to expanding the House map?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=Email10072025] DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=Email10072025]

Custom Donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email10072025]
If we do this right, 2026 won’t just be another midterm. It’ll be the year Democrats prove that even the deepest red seats aren’t as “safe” as Republicans want everyone to believe.
-GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

712 H St NE

Washington, DC 20002
United States

Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. body:
| | | **Trump can’t help himself... even on Thanksgiving** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXO2FiuxEhBk3zsUTCYW6F8lB7-RffhngK16Xoh7-Vi8mCt6gt3nev0IDvPxYqGlK4P24QsgmVAMhGXEWSqUv8Zx8XGgsp4Fc4vwO5CLGIl27cIGosQZnwDKkfTDttoAWvAQZwlpJlkB05ysRX7Wd-xn1f4JXl3Erz_iQyTzFxyo-JfvJAMvtY_44UBYl82bRLQYQm_56Kk9a2YhtbSoLUc_1PejOIoBfrGJIN_gm5LO5bYpIr9f1xowq4f18zUGU_eKLppDNaqqBe2raJz9Jhhc4AI9-vubdExomhLXTDE4Tt0EgFHfLaw9QstdcfTpij-9y2X6rW3bncm2lv7W7S9V4ewmJhCMClXry4qepr-63M/4m9/aB6K10DwQO2xhILXJj3YDw/h0/h001.ICzPKVkLtkMFJT0bsZCqKZ4leP3PeX7Cjc-EiyOERNc)**[STOP this ableism and FLIP the House. Donate $10 or more to Able Dems today.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXO2FiuxEhBk3zsUTCYW6F8lB7-RffhngK16Xoh7-Vi8mAQcHBGZTQyASHdftBqMbHvaM67lJJs1zDETiQ2AQ3s9Kej1bPopPTeswETTx3Jz83gIjRu7Wbe1oEVMv_AA8gpiBWj6FT8EybA7GP3CPlEzsxbawXKydc4B_vnOCGE2SiiV1rGZlGVDWvO6lyHk723IY-lbT-SE6pQ0yZAfilLuWXRNJ_OJi7sPbjV0BtKMCzgCxTLTZ_f8hR7d55SqXVhF7KZdPknqEIo6DgxawlwUIs8c1mBV1Ajhr-3KbTxd3p2rQ-dG3YrqgDWrx8G206S0QHXZsC48NwLTzy4wCSqgoCrwqJOtmcklRO5TAfJp0Y/4m9/aB6K10DwQO2xhILXJj3YDw/h1/h001.pAc65IgzWLwf0FBQkZ-Ho2F25ayBGqS1GVCneLztUaA)**
* * *
On a holiday dedicated to goodwill and giving thanks, Trump **once again** used the word “retarded”, directing it towards Minnesota Governor Tim Walz, the father of a neurodivergent son.
It's just one front in his war on Americans with disabilities:
* Mocking a reporter's physical disability
* Deadly cuts to healthcare
* Gutting special ed
* The disgusting list goes on and on and on...

**As the founder of Able Dems, this fight is personal.**
Growing up as a wheelchair user with a stutter, I was called “retarded.” People underestimated me - as they do with many Americans with disabilities.
But I never gave up - and today, I’m asking you to fight alongside me to defeat MAGA Republicans.
**[Support our cause by donating today. Your contribution will help elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies who will DEFEAT ableists and bigots.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXO2FiuxEhBk3zsUTCYW6F8lB7-RffhngK16Xoh7-Vi8mAXTZvBaxwdbCtQWh1rQQdr_KIPOty4KESIlpqVCWOOyGrFYDup1IROXnzbOsUfcM09CyPt6ntISCBuwSxMiF3O_d60FY6IdnhNaU2aybJRu93GDoTCwJ0bNeW99OZ8HT0XRP1UY1EFbuu6_hXpcH9GowGf_4WPcSdaEYq3A7lFbrE1Hu3cYmHgRaHL90g6kfatIzL9GR6Gt_DUgDSd1XgBnoNVUuk0Qk5t8froUTPrkSyzB0ma3ZWzorFq_wJbooAlHO8U1hYjbfxaaKEJr7p6sxrL-kfqushJs07oGMdqADPhgAky8nO0-RzH0I3X5Co/4m9/aB6K10DwQO2xhILXJj3YDw/h2/h001.NPLhIR3F8YAgZMAUBiirQeBO9WrMSXoQo1NnENhbxAE)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

clean_body: | | | Trump can’t help himself... even on Thanksgiving On a holiday dedicated to goodwill and giving thanks, Trump once again used the word “retarded”, directing it towards Minnesota Governor Tim Walz, the father of a neurodivergent son. It's just one front in his war on Americans with disabilities: Mocking a reporter's physical disability Deadly cuts to healthcare Gutting special ed The disgusting list goes on and on and on... As the founder of Able Dems, this fight is personal. Growing up as a wheelchair user with a stutter, I was called “retarded.” People underestimated me - as they do with many Americans with disabilities. But I never gave up - and today, I’m asking you to fight alongside me to defeat MAGA Republicans. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Together, we can create a society that values every person and rejects the damaging narratives of MAGA. —Jeff Person, Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to Able Dems PAC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . clean_body: Friends, Let me get right to it. A Georgia congressman floated the idea of defunding New York City after Zohran Mamdani is sworn in and I am not letting it go unanswered. | Friends, Let me get right to it. A Georgia congressman floated the idea of defunding New York City after Zohran Mamdani is sworn in and I am not letting it go unanswered. | | You know as New York City’s only Republican in Washington, I will fight Mamdani’s socialist agenda every step of the way. But I am also not going to let anyone punish or hurt New York City in a way thar will undermine public safety or strip critical city services. I have one job, and that job is to protect the people I represent, not play along with anyone’s political games. | When bureaucrats moved to fire employees from the World Trade Center healthcare program, I stepped in and stopped it. When Washington slashed counter-terrorism funding for New York, I worked directly with President Trump to restore $100 million dollars for the NYPD. Because when New York is getting squeezed, I go to work. Now the Democrats are trying to erase this district entirely. They are dragging us into court again, trying to redraw my seat so they can silence the ONLY Republican voice in New York City. | If they succeed, there will be no one left to stand up to Mamdani’s radical agenda or call out bad ideas from either side that would put New York at risk. Friends, this fight is only getting more intense, and I need your help to stay in it. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you, Nicole | Nicole for New York, PO Box 60487, Staten Island, NY 10306

name: Team Downing
subject: Elon Musk's call for a NATIONAL ELECTION OVERHAUL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
We can’t afford to wait for our elections to fix themselves.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-Gkqefc3lBKTvJXp5zQw4w)[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._59juA)Peter,
The integrity of our electoral process is fundamental to the survival of our democracy. Now, one of the world's most influential voices is demanding immediate, commonsense action to ensure every legal vote is counted and election results are trusted.[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)In his recent statements, the world's richest man laid out four essential safeguards that every American should be able to agree on to ensure election transparency and security:
1. Voter ID to stop fraud before it starts
2. Paper ballots to verify every vote
3. Same-day voting to keep the process secure
4. Proof of citizenship to protect the integrity of every election

These aren’t radical or partisan ideas. They’re simple, commonsense protections that are standard practice in developed democracies worldwide.**
**Now more than ever, securing our elections must be Congress’s top priority. Our majority, the integrity of our democracy, and President Trump’s America First agenda ALL DEPEND on delivering on this urgent voter ID mandate.
Peter, we’re begging you: [Please add your name today if you agree it's time to lock down our elections, restore trust in the vote, and support Elon Musk's call for mandatory national election standards:](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-MyTRAZR7JiIsBcDGSA)[PROTECT OUR ELECT – SIGN TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)The integrity of every future election cycle rests in the hands of Patriots who are unwilling to compromise on the fundamental principles of our Republic.

Thank you in advance for your participation,
Team Downing | |

subject: “I love hitler” - Boebert’s world view trickles down to Young Republicans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
These comments did not happen within a vacuum. Lauren Boebert bears responsibility for hateful and violent language—her poisoned world view is trickling down to the next generation of Republicans.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u89iI62GNzw6-WlZoersNqYaMHURccFxmC_Lv1sv--UQCseImhyb2lGBmLctn1efkoKKRjmHhr4NdnwUzSUiF5R7jvLTDPiEmo9rwjpcUGGq6-fGAjSGBuyGcU55R5haSKVEUif7FGHOgUEiQxeFaBneLOtAo0RyldIRNcNmf_G378PdCH2PrX26su9YiiGnZCJsiGLS2iTIJOfezmVx6CVDYKlEL7WN&c=XPV7f1HBjvNpIn2593iMml7M5_cD9et8eX91IKmMaQwdxSV2gz6ATA==&ch=UXnjwgpdzCGGQDluddjjD1Q4Z-_G0RdXgRAfrqRmWZNp5gG1CwTYpQ==)
---
|

Peter,
The text messages of dozens of the GOPs brightest rising stars have been exposed and what they said is disturbing.

# $2.4T Gone! AI Bubble Has 401(k)’s Trapped in a Firestorm
---
# Billions are vanishing from the markets by the hour. The window to a safe exit is closing...
You’ve been warned for years of the underlying risk in your retirement savings account. The three week period between October 29-November 21, 2025 served as your wake up call.

Seeking Alpha, reported a $2.4 Trillion dollar loss for the S&P 500 during this time, sending panic waves across the world.

Billionaire Peter Theil’s hedge fund dumped the entire firm’s holdings of the market darling, NVIDIA. They didn’t sell some of it, they sold ALL of it.

When whales and institutions start running for the exits, it means [the "AI Bubble" isn't just leaking... it’s exploding.](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=41eab59136d8cc6c26da91fcf43f276101cee4445883e2f1b6fcbd31775eeb2b558cf64ccad522933625c649d323bdbfed5a3eef9ab8e939a12a0b07272625f4)

As the market whales sell off their holdings, stock prices plummet, even those index funds you were told were “safe and reliable”.

If your retirement wealth is held in a 401(k), IRA, TSP, or pension when the market opens next week, you are volunteering to potentially lose much or all of your life savings.

You can follow the smart money to safety, not by selling for cash, but by moving to the ultimate safe haven... Physical Gold.

Gold is trusted by the wise and wealthy, as it stands firm in value when the paper economy burns.

You can use a little-known IRS loophole to move your retirement funds into a Gold IRA, backed by physical gold that you own, as soon as today. This loophole allows for a tax-free, penalty-free transfer that gets you out of the fire and into security.

| Friends--
Join us this Wednesday in Yorktown for a discussion on affordability issues!
December 10th: A Community Discussion on Affordability Issues
Join us for a discussion on affordability issues. Life is expensive--and it's only getting more costly. Join us as we discuss the biggest affordability challenges facing Hampton Roads and the Peninsula, from energy and environmental pressures to economic, health, housing, and education costs. As we move toward a new legislative dynamic in Virginia and prepare for federal legislation as well, let's have a clear understanding of where we stand.
