Recently, I woke up today with a really cool notification... My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26614794.13730.1.02d80a95db1320bf35057d3edfafdd96) is out and has reached **#12 in Religion/ Christian Living / Personal Growth**! **I have been blown away by the response!** THANK YOU SO MUCH! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26614794.13731.1.df65eb589b90bc09fa35b085474ac874)_ It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26614794.13732.1.d244711fdde73ad4e54bb9962e249c0b)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26614794.13733.1.bb4cdee292a90abf2afbeb27a05fdf75). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26614794.13734.1.f71863dd9102af4f486da017fd2a6e44) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26614794.13735.1.d432bf3f50b66e2b62828b7f7edb70f3) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26614794.13736.1.bc885b4f0155f223a71488898e190458) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.

subject: I’m a proud product of the American Dream
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RAJA FOR ILLINOIS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120835325/587514238/2072070277?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.08_American-Dream_B1_F1_S1_C1_30CL-365DON_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZThiZTU4MC0zZGQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fH_U2r-jY9CnoK0FYyRWr4DnL4mlj4wwOEMmMnffGwc=)
These emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. If you'd prefer, you can [unsubscribe here](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/K-_-4uI0EkWyg9pVsZKBKQ2?unsubscribedata=cRIHCt1%2Bq%2BWgGx%2FSYz5vTne814n8HL5rBQ%2BSHrX3ORdqulFGDQutKByWxl6hS7IqnopjnzOuPQdcaqIg1CwpJzw25LcPtVUzh2yvK0NRf%2FpmnM6wH0j5ccfe%2FYi9X6MgC%2B5a0sz59%2B7zAz2pWNK2tKYditooC8llPNgNjmoc1n7T0L79HNgP9gyAd1UWCjHdI78JkxWQDBlPYg9a5X2QBW5z8IVwnVqVtlZYXds2YdVl%2Fsb2kbgy7Wm2LHjg7X95kcjubNtzFF7obgUE4lXX%2BqZmRaD6uRCz8CjxKCfpDvzT0CpaxPbaPNSeDrSXMg%2B7WPevADA6VL%2BEAdEUMDUaUpN7UjGthDNXYshZ5O2%2BDOVQ4JD4GxVVf6Nkq0d3%2BgRhKKVM%2Bao7Rm14%2BuaME48hPn3Yt5yVRZe9RrC93PpvYGsskep6g4XsHOfdcylRHKG4).
Hi Peter, my name is Raja Krishnamoorthi. You might know me as a Congressman and candidate for U.S. Senate. But you might not know that I’m a proud product of the _American Dream. _ [**_This is going to be a longer email about my family’s story and what that Dream means to me. I hope you’ll read until the end, and then chip in to power my grassroots campaign. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120835326/587514239/527259264?amount=25&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.08_American-Dream_B1_F1_S1_C1_30CL-365DON_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZThiZTU4MC0zZGQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fH_U2r-jY9CnoK0FYyRWr4DnL4mlj4wwOEMmMnffGwc=) Growing up, I didn’t always have it easy. My parents immigrated to the U.S. from India when I was a baby in search of that dream of a better life for their kids. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120835327/587514240/527259264?amount=25&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.08_American-Dream_B1_F1_S1_C1_30CL-365DON_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZThiZTU4MC0zZGQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fH_U2r-jY9CnoK0FYyRWr4DnL4mlj4wwOEMmMnffGwc=) My parents worked hard night and day to build that better life for my brother and me. But we fell on tough times. But essential programs like food stamps and public housing helped us get back on our feet. We all did what we could to achieve that dream. I got my first job as a teenager delivering newspapers to help out my family, and worked at McDonald’s to help put myself through college. And thanks to support from our community and excellent public schools, I went on to graduate from law school and become Illinois' _first_ Indian-American Congressman. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120835328/587514241/527259264?amount=25&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.08_American-Dream_B1_F1_S1_C1_30CL-365DON_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZThiZTU4MC0zZGQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fH_U2r-jY9CnoK0FYyRWr4DnL4mlj4wwOEMmMnffGwc=) **That’s what the American Dream is all about, Peter.** But it’s becoming increasingly impossible for working families to build that better life that we all dream of. College tuition has tripled, healthcare is more expensive than ever, and the middle class is disappearing before our eyes. And at a time when so many need champions more than ever, Donald Trump and his MAGA majority have instead made _cruelty_ towards working families their top priority. He’s made devastating cuts to essential services, gone after immigrant families, and even cut off all access to food stamps – forcing children all across the country to go hungry. **I won’t stand for that.** [**_So Peter, if like me, you believe working families need fighters who understand the struggles and dreams of ordinary people, and you’re ready to put an END to the chaos and cruelty of the Trump administration, will you pitch in today to help power my campaign to take back the Senate?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120835329/587514242/527259264?amount=25&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.08_American-Dream_B1_F1_S1_C1_30CL-365DON_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZThiZTU4MC0zZGQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fH_U2r-jY9CnoK0FYyRWr4DnL4mlj4wwOEMmMnffGwc=) | | [ DONATE $10 → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120835330/587514243/527259264?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.08_American-Dream_B1_F1_S1_C1_30CL-365DON_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZThiZTU4MC0zZGQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fH_U2r-jY9CnoK0FYyRWr4DnL4mlj4wwOEMmMnffGwc=)

clean_body: = These emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. If you'd prefer, you can . Hi Peter, my name is Raja Krishnamoorthi. You might know me as a Congressman and candidate for U.S. Senate. But you might not know that I’m a proud product of the American Dream. = Growing up, I didn’t always have it easy. My parents immigrated to the U.S. from India when I was a baby in search of that dream of a better life for their kids. = My parents worked hard night and day to build that better life for my brother and me. But we fell on tough times. But essential programs like food stamps and public housing helped us get back on our feet. We all did what we could to achieve that dream. I got my first job as a teenager delivering newspapers to help out my family, and worked at McDonald’s to help put myself through college. And thanks to support from our community and excellent public schools, I went on to graduate from law school and become Illinois' first Indian-American Congressman. = That’s what the American Dream is all about, Peter. But it’s becoming increasingly impossible for working families to build that better life that we all dream of. College tuition has tripled, healthcare is more expensive than ever, and the middle class is disappearing before our eyes. And at a time when so many need champions more than ever, Donald Trump and his MAGA majority have instead made cruelty towards working families their top priority. He’s made devastating cuts to essential services, gone after immigrant families, and even cut off all access to food stamps – forcing children all across the country to go hungry. I won’t stand for that. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for reading – and for your support, Peter. Raja Krishnamoorthi | Democrat Raja Krishnamoorthi is running for Senate in Illinois to fight back against Donald Trump and the far-right MAGA movement, protect critical programs like Social Security and Medicare, and rebuild the middle class. But Republicans will spend MILLIONS to flip this seat red. We need every single person reading this email to do their part to fight back against Trump and Flip the Senate Majority BLUE. = | | = | = These emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. subject: Del. Rasoul Announces Preparations to Form Exploratory Committee for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized By Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate P
body:
| |
---
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
December 8, 2025 **Contact:** Elaina Corfield
[info@sam4va.com](mailto:info@sam4va.com) | (540) 904-6905
---
# **Delegate Sam Rasoul Announces Preparations to Form Exploratory Committee for Congress**
---
_Delegate Rasoul: "I have decided to prepare the paperwork for an exploratory committee to __run for the United States House of Representatives in 2026 "_
---
Roanoke, VA - On Monday morning, Delegate Sam Rasoul (HD-38) announced that he has decided to prepare paperwork for a committee exploring a run for the United States House of Representatives in 2026. **" At a time when our community faces potential regional redistricting in Virginia's 5th, 6th, and 9th Congressional Districts as a consequence of Donald Trump's relentless attacks on our democracy, I have decided to prepare the paperwork for an exploratory committee to run for the United States House of Representatives in 2026, to be formed after the first of next year," **said Delegate Sam Rasoul. **" Our region deserves a fighter in Congress who will never back down in the face of injustice at home and abroad, and will tackle the affordability crisis that we all face,****"** he continued. **" As a Palestinian-American who has represented Appalachia in the Virginia General Assembly for over a decade, I am proud to have spent my career standing up to special interests who have rigged the system against Virginia's working families."** **" Virginians are looking for bold, experienced, progressive leadership that meets this moment and delivers results by guaranteeing healthcare as a human right through Medicare for All, protecting our access to clean air and water through a Green New Deal, and ending all military aid to Israel, which has waged a genocide in Gaza using our taxpayer dollars in violation of American law. I look forward to exploring the best path to serve our community as the stakes rise higher by the day."**
---
**####**
---
Delegate Sam Rasoul is the first Palestinian-American elected to the Virginia General Assembly, having represented Roanoke for the past 12 years. He was re-elected to the 38th District to serve his seventh term in office, in November 2025, and was one of a handful of candidates across the Commonwealth of Virginia to out-perform Governor-elect Abigail Spanberger's margin of victory. He currently serves as the Chairman of the Education Committee in the Virginia House of Delegates.
---
Paid for and Authorized By Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate P.O. Box 13842
Roanoke, VA 24037
United States

subject: FWD: Thank Justice Sonia Sotomayor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
You’re about to lose your signature spot...
| Trump’s Supreme Court majority is on the verge of DESTROYING the Voting Rights Act — they just agreed to hear the case!

**Sonia Sotomayor is one of our ONLY fighters for democracy left on the Court, but you still haven’t signed our letter thanking her for her work.** [**We’re giving you ONE more chance to sign by 8am tomorrow, or you will lose your signature spot. THANK JUSTICE SOTOMAYOR NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/98125?t=6&akid=22137%2E878179%2Eaubb2o) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/98125?t=7&akid=22137%2E878179%2Eaubb2o)
---
Thank you,

_The Voter Protection Project_
**–BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE–**
_Justice Sotomayor just put the MAGA SCOTUS majority & Donald Trump to SHAME:_
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/98125?t=8&akid=22137%2E878179%2Eaubb2o)
**If a member of the Supreme Court — _who is supposed to be impartial_ — is sounding the alarm, _we should ALL be listening._**

Team, we’re so grateful for Sotomayor’s BRAVE leadership — but Republicans are FURIOUS with Sotomayor, and they’re _plotting revenge._

We need to show Supreme Court Justice Sotomayor that Democrats (especially Democrats in your state) have her back!

[**As one of the FEW protectors of our democracy left on the Supreme Court, we’re sending Sotomayor a letter thanking her for her incredible work. WE HAVE ONLY 18 SPOTS LEFT:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/98125?t=9&akid=22137%2E878179%2Eaubb2o)
[**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/98125?t=10&akid=22137%2E878179%2Eaubb2o)
---
TO: Justice Sonia Sotomayor
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **Dear Justice Sotomayor,

Thank you for standing up for our democracy against Donald Trump’s authoritarian agenda and blatant disregard of the Constitution.**

Your bravery continues to blow us away, time after time.

**As Trump tries to seize more and more control from Congress and the courts, your resilience is needed now more than ever.**

I’m sick and tired of the GOP letting him off scot-free — so I’m doing everything in my power to elect Democrats and ensure we appoint more amazing Supreme Court Justices like YOU in the near future.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/98125?t=11&akid=22137%2E878179%2Eaubb2o) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/98125?t=12&akid=22137%2E878179%2Eaubb2o) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/98125?t=13&akid=22137%2E878179%2Eaubb2o)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
—The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=22137%2E878179%2Eaubb2o). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=22137%2E878179%2Eaubb2o).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=22137%2E878179%2Eaubb2o) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=22137%2E878179%2Eaubb2o). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=22137%2E878179%2Eaubb2o)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=22137%2E878179%2Eaubb2o)

_This week on By the Ballot, we are featuring another guest for his take on the 2025 elections. November 4th was an amazing night for Democrats across the Commonwealth. But not all the most promising candidates won out, and we want to hear from them, too._
_Andrew Payton was the Democratic nominee for HD-34 during the 2025 Cycle. He 's a dad of two, an education specialist, and a climate advocate. You may recall Andrew from an earlier piece I wrote at the beginning of the Fall on flipping districts around college towns like Harrisonburg, where he ran. Here he is to give us his 2 cents on the race: _
* * *
Thanks for reading By the Ballot! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnl0aGViYWxsb3QuY29tL2FjY291bnQiLCJwIjoxNzk5NDIwMjksInMiOjUxNTY1NjYsImYiOnRydWUsInUiOjkwNTAxMTkyLCJpYXQiOjE3NjUyMDI5NTQsImV4cCI6MjA4MDc3ODk1NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTAiLCJzdWIiOiJsaW5rLXJlZGlyZWN0In0.dVyrkUtPAuu6gjDfcJ2EEgSe2fOVN5TD1E-gCqQEVJ0?)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/62e4f54f-a70c-4c78-9619-fdd8962de7da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[257 votes](https://substack.com/redirect/f08f027f-65a6-4e02-a4b7-2e4eea9cd679?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Less than 1%. That's how close our campaign came here in Virginia's 34th House of Delegates district to unseating an entrenched 15-year incumbent Republican in a Trump +7 district that hasn't elected a [Democrat to this office since 1985](https://substack.com/redirect/10f2f150-de99-4cc5-9aa8-b3a8e877e761?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Virginia Democrats saw incredible wins this year, flipping all three statewide offices, electing our first female governor, and the first Muslim woman elected to any statewide office in the United States. We also gained 64 seats in the House, the most in nearly four decades, amid a [substantial shift to the left across the Commonwealth](https://substack.com/redirect/6d9863da-b865-452f-9677-3e0e53f039f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), including in rural areas like mine. We may not have won our particular seat, but we built on decades of local political organizing and turned a race that no one was talking about earlier in 2025, in a deep red area of western Virginia, into _[the closest race in the Commonwealth](https://substack.com/redirect/28f31d1d-996e-4eb1-9b53-f6ec15dec70d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_.
My district, the 34th, is in the heart of the stunningly beautiful Shenandoah Valley and includes the eastern and western parts of Rockingham County and the small city of Harrisonburg, a refugee resettlement community with a large state university. The folks here are hard-working, resilient, loyal, and proud. We have families who have been farming this Valley for generations, and a diverse immigrant community that helps define who we have become. I decided to run for this seat-just a few days before the April filing deadline, when it appeared no one else was ready to step forward-because I love this land, I love my neighbors, and I am sick of seeing corporations bleed both land and people dry to increase their profits. I saw policies coming out of Washington and Richmond exacerbating systemic harms and pain-the [inhumane kidnappings that were breaking apart families](https://substack.com/redirect/4a6b4afa-b65b-46ff-a4a0-562cdfe69a56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the [closure of rural health clinics that put lives at risk](https://substack.com/redirect/2a1cb2b3-3ceb-4efb-a9ae-e25efa884d6e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the generational wealth and health disparities, the disregard for the economic and health risks of unchecked climate change, the [cuts to programs and benefits that literally feed our children when wages are not enough](https://substack.com/redirect/2dc0dbe7-89b2-43bd-a640-645dce522726?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)-and I decided to step up for the place and the people I care about.
On the campaign trail, I knocked on thousands of doors. I heard stories about medications families could no longer afford and the multiple jobs needed to pay rent, fears of being racially profiled by ICE and of the dismal job market students would meet once they graduated, and about the tariffs and economic policies hurting our small businesses and making the kitchen table math harder and harder to do. Stories like this aren't unique to this place, of course, because the system we are a part of is deeply unfair. That's because this system is designed to favor a few rich and privileged folks who use the rest of us as disposable resources. Communities like mine deserve leaders willing to fight for us, the people powering our economy.
My opponent, now elected to his eighth term, has watched prices rise and wages stagnate, and continues to prioritize big businesses over the working folks that make up his constituency. He fashions himself a bipartisan negotiator with an open-door policy, but despite his nearly two decades in the state legislature, he has shockingly little to show for it beyond a history of [party-line votes](https://substack.com/redirect/b2e3ed70-41d5-4a71-8a95-04f1f17053a2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to defend the profit margins of his [corporate donors](https://substack.com/redirect/85c9c336-24ce-4efe-a8fa-de5eeaa298ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
While we came up short-_only 257 votes short_ -we built on decades of work from Harrisonburg and Rockingham Democrats and proved that winning here, in rural places and small cities like this, is possible, and that we can have representation that prioritizes working people. We need representation that won't abandon our immigrant neighbors, treating them as political inconveniences, and believes economic opportunity doesn't have to come at the expense of our land and water. We deserve a leader who sees everyone's value, no matter where they've come from and no matter whether they live at the end of a long gravel road or four stories up in a housing complex.
I got into this race late and with an unknown name, and with a hunch that folks would share my vision for an affordable, equitable, and sustainable community, from the campus of James Madison University, to the historically black Northeast Neighborhood, to the working-class town of Elkton, to the tree-lined drives in Massanetta Springs. It turned out I was right: we are ready for representation that _represents us_ -all of us-and I can promise you that we will continue to grow our coalition and fight for a future that is more fair to the folks who call the Shenandoah Valley their home.
We deserve better, and we're going to keep fighting for it.
* * *
_You can follow Andrew most socials and sign up for more updates at his website below:_
* [Website](https://substack.com/redirect/2c215c45-56dd-4ff4-a833-eb98ab436b4f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

clean_body: This week, Andrew Payton takes over the reins on By the Ballot. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? This week, Andrew Payton takes over the reins on By the Ballot. | | | Dec 8 | | | | | | | | | | | | This week on By the Ballot, we are featuring another guest for his take on the 2025 elections. November 4th was an amazing night for Democrats across the Commonwealth. But not all the most promising candidates won out, and we want to hear from them, too. Andrew Payton was the Democratic nominee for HD-34 during the 2025 Cycle. He 's a dad of two, an education specialist, and a climate advocate. You may recall Andrew from an earlier piece I wrote at the beginning of the Fall on flipping districts around college towns like Harrisonburg, where he ran. Here he is to give us his 2 cents on the race: Thanks for reading By the Ballot! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work. ? | | ---|---|--- . Less than 1%. That's how close our campaign came here in Virginia's 34th House of Delegates district to unseating an entrenched 15-year incumbent Republican in a Trump +7 district that hasn't elected a . Virginia Democrats saw incredible wins this year, flipping all three statewide offices, electing our first female governor, and the first Muslim woman elected to any statewide office in the United States. We also gained 64 seats in the House, the most in nearly four decades, amid a , including in rural areas like mine. We may not have won our particular seat, but we built on decades of local political organizing and turned a race that no one was talking about earlier in 2025, in a deep red area of western Virginia, into . My district, the 34th, is in the heart of the stunningly beautiful Shenandoah Valley and includes the eastern and western parts of Rockingham County and the small city of Harrisonburg, a refugee resettlement community with a large state university. The folks here are hard-working, resilient, loyal, and proud. We have families who have been farming this Valley for generations, and a diverse immigrant community that helps define who we have become. I decided to run for this seat-just a few days before the April filing deadline, when it appeared no one else was ready to step forward-because I love this land, I love my neighbors, and I am sick of seeing corporations bleed both land and people dry to increase their profits. I saw policies coming out of Washington and Richmond exacerbating systemic harms and pain-the , the , the generational wealth and health disparities, the disregard for the economic and health risks of unchecked climate change, the I decided to step up for the place and the people I care about. On the campaign trail, I knocked on thousands of doors. I heard stories about medications families could no longer afford and the multiple jobs needed to pay rent, fears of being racially profiled by ICE and of the dismal job market students would meet once they graduated, and about the tariffs and economic policies hurting our small businesses and making the kitchen table math harder and harder to do. Stories like this aren't unique to this place, of course, because the system we are a part of is deeply unfair. That's because this system is designed to favor a few rich and privileged folks who use the rest of us as disposable resources. Communities like mine deserve leaders willing to fight for us, the people powering our economy. My opponent, now elected to his eighth term, has watched prices rise and wages stagnate, and continues to prioritize big businesses over the working folks that make up his constituency. He fashions himself a bipartisan negotiator with an open-door policy, but despite his nearly two decades in the state legislature, he has shockingly little to show for it beyond a history of to defend the profit margins of his . While we came up short-only 257 votes short -we built on decades of work from Harrisonburg and Rockingham Democrats and proved that winning here, in rural places and small cities like this, is possible, and that we can have representation that prioritizes working people. We need representation that won't abandon our immigrant neighbors, treating them as political inconveniences, and believes economic opportunity doesn't have to come at the expense of our land and water. We deserve a leader who sees everyone's value, no matter where they've come from and no matter whether they live at the end of a long gravel road or four stories up in a housing complex. I got into this race late and with an unknown name, and with a hunch that folks would share my vision for an affordable, equitable, and sustainable community, from the campus of James Madison University, to the historically black Northeast Neighborhood, to the working-class town of Elkton, to the tree-lined drives in Massanetta Springs. It turned out I was right: we are ready for representation that represents us -all of us-and I can promise you that we will continue to grow our coalition and fight for a future that is more fair to the folks who call the Shenandoah Valley their home. We deserve better, and we're going to keep fighting for it. You can follow Andrew most socials and sign up for more updates at his website below: Thanks for reading By the Ballot! name: Carpetbag Awards
subject: The Nominees are in!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
Boebert is the epitome of a “political candidate who seeks election in an area where they have no local connections.”
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kHH4xCXtftb_9JTCjVxvBsFqA26671gXg6ODc4v05ku7pBg0NqWTNrBi1m_Y6CO3N95eB9jEMttNTKnE_aTXyfvRLWmflbtk-qgvuAsGGiipxsmiC-uspVlyfhf09QPWPqt3I69AFhH9YBLFnvQV_V_9rsn515jF-QFG_6O6R6eNYeXrTpgOBt1itYQT2-jfR3i8I6qIKL_dtQr3RKaMKMv_dT6IOElR3LKNvl_NXv4=&c=WvnjEXeO0-1UK5Wc1861Do-OSixITvY6SXqjhJhiieKXFlWNymwWSg==&ch=FgsRItL9nfxOOV-7clUxuhtVwtpTcjQyqZoKzbNnp-ZG45iXOjurvQ==)
---
|

Peter,
There have been some notable carpetbaggers in recent years. "Doctor" Oz in Pennsylvania (he's from New Jersey). Herschel Walker in Georgia (a Texas guy).
An honorable mention goes to Rep. Darrell Issa (R-California), who just ruled out moving to Texas to run in a red seat to save his political career.
None of those guys come close to rivaling the most infamous political carpetbagger of all time: Lauren Boebert.
Because if you look up Lauren Boebert in the dictionary, here's what you will find:
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kHH4xCXtftb_9JTCjVxvBsFqA26671gXg6ODc4v05ku7pBg0NqWTNrBi1m_Y6CO3N95eB9jEMttNTKnE_aTXyfvRLWmflbtk-qgvuAsGGiipxsmiC-uspVlyfhf09QPWPqt3I69AFhH9YBLFnvQV_V_9rsn515jF-QFG_6O6R6eNYeXrTpgOBt1itYQT2-jfR3i8I6qIKL_dtQr3RKaMKCTBM907YEgiTDfo8NpHxio=&c=WvnjEXeO0-1UK5Wc1861Do-OSixITvY6SXqjhJhiieKXFlWNymwWSg==&ch=FgsRItL9nfxOOV-7clUxuhtVwtpTcjQyqZoKzbNnp-ZG45iXOjurvQ==)
---

Boebert is the epitome of a "political candidate who seeks election in an area where they have no local connections."
Boebert was born in Florida the same week Trisha was born in Colorado. Boebert lived in a town called Rifle in western Colorado. She represented the 3rd district in Congress from 2020 to 2024. But she did such a poor job there (and embarrassed herself so hard at a theater in Denver) she was practically run out of town on a rail.
Now, Lauren has moved all the way across this state and is pretending to care about the people in Trisha's Congressional district and home town--the place where Trisha grew up and where she lives, the community that raised her.
Trisha's neighbors here in eastern Colorado are ready to follow suit and get rid of Boebert this year.
Boebert was only reelected by 546 votes, or less than 0.5% of the vote. In 2024, as her Democratic opponent, Trisha Calvarese had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts as Boebert underperformed Trump in every single county.
[Lauren Boebert is the worst carpetbagger in modern history, and she is an extremely weak candidate. That's why we are working around the clock every day to defeat her. But we can't do this alone--we need the support of Democrats everywhere who want to see Boebert gone. Will you join this team and make a contribution of $5, $25, $50 or whatever you can do right now?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kHH4xCXtftb_9JTCjVxvBsFqA26671gXg6ODc4v05ku7pBg0NqWTNrBi1m_Y6CO3mxmlpiM61t-fGNoyoL6LMNmHrvOsF_3N7yQ8IHtMuGpjY8h7RVVbSAmwHQxX1H3jqzNdgyMqMSkiAzD_mnvhYfD-UoMCVPpmh_vbJW1SowPVBVbxrFwQcIAkoUB5QGbv97r0T2Ihv4rR9iFkq3wTY8_yt1EwFrpGomJPk0G4YwVGJ9L7VNt6oQ==&c=WvnjEXeO0-1UK5Wc1861Do-OSixITvY6SXqjhJhiieKXFlWNymwWSg==&ch=FgsRItL9nfxOOV-7clUxuhtVwtpTcjQyqZoKzbNnp-ZG45iXOjurvQ==)
---

I’ll explain more in just a moment, but if you’re ready to join the fight right now, you can split a donation between my reelection campaign and Maggie Hassan here: [**_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_q42025_jon-ossoff-split_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120842886/587537402/32293070?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.08_Jon-Ossoff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjRhYWM0Yi00MGQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KhfuxftwgDw0BdKgyGulGhNaIn4jJy3TKvHBm9oDTH8=)

Here’s the deal: Republicans have been spending big in Georgia ... and much earlier than usual. They’re already running ads to attack me and lie about my record because they know flipping this Democratic Senate seat is their best chance to lock in a pro-MAGA Senate majority for the long-term.

There’s no doubt about it: I’m the most vulnerable Senator on the ballot in the midterm elections.

_But I have you._

Together, we’ve built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history, and in 2021 that organization won Georgia and the Senate majority.

Now, I need you more than ever: **I am literally MAGA’s #1 target.**

Yes, this election will be tough.

But we know how to win tough fights. We’ve done it before.

_Let’s do it again._

So if you can, please chip in any amount to my campaign and Maggie Hassan today. Here’s the link again: [**_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_q42025_jon-ossoff-split_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120842889/587537403/32293070?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.08_Jon-Ossoff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjRhYWM0Yi00MGQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KhfuxftwgDw0BdKgyGulGhNaIn4jJy3TKvHBm9oDTH8=)

Jon

subject: The Nominees are in!

body:
Boebert is the epitome of a “political candidate who seeks election in an area where they have no local connections.”
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zygQQM5FU0ETFnaOlREvTbou0MxoYvPrnwfzJpEQqjeCfW7qPtwM8skH0n-KI_-GtKsWjW6Femcwo1c9f66ARfJ4PfBBk9eazS-tL_gF6VA8bvq1a4gp099mNInMsR7_FAfQzyvoAgNY604Qjk9mL8FrIqzMPj2-8-d8OyhBJ76OSppIuDpCUTCstVogN5BlvPfNYPc2v4gMLDONc21GuR6TJ83vGZjzb84ENC9m8t8=&c=SMnyzLsNE5wtK6mfLbiKzfDd9zk60Yl1dYRkxnzpV8kmiHTD69GmOg==&ch=a6CWolPfXoQ2Z00gU9BBhKdhs0f0cksYorakk1Q3WWx7Kw6YVsxY7w==)
---
|

Peter,
There have been some notable carpetbaggers in recent years. "Doctor" Oz in Pennsylvania (he's from New Jersey). Herschel Walker in Georgia (a Texas guy).
An honorable mention goes to Rep. Darrell Issa (R-California), who just ruled out moving to Texas to run in a red seat to save his political career.
None of those guys come close to rivaling the most infamous political carpetbagger of all time: Lauren Boebert.
Because if you look up Lauren Boebert in the dictionary, here's what you will find:
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zygQQM5FU0ETFnaOlREvTbou0MxoYvPrnwfzJpEQqjeCfW7qPtwM8skH0n-KI_-GtKsWjW6Femcwo1c9f66ARfJ4PfBBk9eazS-tL_gF6VA8bvq1a4gp099mNInMsR7_FAfQzyvoAgNY604Qjk9mL8FrIqzMPj2-8-d8OyhBJ76OSppIuDpCUTCstVogN5BlvPfNYPc2v4gMLDONc21GuYrrfpFoIwFg6fpJIXDZiAM=&c=SMnyzLsNE5wtK6mfLbiKzfDd9zk60Yl1dYRkxnzpV8kmiHTD69GmOg==&ch=a6CWolPfXoQ2Z00gU9BBhKdhs0f0cksYorakk1Q3WWx7Kw6YVsxY7w==)
---

Boebert is the epitome of a "political candidate who seeks election in an area where they have no local connections."
Boebert was born in Florida the same week Trisha was born in Colorado. Boebert lived in a town called Rifle in western Colorado. She represented the 3rd district in Congress from 2020 to 2024. But she did such a poor job there (and embarrassed herself so hard at a theater in Denver) she was practically run out of town on a rail.
Now, Lauren has moved all the way across this state and is pretending to care about the people in Trisha's Congressional district and home town--the place where Trisha grew up and where she lives, the community that raised her.
Trisha's neighbors here in eastern Colorado are ready to follow suit and get rid of Boebert this year.
Boebert was only reelected by 546 votes, or less than 0.5% of the vote. In 2024, as her Democratic opponent, Trisha Calvarese had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts as Boebert underperformed Trump in every single county.
[Lauren Boebert is the worst carpetbagger in modern history, and she is an extremely weak candidate. That's why we are working around the clock every day to defeat her. But we can't do this alone--we need the support of Democrats everywhere who want to see Boebert gone. Will you join this team and make a contribution of $5, $25, $50 or whatever you can do right now?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zygQQM5FU0ETFnaOlREvTbou0MxoYvPrnwfzJpEQqjeCfW7qPtwM8skH0n-KI_-GY1uwYJJXOagN0sGIEnV4kNuOBKZaNwhJ2XUXExAqRqWDK4kDDWoOoiH5dGIkmyjgUQ20g_ZoJoUhfqhEW3Zybi2VVfoHVfVWD34I2JP9SYzZfogvBnXUenmp3iY0acTR2ZKPaQHZh9m9Kft5E4LNazQWntR7hLfgrNY_oho9xTXfwneZXdOcag==&c=SMnyzLsNE5wtK6mfLbiKzfDd9zk60Yl1dYRkxnzpV8kmiHTD69GmOg==&ch=a6CWolPfXoQ2Z00gU9BBhKdhs0f0cksYorakk1Q3WWx7Kw6YVsxY7w==)
---

clean_body: Boebert is the epitome of a “political candidate who seeks election in an area where they have no local connections.” | | | | | == | Peter, There have been some notable carpetbaggers in recent years. "Doctor" Oz in Pennsylvania (he's from New Jersey). Herschel Walker in Georgia (a Texas guy). An honorable mention goes to Rep. Darrell Issa (R-California), who just ruled out moving to Texas to run in a red seat to save his political career. None of those guys come close to rivaling the most infamous political carpetbagger of all time: Lauren Boebert. Because if you look up Lauren Boebert in the dictionary, here's what you will find: | == Boebert is the epitome of a "political candidate who seeks election in an area where they have no local connections." Boebert was born in Florida the same week Trisha was born in Colorado. Boebert lived in a town called Rifle in western Colorado. She represented the 3rd district in Congress from 2020 to 2024. But she did such a poor job there (and embarrassed herself so hard at a theater in Denver) she was practically run out of town on a rail. Now, Lauren has moved all the way across this state and is pretending to care about the people in Trisha's Congressional district and home town--the place where Trisha grew up and where she lives, the community that raised her. Trisha's neighbors here in eastern Colorado are ready to follow suit and get rid of Boebert this year. Boebert was only reelected by 546 votes, or less than 0.5% of the vote. In 2024, as her Democratic opponent, Trisha Calvarese had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts as Boebert underperformed Trump in every single county. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == | Thank you so much, Team Trisha | | | | == | Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 | Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado Trisha Calvarese for Congress | 9609 S University Blvd. PO Box 631322 | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | |

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=b213abdad5074ab99a067c75a843e2c1&_e=Xg4heHEmdAGf-FE63GAUgiYKjOznAFtcCjQF0PU9OueD1ar2XEMLsui0eAljNTfm-7gNZ7qs5XjvbBBrcRaSxujC6HpLxAR68c01Wi7wH279lbLPBhiXnFGH73ShW3prSE7z5rdKp0UOOwImcegEjorRNAFsB9nA8HySCDd44lbNhXKiBvPAznY9hLU-gScjy7pz5yFx_W5drGaBmB61X0ifZb-Qi3CGxiIICZOwFUE471za2WXoK57hPNVDW16OPeailqq0U6QCSYXOrQO81VurtdG9f8hIeQYBZhEhhxd4A78O7Hrm_Wg6ORZoMq-8WVKi5TnYI7PkSnYIahIHoDrOzgaTNEMNR-uj1wcLzVEaOYfJkceRsmTNH-EoHmpcqRexs2GFnnHmT_qJ8Zm2VX3FlghcwstuOWQr0eB2GnyGqQhC0fqhJvqIKy37Z8U6Vsx-MbVVUYiCw1T1RLoRk7qQNhT1u-UXLP47HD6prHncryh0d3Unyte62Pu9YXjTTlJbCp74cory2FTUUR8PR0u6uuhtMY9CvHTJAeXO9QXARooLqdumozjsad034n6lRXho6QiZgYvb-JyL4UIdOA%3D%3D)

name: Do the math
subject: GOP on track to rig enough seats to win 2026 midterms
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Colorado
body:
| | | | | [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010GbzLFIUJa1naTImQDsnI0-8nbZ6mgTS8mghxjWuj_Mz1_bceDxL60-5EXmLzDM3-W-eaI9RKOaYStHF6y-dKeqIpisEHl5KYeZMgdKS9_A8_7Viu4AFe1ZzAGwTvIQD3JX1BTJRVr1rBkxRi6lkgWGEkJ34pxXQBaqquzcgdFkOUVY9CE9ESbcOIblHH7m2y5hZpQ3wd1DuW3MYKhN7ms9NWzrpoDxPnQPyuD4twt8=&c=WLBJUCZB4gVgJCS7MNFjobPVYU1EtfLPh-T-BMNYhoSNQODaW9UP9g==&ch=c83zlvmgQHczTW53zfc3zKlAaRsdmDa9F8OM9x6r3PKug7UFNZcOuQ==)
---
Peter,
In 2018, the last time Trump faced a midterm election, Democrats picked up 41 Congressional seats. Based on the massive overperformances by Democrats in elections across the country this year, Democrats should be on track for an even bigger blue wave...
Unfortunately, MAGA now holds an edge in redistricting. If it continues at its current pace it won't matter how many seats we flip, we will be at an unbeatable disadvantage, and we won't reclaim the House.
That means it doesn't matter how unpopular Trump becomes, his rigging of the 2026 midterms ensures that he will no longer have to face the voters to maintain his grip on power.
---
| [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010GbzLFIUJa1naTImQDsnI0-8nbZ6mgTS8mghxjWuj_Mz1_bceDxL60-5EXmLzDM3kyYny8JfgpydOdZ23Hm_7i8q08nLC6iPFxO55d8vtrpGGpAxg0BBhtxusQPL1vqb1073JUH1PVzVNf0vyeS4KkDagyfmyTQm1cv4eGL6GSi8IJyBTpt5VIlUhrE6Vo3pKfAPRkUOl_-Lw9tI2_7nKL_GTGWdH16NT9ZTKC4b5_w=&c=WLBJUCZB4gVgJCS7MNFjobPVYU1EtfLPh-T-BMNYhoSNQODaW9UP9g==&ch=c83zlvmgQHczTW53zfc3zKlAaRsdmDa9F8OM9x6r3PKug7UFNZcOuQ==)
---
Mark our words, our system of free and fair elections is being torn apart at a pace so rapid that they will no longer exist by November 2026.
Our only shot at coming out of this with our Democracy intact is if we redistrict back. If done aggressively, not only do we survive but we beat them at their own game and ensure their plan backfires.
California and Virginia just joined the fight but if it's just them it will be too little too late. More blue states must come online with redistricts of their own in order for Democrats to stay on track to win the midterms and reclaim the House.
Colorado is now joining this fight. Fair Fight Colorado is introducing the ballot initiative that will give Coloradans the opportunity to vote on new maps that will make Colorado bluer and counteract Trump's redistricting efforts.
But by no means is success in Colorado guaranteed. It will be a steep uphill fight. Getting this on the ballot will require collecting hundreds of thousands of signatures and we expect MAGA to contest us over every single one of them. They will throw everything they have into stopping this.
We need to prepare for all out war. [If every person on our email list gave just $5 it would mean hundreds of thousands of dollars for this critical endeavor. Small dollars add up. Can you make a donation of $5, or whatever amount is meaningful to you, to get Democrats the resources we need to redistrict Colorado?](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010GbzLFIUJa1naTImQDsnI0-8nbZ6mgTS8mghxjWuj_Mz1_bceDxL60-5EXmLzDM3AdWzeQZPRYSHJFFVRBb9y_t6RG_F4pXJ7j1dmDMcABpnL_YgPsrJYfaxAY2jQnjLuEMhIWVIG9-Bs-Xvkp3sTZHTAzYSLIekbixIJZytoLvXGfIJXcns6O8fumQGdpECqytUSNevBEoNlgAUABgbq0Fiu6i-pGysYrAVCUFU-C1VPyXNJb7VHQ==&c=WLBJUCZB4gVgJCS7MNFjobPVYU1EtfLPh-T-BMNYhoSNQODaW9UP9g==&ch=c83zlvmgQHczTW53zfc3zKlAaRsdmDa9F8OM9x6r3PKug7UFNZcOuQ==)

---

clean_body: | | | | | == Peter, In 2018, the last time Trump faced a midterm election, Democrats picked up 41 Congressional seats. Based on the massive overperformances by Democrats in elections across the country this year, Democrats should be on track for an even bigger blue wave... Unfortunately, MAGA now holds an edge in redistricting. If it continues at its current pace it won't matter how many seats we flip, we will be at an unbeatable disadvantage, and we won't reclaim the House. That means it doesn't matter how unpopular Trump becomes, his rigging of the 2026 midterms ensures that he will no longer have to face the voters to maintain his grip on power. | == Mark our words, our system of free and fair elections is being torn apart at a pace so rapid that they will no longer exist by November 2026. Our only shot at coming out of this with our Democracy intact is if we redistrict back. If done aggressively, not only do we survive but we beat them at their own game and ensure their plan backfires. California and Virginia just joined the fight but if it's just them it will be too little too late. More blue states must come online with redistricts of their own in order for Democrats to stay on track to win the midterms and reclaim the House. Colorado is now joining this fight. Fair Fight Colorado is introducing the ballot initiative that will give Coloradans the opportunity to vote on new maps that will make Colorado bluer and counteract Trump's redistricting efforts. But by no means is success in Colorado guaranteed. It will be a steep uphill fight. Getting this on the ballot will require collecting hundreds of thousands of signatures and we expect MAGA to contest us over every single one of them. They will throw everything they have into stopping this. We need to prepare for all out war. == If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Joining this fight means you are on the frontlines of this historic fight to save our democracy. # **Ilhan Omar compares Stephen Miller 's immigration rhetoric to Nazi language**
Minnesota Rep. Ilhan Omar drew criticism Sunday after comparing White House advisor **[Stephen Miller's immigration comments to "the way the Nazis described Jewish](https://substack.com/redirect/cba133db-a531-43ac-9cb6-22e39f105f63?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** people in Germany" on CBS's Face the Nation, despite Miller's own Jewish ancestry, in response to his X post stating "You are not just importing individuals. You are importing societies" and claiming migrants "recreate the conditions, and terrors, of their broken homelands."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/32c63678-412d-4e66-a82e-7ac53dfda9a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Trump calls Omar and Somali immigrants "garbage" amid fraud scandal:** The exchange comes as the Trump administration focuses on Minnesota, where authorities allege a billion-dollar fraud scheme involving many from the Somali American community, with Trump calling Omar--who was born in Somalia--"garbage" during a cabinet meeting last week, saying "when they come from hell, and they complain and do nothing but bitch, we don't want them in our country."
* **ICE increases enforcement in Minnesota:** ICE has recently ramped up enforcement activity in Minnesota, with the agency carrying out Operation Metro Surge earlier this month that resulted in a dozen arrests, including several Somalis convicted of fraud, as the Trump administration continues to scrutinize the state's Somali community.

**In 1933, Executive Order 6102 forced everyday Americans to hand over their gold at a fixed rate.**
Everyday citizens lost a sizable amount of their hard earned wealth at the stroke of FDR's pen.
**Now, 92 years later,[President Trump has focused his energy on making things right.](https://substack.com/redirect/25cded68-2535-4a56-9c43-b2b68178d012?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
His next move has the power to trigger a financial reset that could shift trillions of dollars into the hands of the people.
**A provision buried in the U.S. Code Title 31, Section 5117 allows the U.S. Treasury to revalue America 's gold reserves from an outdated $42 per ounce to today's market price.**
That's a 72x increase!
**If activated, it could**
* **Reinforce America 's financial dominance**
* Reignite trust in value-backed money, making the dollar valuable again
* **Spark a modern day gold rush once the public understand their choices**

And the best part...

# **Mamdani releases video advising New Yorkers on how to "stand up to" ICE agents**
### _" They cannot enter private homes!" _
NYC mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani **[released a video Sunday](https://substack.com/redirect/77a77a56-938a-481d-b2bc-ec4557eeeceb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** educating New Yorkers on their rights during ICE encounters, explaining that agents "cannot enter into private spaces like your home, school or private area of your workplace without a judicial warrant signed by a judge," and advising that "ICE is legally allowed to lie to you, but you have the right to remain silent."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/5f145114-e812-4e3d-a6a6-da0fda817685?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Mayor-elect pledges to protect NYC 's 3 million immigrants:** Mamdani opened the video by recalling an ICE raid last weekend in Manhattan, stating "As mayor, I'll protect the rights of every single New Yorker, and that includes the more than 3 million immigrants who call this city their home," while closing by emphasizing New Yorkers' constitutional right to protest and vowing "I will fight each and every day to protect, support and celebrate our immigrant brothers and sisters."
* **Video follows Trump meeting but reaffirms sanctuary city status:** The guidance comes more than two weeks after Mamdani met with President Trump and appeared to find common ground on affordability issues, though during a Bronx church speech he reaffirmed New York's sanctuary city policies, telling Trump that "city government can be in touch with the federal government on around 170 serious crimes" but expressing concern about immigrants "being arrested, detained, and deported for the crime of making a regular court appearance."

* * *
# **Marjorie Taylor Greene and Stahl clash over "accusatory" questioning**
Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene, R-Ga., sparred with "60 Minutes" host Lesley Stahl during her first sit-down interview since announcing her resignation from Congress, pushing back when Stahl questioned her about contributing to toxic politics, with Greene repeatedly insisting "You're accusatory" and claiming Stahl contributes to toxicity "in the way you question."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/29b70b60-e38f-4865-bb5f-274854ea2435?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Greene apologizes for role in toxic politics after Kirk assassination:** During the segment, the two discussed Greene's November apology where she told CNN "I would like to say humbly, I'm sorry for taking part in the toxic politics," adding that Charlie Kirk's assassination made her reflect on being "committed to put down the knives in politics," though she insisted to Stahl that "we don't have to accuse one another."
* **History of contentious interviews between the two:** Greene previously sat down with Stahl in April 2023 for a fiery exchange over the congresswoman's claim that Democrats are the "party of pedophiles," when she argued that "Democrats support children being sexualized and having transgender surgeries" and "sexualizing children is what pedophiles do," prompting Stahl to exclaim "They are not pedophiles. Why would you say that?"

* * *
# **Trump makes history as first President to host Kennedy Center Honors**
President Trump served as emcee for Sunday's **[48th Kennedy Center Honors](https://substack.com/redirect/48e6b06d-9fad-43df-b342-a78008df64ed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/48e6b06d-9fad-43df-b342-a78008df64ed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)ceremony, becoming the first sitting commander-in-chief to host the prestigious Washington cultural event honoring American creatives.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d46c9788-0176-4812-ade1-7f15677c6940?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Confident presidential debut:** The 79-year-old leader joked about renaming the venue "The Trump-Kennedy Center" before correcting himself with mock embarrassment, predicted the ceremony would achieve record ratings based on his hosting experience with "The Apprentice."
* **Board overhaul:** Trump named himself as Kennedy Center board chair and removed all Biden appointees after personally inspecting the facility in March, criticizing it for "bad management" and controversial decisions like allowing drag performances, while securing $250 million from Congress for renovations including redesigning the awards from rainbow-patterned sashes to sleeker gold and rainbow medals.
* **Star-studded honorees:** The president celebrated Sylvester Stallone for his iconic "Rocky" and "Rambo" roles, disco legend Gloria Gaynor, rock band Kiss, British actor Michael Crawford, and country star George Strait, with Trump serving as Stallone's ambassador to Hollywood and presenting awards in the Oval Office the previous day.

The ceremony airing December 23 on CBS and Paramount+.
* * *
# **Senator Ernst demands 24 agencies halt funding for Biden program amid fraud claims**
Iowa Republican Senator Joni Ernst is pressing **[two dozen federal agencies](https://substack.com/redirect/56fabf6a-5d7f-4e96-b568-2fecf3c10eb6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to suspend funding for a Small Business Administration initiative she alleges became riddled with corruption after the Biden administration.
* **Program expansion accused of enabling fraud:** Ernst criticized Biden for tripling the 8(a) program's contracting goals from 5% to 15% of federal awards, claiming he "opened the floodgates to fraud" in an initiative designed to assist socially and economically disadvantaged businesses, with the senator citing "alarming, potentially fraudulent" awards distributed across government totaling over $40 billion in fiscal year 2024 alone
* **Criminal cases and undercover exposures:** The push follows a June Justice Department bust of four individuals running a decade-long bribery scheme involving 14 contracts worth over $550 million that included cash payments, NBA tickets, and country club wedding perks, plus an October undercover investigation allegedly catching an 8(a) firm admitting to using minority-owned status fraudulently while outsourcing 80% of work on $100 million-plus no-bid government deals.
* **Coordinated audit response:** SBA Chief Kelly Loeffler ordered comprehensive reviews of all contracting officers with grant authority over the past 15 years and sent letters to all 4,300 8(a) contractors demanding financial records, while Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent launched his own audit of approximately $9 billion in preference-based contracts.

Ernst's letters to agency heads from Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy to DHS Secretary Kristi Noem demand they pause contracting, audit current agreements, review awards since 2020, and report findings to the Senate Small Business Committee by December 22.
* * *

# $2.4T Gone! AI Bubble Has 401(k)’s Trapped in a Firestorm
---
# Billions are vanishing from the markets by the hour. The window to a safe exit is closing...
You’ve been warned for years of the underlying risk in your retirement savings account. The three week period between October 29-November 21, 2025 served as your wake up call.

Seeking Alpha, reported a $2.4 Trillion dollar loss for the S&P 500 during this time, sending panic waves across the world.

Billionaire Peter Theil’s hedge fund dumped the entire firm’s holdings of the market darling, NVIDIA. They didn’t sell some of it, they sold ALL of it.

When whales and institutions start running for the exits, it means [the "AI Bubble" isn't just leaking... it’s exploding.](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=0dd8cd790e023864b8c07bddc15c0dd661bafde86c6ff2066de2edd7f8127b1eb72ae1d70af83534be5a27616205c0b4ad2fd3178c9272405459fd1b8d307b64)

As the market whales sell off their holdings, stock prices plummet, even those index funds you were told were “safe and reliable”.

If your retirement wealth is held in a 401(k), IRA, TSP, or pension when the market opens next week, you are volunteering to potentially lose much or all of your life savings.

You can follow the smart money to safety, not by selling for cash, but by moving to the ultimate safe haven... Physical Gold.

Gold is trusted by the wise and wealthy, as it stands firm in value when the paper economy burns.

You can use a little-known IRS loophole to move your retirement funds into a Gold IRA, backed by physical gold that you own, as soon as today. This loophole allows for a tax-free, penalty-free transfer that gets you out of the fire and into security.

name: Bushra Amiwala
subject: ICE hit me with their car and tear gassed me
body:
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HAf-7YkbCHcPgdrttXBi2kSF5pQ8T1ZIqKq9-JYn_YVnHF9-JX9pd-U9EkfUeBW5jzw6U7zoEMkvrOmRoTOZsz4NuiJTbDhfKjxunr-v31_zoteSJQAU5h542lfFINKeY2QzGe3FQnKRZAGmDq7LEoHVM8DKS8TknrFc0JRsy1pMxdF9i7jtDXCeT6g4wFb4qb6jO4LPK42jSJoEANdLmHxA-f_-jnp9okz15moZUnM=&c=cFsmg766xoIG8p3m8CLGrTpW51QwkiBG3Urnt0rkcnZ23rGWSFM0uw==&ch=v1e-j0nWst-_Qx046_vlXHl7ZX-RsSO_pHpJFxv6cLDmSYWcmWxXHQ==)
---
|
Peter,
People often ask me what kind of Representative I will be in Congress.
I didn't answer that question with a press release or Tik-Tok video. I answered it by standing shoulder-to-shoulder with my neighbors outside the Broadview ICE facility.
I went there because I believe a true leader doesn't hide behind a desk when their community is under attack. If my constituents are on the front lines, that is exactly where I belong.
We showed up to protest peacefully. ICE responded with brutality, ramming protestors with vehicles and firing tear gas into the crowd.
ICE hit me with a car and tear gas.
---
| [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HAf-7YkbCHcPgdrttXBi2kSF5pQ8T1ZIqKq9-JYn_YVnHF9-JX9pd-U9EkfUeBW5jzw6U7zoEMkvrOmRoTOZsz4NuiJTbDhfKjxunr-v31_zoteSJQAU5h542lfFINKeY2QzGe3FQnKRZAGmDq7LEoHVM8DKS8TknrFc0JRsy1pMxdF9i7jtDXCeT6g4wFb4qb6jO4LPK42jSJoEANdLmLQ2KED5qCzIQ_kH2jdTjQ0=&c=cFsmg766xoIG8p3m8CLGrTpW51QwkiBG3Urnt0rkcnZ23rGWSFM0uw==&ch=v1e-j0nWst-_Qx046_vlXHl7ZX-RsSO_pHpJFxv6cLDmSYWcmWxXHQ==)
---
Scenes from the chaos. That's me on the bottom left and right getting hit by the car and sprayed with tear gas.
---
We are facing a fascist agenda that requires more than just talking points, strongly-worded letters, or snarky social media posts to defeat. We need leaders who are willing to put their bodies on the line to protect their people. And I have been leading in this fight before I was even a candidate -- canvassing businesses and neighborhoods to make sure my community knows their rights, standing side by side with families under attack, and showing up in the streets.
That is the fearlessness I will bring to Congress. I will take this fight from the streets of Chicago directly to the halls of Congress, and I will not back down when the smoke clears.
Help me take this fight to them. [Please chip in $50, $25, or whatever you is meaningful to you today to help send a fighter to Congress who won't back down to MAGA's fascism.](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HAf-7YkbCHcPgdrttXBi2kSF5pQ8T1ZIqKq9-JYn_YVnHF9-JX9pd-U9EkfUeBW5wfPwGljtO9JLa8GODs65GSNCW-0H1RHTzkl72o934d90PSb4WDeUL7tsuqE7j2M2aqrDjB7T0hLl_jzfPEUfK7Qeijf1FoPbb3Wo3jDt5JchwlTzref0KnDMb2GQZOAG_F-uArCr38earYLxkB5WNM_ABhGng82lAFXYbCrm9H2JHYM2xcdutg==&c=cFsmg766xoIG8p3m8CLGrTpW51QwkiBG3Urnt0rkcnZ23rGWSFM0uw==&ch=v1e-j0nWst-_Qx046_vlXHl7ZX-RsSO_pHpJFxv6cLDmSYWcmWxXHQ==)

clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, People often ask me what kind of Representative I will be in Congress. I didn't answer that question with a press release or Tik-Tok video. I answered it by standing shoulder-to-shoulder with my neighbors outside the Broadview ICE facility. I went there because I believe a true leader doesn't hide behind a desk when their community is under attack. If my constituents are on the front lines, that is exactly where I belong. We showed up to protest peacefully. ICE responded with brutality, ramming protestors with vehicles and firing tear gas into the crowd. ICE hit me with a car and tear gas. | == Scenes from the chaos. That's me on the bottom left and right getting hit by the car and sprayed with tear gas. We are facing a fascist agenda that requires more than just talking points, strongly-worded letters, or snarky social media posts to defeat. We need leaders who are willing to put their bodies on the line to protect their people. And I have been leading in this fight before I was even a candidate -- canvassing businesses and neighborhoods to make sure my community knows their rights, standing side by side with families under attack, and showing up in the streets. That is the fearlessness I will bring to Congress. I will take this fight from the streets of Chicago directly to the halls of Congress, and I will not back down when the smoke clears. Help me take this fight to them. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | In solidarity, | == Bushra Amiwala Democrat for IL-9 | | == | | | | == | Mail checks to: Bushra for Congress PO Box 911 Skokie, IL 60076 | | == | | | | Bushra for Congress | PO Box 911 | Skokie, IL 60076 US | |

name: Do the math
subject: GOP on track to rig enough seats to win 2026 midterms
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Colorado
body:
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vaR-oea6ReM-hd7Km8uiOvfUNuaJ6VvkeperR-tK7pF-g0Bw-vWUn5IJEADAD3ASDnBjda1stMw8IDSmuDSTX0fv3vTMnZcpm5eX_vtQCXt4ctl6quTkD5YkgEsu9YIgtk4YDHVwaF9JS78c9lAxQ7QBL06-FTy8p_o5hLNisLXDJhZYySMPmSvWtkbd5YVRR7xBH4tDNAU8IDr_FQMefjay_LkH9MMpPR3MLxIBLiw=&c=ZHv4ZYVQj_6lPHrpXlsvq4sHtf3izZlV6HdeddTengBWHQf05nIiWw==&ch=qRro2QkEbooIYl9fCvIi2eum-YYLAmxqSwnLlEAtAcSyhSvPcIAkcQ==)
---
| Peter,
In 2018, the last time Trump faced a midterm election, Democrats picked up 41 Congressional seats. Based on the massive overperformances by Democrats in elections across the country this year, Democrats should be on track for an even bigger blue wave...
Unfortunately, MAGA now holds an edge in redistricting. If it continues at its current pace it won't matter how many seats we flip, we will be at an unbeatable disadvantage, and we won't reclaim the House.
That means it doesn't matter how unpopular Trump becomes, his rigging of the 2026 midterms ensures that he will no longer have to face the voters to maintain his grip on power.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vaR-oea6ReM-hd7Km8uiOvfUNuaJ6VvkeperR-tK7pF-g0Bw-vWUn5IJEADAD3ASDnBjda1stMw8IDSmuDSTX0fv3vTMnZcpm5eX_vtQCXt4ctl6quTkD5YkgEsu9YIgtk4YDHVwaF9JS78c9lAxQ7QBL06-FTy8p_o5hLNisLXDJhZYySMPmSvWtkbd5YVRR7xBH4tDNAU8IDr_FQMefrWe2ydsKnl0dzfX1Chcw3s=&c=ZHv4ZYVQj_6lPHrpXlsvq4sHtf3izZlV6HdeddTengBWHQf05nIiWw==&ch=qRro2QkEbooIYl9fCvIi2eum-YYLAmxqSwnLlEAtAcSyhSvPcIAkcQ==)
---

Mark our words, our system of free and fair elections is being torn apart at a pace so rapid that they will no longer exist by November 2026.
Our only shot at coming out of this with our Democracy intact is if we redistrict back. If done aggressively, not only do we survive but we beat them at their own game and ensure their plan backfires.
California and Virginia just joined the fight but if it's just them it will be too little too late. More blue states must come online with redistricts of their own in order for Democrats to stay on track to win the midterms and reclaim the House.
Colorado is now joining this fight. Fair Fight Colorado is introducing the ballot initiative that will give Coloradans the opportunity to vote on new maps that will make Colorado bluer and counteract Trump's redistricting efforts.
But by no means is success in Colorado guaranteed. It will be a steep uphill fight. Getting this on the ballot will require collecting hundreds of thousands of signatures and we expect MAGA to contest us over every single one of them. They will throw everything they have into stopping this.
We need to prepare for all out war. [If every person on our email list gave just $5 it would mean hundreds of thousands of dollars for this critical endeavor. Small dollars add up. Can you make a donation of $5, or whatever amount is meaningful to you, to get Democrats the resources we need to redistrict Colorado? ](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vaR-oea6ReM-hd7Km8uiOvfUNuaJ6VvkeperR-tK7pF-g0Bw-vWUn5IJEADAD3ASUx30kt_K8YCaj5Z3_X-XSvqufS8ERFNVrMNXq-f7kzyYe34vvV3qVflRNyLRat7GG8XIidI1YGGc5rNVX01meJcUpv8dx-iPFQnZNeFE8sJnvNw5lkVxHm2xUEwROhrdfOyYcIWMVZtkRzdOJOfnN0aQKet_P2b77T24DFNPDk9LqLtrj9OYjg==&c=ZHv4ZYVQj_6lPHrpXlsvq4sHtf3izZlV6HdeddTengBWHQf05nIiWw==&ch=qRro2QkEbooIYl9fCvIi2eum-YYLAmxqSwnLlEAtAcSyhSvPcIAkcQ==)

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.
