clean_body: 23 days out. Team, We’re 23 days out from our final public deadline of the year. After that, Donald Trump, GOP super PACS and national Republicans will see what we’ve raised in 2025. They will look at our numbers and see how competitive we can be in the 2026 midterm elections. I’ll be honest, I’m getting worried. Democratic candidates are up against the GOP’s massive $600 million war chest. And with Republicans already raking in over $200 million this year , Democrats have a lot of catching up to do. = | = = =** | | = Thank you for your support so far this year. We have a long way to go ahead of 2026, and we need strong Democrats like you to step up to keep up the fight against the MAGA machine. There’s too much at stake for us to back down. We’ve seen what the GOP does when they are in power: They stripped millions of Americans of their health care. Cut access to SNAP benefits for struggling families. Gave tax breaks to billionaires while Americans struggle to put food on the table. Threatened to slash Social Security benefits for senior citizens. Enough is enough. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = More soon, Kirsten Gillibrand DSCC Chair A message from DSCC Chair Kirsten Gillibrand: =

subject: Time is running out ⏲️
body:
Had your eye on something? 👀
| [ ](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2345?t=6&akid=131%2E124072%2E7dFGrT)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=1&akid=131%2E124072%2E7dFGrT)** | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=131%2E124072%2E7dFGrT)

Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor.

body:
Should Congress increase Social Security?
| **This is an automated message for you.** You did not respond to our poll about Democrats’ proposal to INCREASE Social Security by $200 a month.

Momentum is building to pass this bill – if we gather enough support, we can push Congress to SAVE and EXPAND Social Security!

_BUT IF we lack sufficient data,_ Trump will think Americans DON’T CARE about Social Security.

**So please, respond by your one-time extended MIDNIGHT deadline:**
[**Should Congress increase Social Security benefits? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social-poll?source=VPP_20251208_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS_RS&t=6&akid=22142%2E878179%2EQZmrA2) | [YES, ABSOLUTELY! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social-poll?source=VPP_20251208_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=22142%2E878179%2EQZmrA2)
---
[NO, THEY SHOULD NOT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social-poll?source=VPP_20251208_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=22142%2E878179%2EQZmrA2)
[UNSURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social-poll?source=VPP_20251208_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS_RS&t=9&akid=22142%2E878179%2EQZmrA2)
Thank you,
_The Voter Protection Project_
**—BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE—**
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social-poll?source=VPP_20251208_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=22142%2E878179%2EQZmrA2)
**FIRST** Trump pledged there **“would be cuts”** to Social Security, endangering benefits Americans’ have worked their whole lives for!

**THEN** Rand Paul claimed Republicans **“didn’t have the money”** for Social Security, threatening to RAISE the retirement age to 70!

**_BUT NOW_** Democrats aren’t going down without a fight, they just introduced **a HUGE monthly increase** to Social Security! This changes everything!

[**But we’re lacking opinion data in your state. We need to hear from 346 more Democrats:
Should Congress increase Social Security payments?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social-poll?source=VPP_20251208_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=22142%2E878179%2EQZmrA2)
[YES, ABSOLUTELY! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social-poll?source=VPP_20251208_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS_RS&t=12&akid=22142%2E878179%2EQZmrA2)

If we don’t hear from you by MIDNIGHT, your response may not be counted.

(www.protectvoting.org)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

In plain terms, that’s code for: “This is going to get really bad for us — [...]

https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/12/new-data-exposes-illinois-gop-crisis-millions-of-republicans-arent-voting-party-leaders-to-blame.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ae839494c3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Voters cast their ballots in Springfield on Tuesday, November 5, 2024. (Capitol News Illinois photo by Andrew Campbell)
By Illinois Review

New voter-participation data circulating among Illinois conservatives is highlighting what many now argue is the real and long-running crisis inside the Illinois Republican Party: collapsing enthusiasm, shrinking turnout, and a leadership class that has failed the base for more than two decades.

Illinois has 12.5 million residents, with roughly 10 million old enough to vote. About 8 million are registered. Yet only 6 million typically vote in a presidential cycle, and just 4 million show up for midterms.

According to attorney Tom DeVore, who has studied the numbers closely, the picture for Republicans is even worse.

name: Zack Golden, Campaign Manager
subject: Derek, I want you to read this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120870307/587626011/186742633?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Strategymemo_251208_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDZjMzEwOC02YWQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cW8CZBEYlVmk6DeCfLAs3m70oEZ92xU-Xcb2zH71vqs=) Hey there, Derek –

I’m Zack, Campaign Manager for Mark Warner’s reelection campaign.

I wanted to share a quick memo with Warner’s top supporters like you, Derek. **You deserve to understand where your donation is going – and how we’re going to win this race. Please don’t forward this message. It’s only written for supporters like you.**

[_**And if you haven’t had a chance to donate towards our last fundraising deadline of the year, please chip in ASAP to help us reach our goals and win big next year! The earlier your donation comes in, the sooner – and more strategically – we can put it to use reaching voters.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120870308/587626012/186742633?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Strategymemo_251208_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDZjMzEwOC02YWQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cW8CZBEYlVmk6DeCfLAs3m70oEZ92xU-Xcb2zH71vqs=) **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120870309/587626013/186742633?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Strategymemo_251208_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDZjMzEwOC02YWQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cW8CZBEYlVmk6DeCfLAs3m70oEZ92xU-Xcb2zH71vqs=)** Thx!

\- Zack **Campaign Strategy Memo**
**FOR: Derek Willis**
Senator Warner has made his objective clear: this campaign isn’t just about him or even this Senate seat. We’ve got to build momentum in every corner of the Commonwealth, elect strong Democrats across Virginia, and flip as many Republican-held seats as possible.

When Warner was first elected to the Senate in 2008, VA Democrats also flipped 3 House seats. In 2020 – his last election – Democrats held all 3 frontline seats for Democrats, in a year that was particularly difficult for House Democrats.

**This year – we could flip as many as four seats for Democrats.**
Our message:
* **Affordability:** Lowering prices on housing, health care, groceries, and utilities.
* **AI:** Preparing Virginia’s economy for both the job disruption and opportunities this new technology will bring.
* **Accountability:** Standing up to Trump when his actions make Virginians less safe, raise costs, or infringe on our rights.

Reaching Voters:
**Organizing everywhere.** And I’m not just talking about all regions of Virginia (although that’s important too).

In a fractured media environment where many voters get their news from social media instead of traditional news outlets, **building a strong digital infrastructure where our message meets voters where they are is fundamental to our strategy.**
What’s Next:
After launching Warner’s reelection campaign on Tuesday – we’re in full election mode at Warner HQ. That means I am watching our budget like a hawk.

The earlier donations come in, the sooner we’re able to put them to use.

You can make your first donation at this link:

clean_body: | | | = Hey there, Derek – I’m Zack, Campaign Manager for Mark Warner’s reelection campaign. I wanted to share a quick memo with Warner’s top supporters like you, Derek. You deserve to understand where your donation is going – and how we’re going to win this race. Please don’t forward this message. It’s only written for supporters like you. = = Thx! \- Zack Campaign Strategy Memo FOR: Derek Willis Senator Warner has made his objective clear: this campaign isn’t just about him or even this Senate seat. We’ve got to build momentum in every corner of the Commonwealth, elect strong Democrats across Virginia, and flip as many Republican-held seats as possible. When Warner was first elected to the Senate in 2008, VA Democrats also flipped 3 House seats. In 2020 – his last election – Democrats held all 3 frontline seats for Democrats, in a year that was particularly difficult for House Democrats. This year – we could flip as many as four seats for Democrats. Our message: Affordability: Lowering prices on housing, health care, groceries, and utilities. AI: Preparing Virginia’s economy for both the job disruption and opportunities this new technology will bring. Accountability: Standing up to Trump when his actions make Virginians less safe, raise costs, or infringe on our rights. Reaching Voters: Organizing everywhere. And I’m not just talking about all regions of Virginia (although that’s important too). In a fractured media environment where many voters get their news from social media instead of traditional news outlets, building a strong digital infrastructure where our message meets voters where they are is fundamental to our strategy. What’s Next: After launching Warner’s reelection campaign on Tuesday – we’re in full election mode at Warner HQ. That means I am watching our budget like a hawk. The earlier donations come in, the sooner we’re able to put them to use. name: Mike Bouchard
subject: What I saw at the border will shock you.
body:
I never expected these orders — and neither will you. | | | [](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=994008ec43284037a1c033c8f09f0a81&_e=UDl2J1JtT7xFwgidk6v3e3iUqalzvxkqm34DoPfSi2T-_SAeh_WsaTAay9Q9w6ZganzLsYJnft4_Bj4NA-i9v1CxA9VHXC47EcY3IEodLrcCmD-CuFp9pvwSIV-_QkcybAuSPy0MrqhH6qC07lNcb_Fj_1Cl2nj409Af7B6M3TO9sVjmpg9TH9U1BAxDBaXSJk3K4ZDvCieXSS3S-kmQVh0d5fTXDWZ2UZefXQ8Rzjlyu3ClrrYXpuuMxGuu_i-8csKKNS4hPxak5KwVVbvXxP_TCv0iakaH30F5qq1LmRxFDcpNNymhtvCCHdkg-1QQZSOFcfsZ1lW_cb3LTIIjFs5xhhN3BseXMojkPLgegm4tDX_y2cvM83KuyBOp5ze1LhqZ3j6XdiF_ztRtR24R8hFNlbqc87ceBbatDVMuOegQlPH4276zT9J5hzORysXGwo1fu6nsdS3ORy3clX56me5F2u7lilv0URsGOI2id_Jj66bxGpQ65h72vT-9ncjfr4pZf3aSBgXIxCSf6r6EFS1dOxDIieaksqVAKnzkQM6FMcP2oE-s3Y0AKroeVpcItpUjyCq3Xr-JzD65OWX1ISjnPvL_SjmmadsdzuE07szwg2ARDQ3jZSui0gvHwEMP6c2tD0WgAGyTPUNZVi-rlwM9ftiVjy31eVJkfeCTp49IJC_7q97r_nrxCMf_lTakiftOQ7LuCLmDSmAEBodGJPeechsS9ah4IhV8fJME-wR7kjGMQ0KhS15gwy6ro905z2cXSbt5SWY3zI3qEQ88sr5o_U5hSnDD6LVGJcc4udoGCbABWtks-iVeHG3DhdqqWCM2QczuYKgDwVkFQihqmg%3D%3D)
---
Under President Trump, I was deployed to our southern border. Our mission was simple: **stop the cartels.**
We worked with Border Patrol and helped secure the line that separates law and order from chaos. Every day, I watched brave men and women risk their lives to keep drugs, violence, and human trafficking out of our country.
---
**We had a purpose.**
**We had a mission.**
**We were winning.**
---
Then Joe Biden took office and overnight, everything changed.
Just like that, our border was wide open. This was a manufactured crisis.
_Instead of preparing to defend our country against enemy attacks, we were ordered to attend “empathy training” led by a transgender Navy SEAL - while the world fell apart._
_**[](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=994008ec43284037a1c033c8f09f0a81&_e=UDl2J1JtT7xFwgidk6v3e3iUqalzvxkqm34DoPfSi2T-_SAeh_WsaTAay9Q9w6ZganzLsYJnft4_Bj4NA-i9vwPD03-GgMoSpM9uiyaOpgyjzZBzRRYuHNqoGlwhLQojgnBIHRp-tRpfY-VlFlYYgiZDU9Ptu25lNr-3vlQ6OapAV7EPLwx3V59W-xgYu-4z6he39vQ7HGib4QnbQFaQqabXaLfRjBWgE4p_N8wGqFE0rSOMXPhHcS5cPKlIDWPDsXb3MaCs15eCOTCUgZFFq1C99ycLMSUTR7UqSimKzFfONcrLQip5QsUAQZhBVLjiyAsYNIikuSUk69wCvaqrtoJ1pAjETrAYPbYsXdn-ZzwHIlfgSQQRNsP3iqZO4iulhH5j1dUIhaiduLSwC_yZB_emauMBKxlLB1l_DMhBLNr5TAO7aN5R0qCxCIOAa5skZ9-H7o5f332GI26xdWdSXp5gkFa8Vh-hcvCQSxY0LVN89aHXsPuRcyPzqCSG54risp4qWrNq2QuSTFZwc8BanPNunxq1nCFnJv6TQoIHhWvb-1H-u4hk9Jqdk7g9Ye-VT2_ayVr2kYvxWqYkpcGx-FxKZtpROn9lr7t33c5sgbrE4_1sSh5mQcZH6vDU5dTLbKbEzlC693UFR0MZZJvGpwkCFj__AZ725uADdxGWPFQTZ18O-Qzvlc33N9XRmjhG0oMw27A5jizkNPJ_OLRJTm4SiaX3t7GUQxNT9-QzHHGL0ti9x37JtbRmBM7xzcA755pnKISbPeG9nsw3QfyAeQ%3D%3D)[That’s not leadership. That’s weakness driven by wokeness.](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=994008ec43284037a1c033c8f09f0a81&_e=UDl2J1JtT7xFwgidk6v3e3iUqalzvxkqm34DoPfSi2T-_SAeh_WsaTAay9Q9w6ZganzLsYJnft4_Bj4NA-i9v1CxA9VHXC47EcY3IEodLrcCmD-CuFp9pvwSIV-_QkcybAuSPy0MrqhH6qC07lNcb_Fj_1Cl2nj409Af7B6M3TO9sVjmpg9TH9U1BAxDBaXSJk3K4ZDvCieXSS3S-kmQVh0d5fTXDWZ2UZefXQ8Rzjlyu3ClrrYXpuuMxGuu_i-8csKKNS4hPxak5KwVVbvXxP_TCv0iakaH30F5qq1LmRxFDcpNNymhtvCCHdkg-1QQZSOFcfsZ1lW_cb3LTIIjFs5xhhN3BseXMojkPLgegm64KyCdzckI5co29K74SGPpE8-_94Gjsk5LhVHjjZhTQ7mUgMNkVy6Z0btRBLVGlOyHFKILlKqoK1XwvalmC8ZbQA-iX_Ek3IMRfQxqhNRaiL751YCwNq71Y-wiRnup-E4sPR1m5g8C9x3xXd4uAS7_Zp8aKawx3xYAOJMfBIuD8fNBLYsbAo0zlJ1ZrDuE3kuHrW4YRsp_6Hl3Lrbwtz7DqCpie-8zi5KgLkwdhes8lWNip0xTjG-w7nHiVvEVtEviodBdbZf-AICqRUov3YxkkkVwimK6JrW8pOy4WH7FyR-0gnvORWoCr3vcepTvWfzZOGGAULa6z01W2D_P9KeDQ1BdAEZrJDUBB1566i5L6hlQVRyv8LdUle7zm2C_eU8O9DekZeueOinZWFPwh865k2bzslYvboxf3l3W-EiebYBnqVA8ZN1EoZW34Z96kfgwNp4WXx7NwHwTwAmkWidtOMi7hWYpcTJK_U_jY2BUdQ%3D%3D)**_
---
The contrast couldn’t be more clear: under President Trump, we defend America. Under Joe Biden, we were forced to apologize for her.
I didn’t put on the uniform of the United States to play politics or sit through lectures. I served to protect this country and I’m not done.
**I’m Captain Mike Bouchard. I’m an Iraq veteran, Army Paratrooper, Bronze Star recipient, and proud Michigan conservative.**
I’ve fought enemies overseas, and I’ll fight for America again in Congress.
Because when our borders fail, our nation fails — and I refuse to let that happen.
We need a strong Republican majority to crush this woke nonsense and restore real leadership.
And the heart of that fight runs straight through **Michigan’s 10th Congressional.**
We need to hold the line.
This is where we take our country back.
I’m asking — as a soldier, a Michigander & fellow patriot, and your next Congressman — **stand with me as I launch our campaign for Congress.**
[**If you can spare $5, $10, or even $1 today, it will help me start this fight strong and send a message that America is ready to lead again.**](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=994008ec43284037a1c033c8f09f0a81&_e=UDl2J1JtT7xFwgidk6v3e3iUqalzvxkqm34DoPfSi2T-_SAeh_WsaTAay9Q9w6ZganzLsYJnft4_Bj4NA-i9v1CxA9VHXC47EcY3IEodLrcCmD-CuFp9pvwSIV-_QkcybAuSPy0MrqhH6qC07lNcb_Fj_1Cl2nj409Af7B6M3TO9sVjmpg9TH9U1BAxDBaXSJk3K4ZDvCieXSS3S-kmQVh0d5fTXDWZ2UZefXQ8Rzjlyu3ClrrYXpuuMxGuu_i-8csKKNS4hPxak5KwVVbvXxP_TCv0iakaH30F5qq1LmRxFDcpNNymhtvCCHdkg-1QQZSOFcfsZ1lW_cb3LTIIjFs5xhhN3BseXMojkPLgegm6LosFxayyf1VYzlCvR3ciBrOl_ux9XO14xuxoKDBo0U9Wbsa357LI20gqy-9vT_RWut9CYXDCjiZT-44Yk75Utz0I1Tq0S298wm0rz-XBKKqw0aVVWXavV4SWDh64E9nyU436u0siUr_qQU62ZrD0v6Fz2gVj7Y_1_Q-wu7opWFsDh_bhnvMYxNVnPd6wrmozEw6j3UDLXLDD3_j4onK5D7nSB8bc2jCxuTPbZ3FjV7-Xj7oTs10NvxNCt87Vf89kBaO4aIhSiXNOF_FAT2aWQMrjSDTib3S2YFF1U45Wu1D6NQnx6YtCD3VFtoiRnwM1ftlS1OwF7kVGsDf9ejLopYAY9yVCmBn8L8q7lsVho_AruBGu37fIUpVkM7LwZRotuYOGaS9mtKSCvOX__J7T2R1EV7FL45hVEAjgqcJ45Q3Psf0naGiL0CPvH7K1bH2U7A1sIIpv5brgk4keaVvfxikZk4b0OeAcQ9hQG77TP-Q%3D%3D)
---
[ **JOIN THE MISSION & HELP ME FIGHT BACK** ](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=994008ec43284037a1c033c8f09f0a81&_e=UDl2J1JtT7xFwgidk6v3e3iUqalzvxkqm34DoPfSi2T-_SAeh_WsaTAay9Q9w6ZganzLsYJnft4_Bj4NA-i9v1CxA9VHXC47EcY3IEodLrcCmD-CuFp9pvwSIV-_QkcybAuSPy0MrqhH6qC07lNcb_Fj_1Cl2nj409Af7B6M3TO9sVjmpg9TH9U1BAxDBaXSJk3K4ZDvCieXSS3S-kmQVh0d5fTXDWZ2UZefXQ8Rzjlyu3ClrrYXpuuMxGuu_i-8csKKNS4hPxak5KwVVbvXxP_TCv0iakaH30F5qq1LmRxFDcpNNymhtvCCHdkg-1QQZSOFcfsZ1lW_cb3LTIIjFs5xhhN3BseXMojkPLgegm5q_3Y1mwBCY4YeOg9HpdMfznHvCf_7BZXW5F6J69NmVkNWb3Pta3uMmTIkImoP2SGmMzt7QhVpAPDHyuxk8142isIloMDVcKpHHJQcsU2ckDF6qI7x4oGD7sSz6q1qKSWA4aYrxo99wfXtaT71VkL1EePPeqw2-aQ0dUEnxhxtbgVNdT09PhnBwNuqzSNqBzTWKiUkSxkls_oMg1xqsCpwKYwtEwqOBLx_Oo9oF4ek5E2T2Ihh2OCdtAlw2zITk4KQKiXgtK6K4CCTkY_U7xz0uwl7xTYTVYGinYxKO8tAPpNQjK5oX5oeZulXzYd9JcXhRR_TfBLeRpSV3oyAv4DqYchSuHuIuvY6skIRHrR0vZibFmpbhZQA5-Yr1P0AW6Gtj0BLDdgMt_GBQF1aPbzZTpuKvoMpxVIc94qBodg1nQ9YdoTH_cqfNrI-phzsrxrf4lkAkWlp29qFA3TBzL83t2fllDuPn1Gvz7w9BQ214Q%3D%3D)

**ICYMI: Beto is hosting an All Vol Call tomorrow—and we want you on it. If you’re ready to get involved, make a difference, and help shape the outcome of key races in 2026,[RSVP now!](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67413?source=ema20251208-240517&t=2&akid=240517%2E444211%2EZjK8Ia)**
When you join the fight, your work doesn’t just check a box—it wins elections. You’ll learn how we’re reaching the voters who will determine the closest races in our state. You’ll see how our 2024 program boosted young voter turnout statewide and nationally—because volunteers like you spent time, energy, and care connecting with voters and having the conversations that truly matter.
On the call, we’ll also show you exactly how to get involved in meaningful, immediate volunteer opportunities. Every call you make, every voter you talk to, every conversation you have brings us closer to winning Congressional districts, flipping a U.S. Senate seat, and defeating Greg Abbott.
The work you do now will echo across the 2026 elections—and your impact will be felt where it matters most: in the hands of voters who decide the future of Texas.
**[If you’re ready to put in the work and make a real impact, this is your moment. Join Beto by RSVPing now ahead of tomorrow’s All Vol Call!](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67413?source=ema20251208-240517&t=3&akid=240517%2E444211%2EZjK8Ia)**

That taco truck your kids love?
That construction crew building the new subdivision? That clothing store where you bought your daughter's quinceañera dress?
_They might be cartel fronts._
And they're in your neighborhood right now.
I recently spent three days on the border in McAllen, Texas on a trip organized by _Federation for American Immigration Reform_ because I needed to see this for myself.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/db7d6559-cb73-43b2-bc2a-7c9240dd9af5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Under a bridge, there was a processing checkpoint where Border Patrol, yes - OUR Border Patrol was helping human traffickers move people through. Not stopping them. _Helping them._
That checkpoint's shut down now, but the infrastructure that made it possible is still there. And the businesses the cartels built during Biden's open border are (many of them) still operating in your community.
Border Czar Tom Homan knows all too well about the dark underbelly of what's really happening. Tom Homan runs ICE under Trump. And he's seen things that would break most people... nine-year-old girls raped multiple times by cartel members. Nineteen people baked to death in a tractor trailer. Children missing, trafficked, exploited.
He says:
**" These criminal cartels have killed more Americans than every terrorist organization in the world combined... and they're doing it from inside your communities, using businesses that look completely legitimate."**
Take a look:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/1d2f6594-af40-4954-8db7-a33319aa0944?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## The Businesses You Already Use
For example, the Sinaloa Cartel doesn't just smuggle drugs. They run clothing stores in Los Angeles that ordinary Americans shopped at every day. The DEA's "Operation Fashion Police" uncovered how they laundered over $100 million through garment district businesses.
So that outfit you bought at a discount? Maybe you helped wash drug money.
Or, consider how in Chicago, the Jalisco New Generation Cartel operated taco trucks and restaurants serving authentic Mexican food to families. "Operation Taco Tuesday" revealed these were distribution hubs for fentanyl and meth, laundering millions through legitimate food sales.
Translation? Family taco night could be funding trafficking operations.
Or in Oklahoma, the FBI discovered how Los Zetas bred and raced quarter horses, creating a multi-million dollar business that attracted wealthy American investors and the entire operation was funded by human trafficking proceeds.
### _**" If you go to Chipotle and order extra guac, you're putting money in the pockets of the New Generation Cartel."** _
That's what Ed Calderon said.
Ed spent 12 years in Mexican law enforcement fighting cartels. He watched his friends get murdered. He saw how cartels evolved from drug runners into Fortune 500-level operations.
And he explained on Joe Rogan's podcast how cartel operations are in your neighborhood making Fortune 500 companies look primitive.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/5aaa8f8a-dde8-4d4a-86fb-d0a7d1e025ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
These are legitimate business models.
In Texas, I learned how the cartels run diversified international businesses across every industry, from fuel theft to used car rackets that finance their chaos. They steal fuel from Mexican pipelines, ship it to U.S. refineries, get it processed into gasoline and diesel, then ship it back to Mexico and sell it for massive profits. They send their children to Ivy League universities and embed themselves in normal American commerce, hiding behind legitimate business licenses while running criminal enterprises that kill more Americans than terrorism.
They've learned something crucial: the best way to hide criminal enterprises is to embed them in normal American commerce. And it's working.
## Look at Your Own Community
That restaurant with prices too low to make sense? That construction company that always underbids competitors by 30%? That car wash that's busy but never seems to need customers? That dairy farm paying wages no legitimate business could sustain?
Start asking questions.
Because the cartels understand that once you establish legitimate business fronts in American communities, you create perfect cover for criminal operations.
Cash-intensive businesses are ideal for laundering money. Labor-intensive businesses are perfect for exploiting trafficked workers. Service businesses provide cover for distribution networks.
They're operating in your strip malls, your business districts, your industrial parks. They look like every other business. They file taxes. They have business licenses. They advertise on social media.
And most Americans have no idea.
## What Trump Changed
Trump [designated cartels as Foreign Terrorist Organizations](https://substack.com/redirect/5cb14d44-5650-41e2-976e-fb3ea725d532?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). This isn't about immigration enforcement anymore. This is about counterterrorism.
Think about what that means legally.
That taco truck serving as a fentanyl distribution hub? That's material support for a terrorist organization. That clothing store washing drug money? That's financing terrorism. That construction company exploiting trafficked labor? That's aiding a designated FTO.
Under Trump, the legal framework shifted from misdemeanors to federal terrorism charges. From local police matters to FBI counterterrorism investigations. Every cartel business operation becomes vulnerable. Every money laundering scheme becomes actionable. Every American business that knowingly participates faces federal anti-terrorism statutes.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/10123068-e5ba-454f-a5ff-ddeab9c8bd60?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This bridge in McAllen, Texas housed a Border Patrol checkpoint that effectively aided human trafficking during Biden's open border years. It's shut down now, but the damage is done.
[Border crossings dropped by over 75%](https://substack.com/redirect/c6291a79-6198-4d17-b0e2-c9fe0b807e03?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) since Trump's magnificent return. Not because of new policies. Because criminal organizations respond to consequences. Same border, same agents.
_**The difference is enforcement.**_
Mexican authorities, with American support, destroyed over 300 meth labs in the Sinaloa hills. Authorities are seizing auction car schemes. Authorities are disrupting legitimate business fronts.
But this is just the beginning. Because the infrastructure cartels built during Biden's open border years is still operating. The businesses are still running. The networks are still active.
## What Your State Must Do Now
Every state is a border state.
The cartel operations in your community didn't arrive yesterday. They've been building for years, especially during the four years when the border was effectively open.
Here are three simple things your state can do immediately:
**1\. Mandate 287(g) Programs Statewide:**[287(g) programs](https://substack.com/redirect/6a5f027f-2e7f-483c-b82f-df6c2ad51757?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) let local sheriffs work with ICE to detain illegal immigrants. Sheriff Mark Lamb uses it in Pinal County, Arizona. It works. But most sheriffs don't participate.
_" There's no excuse for American sheriffs not to implement this program. None."_
That's what [Sheriff Mark Lamb](https://substack.com/redirect/493c7507-74e0-4642-9289-ef964fc729e8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) told me when we met and discussed all this.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/90482f41-9814-4325-816a-f7c056d0d9a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Some of the men on the front lines of the cartel war. Sheriff Mark Lamb (cowboy hat on the left). I was in the circle with these guys for a few days. Grateful for every minute I got to spend with them.
Lamb knows the cost of lawlessness personally.
In December 2022, his 22-year-old son Cooper, Cooper's fiancee, and their 11-month-old daughter were all killed when a driver with alcohol and THC in his system, traveling 70 mph in a 45 mph zone, struck their Toyota Corolla. Cooper and the baby died at the scene. Caroline died at the hospital nearly a week later. Three lives gone because someone decided the law didn't apply to them.
**2\. Make Harboring Illegal Aliens a State Crime:**[if Catholic Charities can testify before state legislatures](https://substack.com/redirect/02458f1a-db81-4e12-ad51-1065dd10d0b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (see video below) that they harbor and transport people here illegally, your state needs laws with teeth. Remove the sanctuary protection that cartel operations rely on.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d10690b4-e214-40cf-bd37-1b886c546808?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**3\. Require E-Verify for All Businesses (No Exceptions):** if a business can't verify the legal status of its workers, it loses its business license. This destroys the cheap labor pipeline that makes cartel operations profitable.
## One Thing You Can Do This Week
I know you're busy.
I know this feels overwhelming. I know it's easier to think "someone else will handle it." But that's what they're counting on.
Your kids are growing up in a country where _cartels operate openly_. Where human trafficking is a $100 billion industry. Where fentanyl is the leading cause of death for Americans 18 to 45.
You don't have to become an activist.
_**You just have to make one call this week.**_
Call your sheriff tomorrow and ask: "Are you participating in the 287(g) program?" If they say no, ask why not.
Because when your sheriff partners with ICE through 287(g), cartel operations can't hide as easily in your community anymore. That construction crew using illegal labor? They get detained during traffic stops. That restaurant laundering drug money? Their workers get checked during routine inspections. That business undercutting American competitors by 30%? They lose their cheap labor pipeline.
287(g) makes cartels choose: stay out of your county or risk getting caught every single day.
Sheriff Mark Lamb runs 287(g) in Pinal County, Arizona and his county is safer because of it. Cartel operations avoid his jurisdiction because they know his deputies are authorized to detain illegals on the spot. No catch and release. No waiting for federal agents. Immediate consequences.
Your sheriff has that same power. They're just choosing not to use it, and that choice is putting your community at risk.
## **What to Say if They Gaslight You**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/185261ec-0613-41a4-9346-c658bd759fd3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**" We don't have the resources." **
Sheriff Lamb in Arizona does it with the same budget constraints you have. Trump rolled out the red carpet. ICE provides the training for free, the legal authority is already there, and the federal support is active right now. In December 2025, you have zero excuses. What's the real reason you won't protect our community?
**" It's not our job to enforce federal immigration law." **
287(g) makes it your job, and sheriffs across America are doing it successfully right now. You're choosing not to. When cartel businesses in our county are funding human trafficking, that becomes our problem. Are you telling me you're okay with that?
**" It'll hurt our relationship with the immigrant community."**
Legal immigrants want cartels out of their communities too. This targets criminal organizations and individuals hurting our community and exploiting people. If you can't tell the difference, maybe we need a sheriff who can."
**" We're already working with ICE when needed." **
287(g) is a formal partnership with legal authority and federal backing. 'Working with ICE when needed' means you're choosing when to enforce the law. Cartels operate every single day. Why don't you?
**" This is politically divisive." **
Dead kids from fentanyl aren't divisive. Human trafficking isn't divisive. Cartel businesses stealing American jobs isn't divisive. Keeping our community safe is your job. Do it."
**If your sheriff refuses, maybe say something like:**
_Sheriff, Trump designated cartels as Foreign Terrorist Organizations. The federal government is providing support, training, and legal authority through 287(g). Sheriffs across the country are implementing this successfully right now. You have every tool you need. So I 'm asking you directly: why are you choosing not to protect our community from terrorist organizations operating businesses on our streets?_
If they still refuse, call your county commissioners. Call your state representatives. Post about it on social media. Tag your sheriff's office. Make noise. Because here's what they're betting on: that you'll make one call, get a run-around answer, and give up.
Don't.
The cartels are counting on your sheriff doing nothing. And the sheriffs who ignore the problem are counting on you being too busy to follow up. Prove them both wrong.
It starts with one call.
That's it.
## The Window's Closing
We went from the most secure border in decades under Trump's first term to the largest human trafficking operation in American history under Biden. Now we're back to enforcement.
But the cartels are still in your community, operating the businesses you see every day, and hiding behind legitimate facades while running criminal enterprises that kill more Americans than terrorism.
They play the long game.
They survived Trump's first term, exploded under Biden's open border policies, and now they're waiting for the next administration that will give them another four-year window to expand. While they wait, they're sending their children to American universities, constructing business fronts that look entirely legitimate, and embedding themselves so deeply in American communities that most people don't even realize they're there.
_**The cartels built a $100 billion empire by operating businesses that most Americans never questioned. They succeeded because we weren 't paying attention.**_
The question is: what are you going to do about it?
Call your sheriff tomorrow about 287(g) programs. Call your state representative about legislation. Start asking questions about businesses that don't make sense.
Because the cartels are counting on you being too busy, too distracted, and too uncomfortable to demand change.
Prove them wrong.

And the sheriffs who ignore the problem are counting on you being too busy to follow up. Prove them both wrong. It starts with one call. That's it. The Window's Closing We went from the most secure border in decades under Trump's first term to the largest human trafficking operation in American history under Biden. Now we're back to enforcement. But the cartels are still in your community, operating the businesses you see every day, and hiding behind legitimate facades while running criminal enterprises that kill more Americans than terrorism. They play the long game. They survived Trump's first term, exploded under Biden's open border policies, and now they're waiting for the next administration that will give them another four-year window to expand. While they wait, they're sending their children to American universities, constructing business fronts that look entirely legitimate, and embedding themselves so deeply in American communities that most people don't even realize they're there. The cartels built a $100 billion empire by operating businesses that most Americans never questioned. They succeeded because we weren 't paying attention. The question is: what are you going to do about it? Call your sheriff tomorrow about 287(g) programs. Call your state representative about legislation. Start asking questions about businesses that don't make sense. Because the cartels are counting on you being too busy, too distracted, and too uncomfortable to demand change. Prove them wrong. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Brian Lenney ? ?

name: Ayanna Pressley
subject: An announcement from me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, I wanted to reach out to
you all directly to share an update.

Hearing from so many people throughout Massachusetts encouraging me to run
for the United States Senate was deeply humbling and a testament to the
strength of our movement.

I feel heartened and encouraged by the coalition that has emerged
encouraging me to take a look at this, and seeing the strong path to
victory, I spent deliberate time giving a statewide run the careful
consideration it deserves.

Ultimately, at this moment, I feel called to my community and my family.
Our district, the Massachusetts 7th, is squarely in the crosshairs of the
Trump White House. The fear and trauma felt in our communities and across
the country right now is all too real — and I am resolved to continue
fighting for my district.

So I’m proud to formally share that I’m running for re-election to the
House of Representatives in 2026. And as a reminder, this movement doesn’t
organize for the sake of a single electoral cycle — but with an eye on
generations to come.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251208-ap.sQMNyz&refcode=em20251208-37260&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=37260%2E1203867%2EMTSrbB ]So if you’re able, will you please split a contribution between Justice
Democrats and our campaign to kick off the next phase of our work with the
strongest possible momentum behind us?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251208-ap.sQMNyz&refcode=em20251208-37260&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1021&akid=37260%2E1203867%2EMTSrbB ]Contribute $5

In this next term, I plan to continue standing in the gap and holding the
line against this hostile White House that means harm to everyone in our
district and country. That means:

* Fighting back against the White House’s attacks on the LGBTQ+
community, Black and brown folks, federal workers, and our immigrant
neighbors.
* Continuing to use my committee roles to conduct oversight and make
progress on everything from housing affordability, AI and crypto
oversight, to accountability for survivors of Epstein’s abuse.
* Leading the Reproductive Freedom Caucus to protect and expand abortion
access with a House majority.
* Continuing to advance bold, comprehensive policies that meet the
moment and address the affordability crisis — like lowering the cost
of housing, investing in affordable childcare, ending the pushout of
Black women from the workforce, closing the racial wealth gap, and
more.

These are not nice-to-haves, these are must-haves for the people I
represent in Massachusetts and folks across the country.

Now, more than ever, is the time to dig deep, to lean into mutual aid, and
to use every tool available to stand in the gap in defense of our
neighbors and our democracy. That’s exactly what this campaign is going to
do — and we’re going to keep powering our work like we always have: with
small-dollar, grassroots support.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251208-ap.sQMNyz&refcode=em20251208-37260&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1022&akid=37260%2E1203867%2EMTSrbB ]So if you can today, please split a donation to support Justice
Democrats and our campaign to help kick off our 2026 campaign fighting for
bold action and transformative policies in Massachusetts and across the
country.

I am incredibly honored to have your support. Thank you for everything.

In solidarity,

Ayanna

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20251208-37260-footer&t=1023&refcode2=37260_1203867_MTSrbB&akid=37260%2E1203867%2EMTSrbB

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=37260%2E1203867%2EMTSrbB

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Team Rob
subject: Rob's NEPA Rundown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob for PA]()
body:
HUGE Visit Tomorrow 🇺🇸

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/robforpa/robs-nepa-rundown-lruqm3bqay?e=131e83a3c2)
---
| | | | |
---
| | Good Afternoon,
It’s been an exciting week here on Team Bresnahan. Tomorrow, President Trump will be visiting our region, and Rob looks forward to welcoming him back to Northeast Pennsylvania. Earlier this week, Rob sat down with Dr. Oz to discuss one of the most pressing issues facing our community: keeping our rural hospitals strong and accessible for the families who rely on them. And in more great news, Rob is honored to have earned the endorsement of IBEW Local 163, whose members keep our infrastructure running and our communities moving forward.
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | Tomorrow, we will welcome President Trump back to NEPA. If you are interested in attending, you can [**sign up for a ticket here**](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=c3501ef8ee&e=131e83a3c2). We look forward to seeing you tomorrow at Mount Airy Casino.
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | Rob is proud to have earned the IBEW Local 163 endorsement. The IBEW Union workers are the salt of the Earth Americans, working tirelessly to keep our power grid running. We appreciate all the work they do every day and are humbled by their support for Rob’s reelection campaign in 2026.
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| | Our Volunteer of the Week is Ramon, from Lackawanna County. He’s been a rockstar getting people involved and door-knocking to grow the Republican Party across our district. Thanks for all your hard work, Ramon!
---
|
---
| | Portland Paige is campaigning for Congress against Rob right after getting elected to a second term as Mayor. She is a political climber and far-left extremist who has backed open borders, defunding the police, and even supports taxpayer-funded sex change operations for illegal immigrants. We must stop her and her radical agenda. **Chip in now to help Rob fight back and win big in 2026!**
---
| [Click Here to Donate ](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=2886beebe5&e=131e83a3c2)

name: Mark Kelly Headquarters
subject: Mark is getting absolutely pummeled right now
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
As you read this, Donald Trump is calling for Mark’s arrest and execution. Kash Patel is reportedly trying to find a way to charge him with seditious conspiracy.
#

$10.
That’s what we’re asking you to donate to Mark Kelly today.
Mark’s facing unprecedented threats from Donald Trump and his team right now, and he needs our help. If that’s all you need to hear, use this link and chip in:
[**https://act.markkelly.com/go/MK-NEEDS-YOU-**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-dec25-dod/.FHtwNx&refcode=em251208-1-1mil&t=1&akid=6282%2E6688874%2E1hZ17D)
But if you need to hear more, let us explain why this request is so important.
After a lifetime of service to this country, Mark is getting attacked left and right by the President of the United States.
As you read this, Donald Trump is calling for Mark’s arrest and execution. Kash Patel is reportedly trying to find a way to charge him with seditious conspiracy. And Pete Hegseth directed the Secretary of the Navy to deliver him a report by Wednesday on what they will do to Mark — whether they will recall him to active duty and court-martial him.
Any one of these threats is serious. Together, they’re an outrageous act of political persecution.
That’s why this request is so important, and that’s why we’re in the middle of an emergency fundraising drive ahead of December 10th. This might be the most important deadline we’ve ever had.
[**So — can we count on you? Please make a contribution today, well in advance of that deadline on Wednesday. We have to make sure Mark has what he needs to defend himself and fight back.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-dec25-dod/.FHtwNx&refcode=em251208-1-1mil&t=2&akid=6282%2E6688874%2E1hZ17D)

name: Nellie Pou
subject: A wish list?
body:
Here’s the truth.

| |
---
Hi friend, New Jersey families can’t afford lawmakers who treat governing like a holiday wish list, full of wants and wishes, and empty of tangible action. They need leaders who roll up their sleeves, negotiate in good faith, and put solutions ahead of stunts. Democrats already have plans ready to go. And since we clearly can’t count on MAGA Republicans, we need to win back the House majority so we can finally deliver an agenda that helps people — not special interests. This isn’t a wish list — this is my duty to my constituents. **[I’m standing up for New Jersey families in Congress. That’s why I’m asking for your grassroots support. It’s the only way to keep pushing for progress and make sure the voices of New Jersey families aren’t drowned out. Please, friend, chip in today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120871461/587629434/-200729754?refcode=2511208_np_santa_l1&ms=2511208_np_santa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzJmNTZiYWQtNmVkNC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=r7if3ovSBjXNNI4p92fP7-x3Yoj-8w8xSQYVkLp95Ak=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120871473/587629446/-3691057?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2511208_np_santa&ms=2511208_np_santa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzJmNTZiYWQtNmVkNC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=r7if3ovSBjXNNI4p92fP7-x3Yoj-8w8xSQYVkLp95Ak=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120871474/587629448/-3691057?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2511208_np_santa&ms=2511208_np_santa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzJmNTZiYWQtNmVkNC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=r7if3ovSBjXNNI4p92fP7-x3Yoj-8w8xSQYVkLp95Ak=)

### About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120871479/587629454/-3691057?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=72f56bad-6ed4-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=2511208_np_santa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzJmNTZiYWQtNmVkNC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=r7if3ovSBjXNNI4p92fP7-x3Yoj-8w8xSQYVkLp95Ak=) | [Give Monthly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120871480/587629455/-3691057?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=72f56bad-6ed4-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=2511208_np_santa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzJmNTZiYWQtNmVkNC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=r7if3ovSBjXNNI4p92fP7-x3Yoj-8w8xSQYVkLp95Ak=)

name: Republican Party in the Virgin Islands
subject: St. Croix Fundraising Reception This Thursday!
body:
| | | | | [|
---](https://republicanpartyinthevirginislands.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aec4429d4907d8f643606ded&id=e643de8ce3&e=4f81ceec6f)
| | | | | |

### St. Croix RPVI Fundraising Reception

You’re invited to an evening supporting the Republican Party of the Virgin Islands.
We’ll be gathering at the home of John Heppe on the East End of St. Croix on Thursday, December 11th from 5 to 8pm. Directions will be shared with attendees after reserving their spot. The night will include special video guests and a chance to connect with supporters from across the territory.
Tickets are available now at [**RPVI.org**.](https://republicanpartyinthevirginislands.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aec4429d4907d8f643606ded&id=7848feff56&e=4f81ceec6f)
Your attendance directly strengthens the party’s work in the Virgin Islands. Reserve your spot today and help move our mission forward!

name: Lt. Col. David Flippo
subject: Former Nevada Assemblyman Ken Gray Endorses David Flippo!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada]( "Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada")
body:
Nevada’s conservative fighters are rallying behind our campaign! |
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=e218788340&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | Peter ,

I proudly announce that **Retired Air Force Veteran and Former Nevada Assemblyman Ken Gray** has officially endorsed my campaign for Congress in **NV-04.** Ken served our country for twenty-six years, and in the Nevada Assembly, he fought for veterans’ issues, addressed public safety concerns, and introduced legislation to strengthen and secure Nevada’s elections! Here is what Ken had to say when he endorsed me:
---
| [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=8e9f3639ce&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| “I am proud to offer my full and unwavering support for Lt. Col. (ret) David Flippo for Congress. As a retired Air Force Chief Master Sergeant and someone who has spent many years serving veterans at every level, including in the Trump administration, I have come to value leaders who carry real experience and a real devotion to our military community. David Flippo has earned that respect through his own service as an Air Force officer and combat Veteran.
David understands the challenges our veterans face and the responsibility we have to stand firm for our conservative values. He brings discipline, integrity, and the steady judgment that Nevada desperately needs in Washington. He is not running for a title. He is running to serve.
I am honored to support David Flippo. He will fight for our veterans and Nevadans. He will defend our freedoms. And he will represent Nevada with the character and commitment that our state deserves.”
---
| [STAND WITH AIR FORCE VETERANS FIGHTING FOR NEVADA ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=707d536209&e=273c9a71fb "STAND WITH AIR FORCE VETERANS FIGHTING FOR NEVADA ")
---
| Republicans and conservatives from all across the state are coming together in support of our campaign, because they know NV-04 needs a Congressman committed to fighting for our freedoms and our veterans! **I am grateful to Ken for his support, and I look forward to having him as a part of our mission to “flip it Red!”** In Congress, **I will fight for our servicemembers and veterans every day!**

We have a real opportunity to bring real, positive, conservative change to Nevada, but it will take all of us working together. **I am matching every single dollar that is being donated, so your donation will have 2X the impact! Will you join our movement to flip NV-04?**
---
| [DONATE ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=29af53e55d&e=273c9a71fb "DONATE ")
---
| For Nevada, David Flippo
Republican Candidate for U.S. Congress
Nevada’s 4th Congressional District
**[www.Flippo4NV.com](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=97050ec6fa&e=273c9a71fb)**
---

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: Trump called Somali Americans “garbage”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1411%2E251025%2E8nbbAG ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1411%2E251025%2E8nbbAG ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

I’m sorry to drop into your inbox like this, but this demands a response:

[ The ]The New York Times: Trump Calls Somalis ‘Garbage’ He Doesn’t Want in
the Country

It’s hard to overstate the cruelty of this comment.

Somali Americans build and serve across our country. They are part of our
American fabric — our teachers, doctors, engineers, small business owners,
neighbors. They pay taxes, raise families, coach soccer, and care for
their communities just like everyone else.

But Trump doesn’t see people. He sees groups he can belittle to make
himself feel bigger.

No one blames people who look like Trump for Bernie Madoff’s fraud. So why
blame all Somali Americans for the fraud of a few?

Because Trump thinks people are trash. He’s just looking for an excuse to
say it.

As a Muslim American, I know where this kind of rhetoric leads.

When powerful men decide whole communities are disposable, those
communities face harassment, exclusion, and violence. We get treated as
outsiders in our own country.

This kind of rhetoric doesn’t exist only in the Oval Office and on Truth
Social. It shapes policy, fuels violence, and defines who feels safe in
their own home.

Moments like this reveal the stakes of our work together. We either
organize around our shared humanity, or we let fearmongers define who
belongs in America.

Our campaign is building a coalition grounded in dignity, solidarity, and
moral clarity. A coalition that won’t let would-be oligarchs decide who
belongs and who doesn’t.

But Trump and his cronies see the momentum we’re generating here in
Michigan, and they’re prepared to pour millions into this race to stop us
before we gain any more ground. That’s why I’m asking:

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251208-1-ak.m1X1Ec&amount=10&refcode=em20251208-1410&t=1004&akid=1411%2E251025%2E8nbbAG ]Peter, will
you chip in $10 or whatever you can today so we have the
resources to push back and prove that a people-powered movement can defeat
the politics of cruelty?

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251208-1-ak.m1X1Ec&amount=10&refcode=em20251208-1410&t=1023&akid=1411%2E251025%2E8nbbAG ]Donate $10 ››

Thank you for reading this. And thank you for believing, as I do, that
America is strongest when all of us are seen.

In solidarity,

Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1024&akid=1411%2E251025%2E8nbbAG
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1025&akid=1411%2E251025%2E8nbbAG

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Targeting voters and judges
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Democracy Docket: To Protect Gerrymanders, GOP Lawmakers Target Judges — and Voters [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=120825_2&amount=25]
Vote-suppressing state legislators around the country have identified the biggest obstacles to their all-encompassing mid-decade redistricting efforts: Judges in the courts and the voters bringing those legal challenges to these gerrymanders. So opponents of voting rights are responding by launching all-out attacks on both.
The cases fighting for fair democracy and fair districts have generally won in the courts -- at least until those cases have reached a highly partisan Supreme Court. But the anti-democracy forces aren't leaving anything to chance. They're answering any pro-democracy rulings with threats to impeach judges, pack the courts, and make judicial elections partisan. They’re also working to undermine the power of voters to have a voice in the redistricting process, by attacking voter-approved constitutional amendments and making it harder for voters to put amendments on the ballot.
Their desired end result of these attacks is clear. The harder they make it to vote, the more politicians make voter participation feel worthless, the less people actually take part. And in a general sense, the less people who vote, the more the vote suppressors can make sure only their hand-picked voters have an easy time voting.
Team: We have to fight for our right to vote state-by-state and in every legislature. Step up with $25 or whatever you can today and help us make every vote count in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=120825_2&amount=25]
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=120825_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=120825_2&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=120825_2&amount=50] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=120825_2&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=120825_2&amount=250] Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=120825_2&amount=35]
Need examples? Take Utah. One lawmaker in the state filed impeachment charges against Judge Dianna Gibson after she struck down the state’s gerrymandered congressional map and called out lawmakers for defying a voter-approved constitutional amendment that requires fair election districts. Other leaders in the legislature launched attacks on the judge, calling her ruling “ the arrogance of a King playing judge ” and describing the ruling to enforce a voter-approved amendment as a “ constitutional crisis ” and a “ direct threat to our constitutional order .”
Then there's Missouri, where the state's direct democracy system is under attack as state legislators try and limit election referendums. It's happening right now because of a referendum effort to overwrite the state legislature's Trump-driven gerrymander, but the state legislature has a history of overriding people-powered referendum results in the state.
Striking down direct democracy efforts and gerrymandering districts is all a way to silence voters. This is about the party in power choosing their voters in order to stay in power in perpetuity. This is about removing any obstacles, including judges, that stop them from having total control.
We can't afford to watch our democracy go backwards like this. Chip in $25 or whatever you can today to help us protect the right to vote nationwide >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=120825_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=120825_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=120825_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax-deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=ebcrL2J%2BV5Tkc%2FJTn8iEkUi3JIZ%2FnvyqvpbxBTlO1a3mkR1Wk%2FEFU2wBTOIVhoGGsA2notV6TE7mQk9FyCMR9sl4AMDZCI1ZyAaA5W73d3JnHRI2JtXCOZujVCmOLM7cN1MA9K2vSplyTCoUErEV5%2Batrwi6ksHjBVQrJ7dRxO6c8rXHCzqDKE4sv6ixEOjUGglFa00PzI%2BgeZOPK3p1kfans4HlzFb3EI0zwoUhgnosp%2BKpqkV4S0dqDuy1yl6lR7beP1M6r7xkzrONcQrJyRIHs7jdMJ5i3gQOIsoGtVuivcP1lkWEuztz2f8XI1wzJgB2I5leQlr8cgZjlMTIHqk5k%2BSU9JhzvxAr066YbjAw83EHynnHl2RZBcPC%2Fori3PuVwD1UUvlj6ZjUHeisitZIZiJIS94di%2FSBjS8WT4A%3D .

name: Team Downing
subject: This isn’t a drill. They’re coming after MAGA.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
We repeat: This is not a drill.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._xvr_DytISzz8XvIc76rmA)Peter,
**This may be our last message.**
They’ve come after us. **HARD**.
_The regime doesn’t want this getting out. _
But before they shut us down completely, we need to know:
[Are you with Trump? Are you with MAGA? Are you one of the true Patriots who still believe in this movement?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[YES - I'M STILL MAGA
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._iDou1GyPT1ZaMrWdpqhcA) _The clock is ticking. The censorship is real. The crackdown is here._
[ TAKE THE OFFICIAL MAGA ID POLL NOW](https://trk.emails.troydowning._qGMhrh14Tq9jwrDM1G_A)
This isn’t a game.
They’ve labeled us “the enemy.”
They’ve weaponized the system.
But they haven’t broken us.
If you’re reading this, you ARE the resistance.
Hold the line.
Stay in the fight.
And for President Trump’s sake – [TAKE THE POLL.](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[TAKE THE MAGA ID SURVEY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._6T1Aqg)| |

subject: RESCHEDULED: Christmas Party now 12/16/2025 @ 6:30 PM!!
body:
You're cordially invited to our Christmas Party on December 16th at 6:30 PM!
| | | | | [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qP6s7TT1EMmXCH6Wp-oUa4CaU1yoXLC85pBjG4Y0xBBKtGqZWrG_KxD06CfFVOZH4F--uAvcRRH_GKmWIQ_a9qcU27xuRXdjJe3tE0YihdzEqN-PrYkgXAQEsvI4bKzzaNPgPkZ7J8Gl02ygQEDDTdiChMemyRe4-gDRN8zmbV4=&c=CX7ja_MSZOKaRkDvUxRPWUuwytqC3wxystXQ_bR0DG40ZzIInCJBOg==&ch=jokE6xATHtE-zQ_rClxE56fTUqJy_HvSYU_pAl52b5Go7pqpleSJjw==)

Hey Everyone!
Due to an unknown conflict, our Christmas Party has been pushed back by one week.
We apologize for the late notice.
We are hoping to accommodate more folks and also avoid the issue we ran into with tomorrow night.
Please join us on Tuesday, December 16th, at our family home in Golden at 6:30 PM for some festive fun!
Please wear your best ugly sweater for a chance to win a prize, and come prepared for an ornament exchange.
We are thrilled to be hosting you and celebrating the Christmas season with you all.
As always, please RSVP by clicking the image or button below.
*We are transitioning to President Trump's marketing platform, Nucleus, so we have a new RSVP Page.*
If you have issues RSVP'ing, please don't hesitate to reach out.

clean_body: You're cordially invited to our Christmas Party on December 16th at 6:30 PM! | | | | | == Hey Everyone! Due to an unknown conflict, our Christmas Party has been pushed back by one week. We apologize for the late notice. We are hoping to accommodate more folks and also avoid the issue we ran into with tomorrow night. Please join us on Tuesday, December 16th, at our family home in Golden at 6:30 PM for some festive fun! Please wear your best ugly sweater for a chance to win a prize, and come prepared for an ornament exchange. We are thrilled to be hosting you and celebrating the Christmas season with you all. As always, please RSVP by clicking the image or button below. We are transitioning to President Trump's marketing platform, Nucleus, so we have a new RSVP Page. If you have issues RSVP'ing, please don't hesitate to reach out. | | == | | == | Looking forward to seeing you all next Tuesday! Best, | == | Weston D. Friend,
Pete Hegseth is the most unqualified person to serve as Secretary of Defense in my lifetime.
For some reason, it seems like he can’t stop using his personal phone to dangerously share classified military strike plans with people who shouldn’t see them – including a journalist, his wife, and his brother. The Pentagon’s own Inspector General just released a report concluding that these actions could’ve put the lives of U.S. troops at risk if the sensitive information fell into the wrong hands.
But now, we’ve also learned that Pete may have committed a **war crime** in September when he issued a careless order to “kill everybody” on a boat in the Caribbean, leading to an illegal strike on a boatful of people and the murder of two incapacitated people clinging on for life in the water.
Congress is investigating this matter. But if the reports are true and Sec. Hegseth ordered our military to commit a war crime – I believe he should resign immediately, or be impeached.

Before midnight, I’m hoping to get 100 responses to my flash poll to see if supporters from 37087 like you agree. Please tell me now, friend:

name: Adem T. Bunkeddeko
subject: The Most Important Period — And New York Is Paying Attention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adem for New York
body:
https://www.adembunkeddeko.com/ [https://www.adembunkeddeko.com/]
https://www.cityandstateny.com/politics/2025/12/adem-bunkeddeko-launches-state-comptroller-bid-novel-trust-fund-plan/409856/?oref=csny-homepage-river [https://www.cityandstateny.com/politics/2025/12/adem-bunkeddeko-launches-state-comptroller-bid-novel-trust-fund-plan/409856/?oref=csny-homepage-river]
Peter,
It’s official — we’ve launched our campaign for New York State Comptroller, and we’re starting off strong. In our first week, I joined Inside City Hall on NY1 and we held our first campaign event. New Yorkers are excited to reimagine how we can invest in the future of our state — and they’re ready for a Comptroller who puts public finance to work for the public good.
Now the real work begins. I’m hoping you can help us reach our next milestone by chipping in right now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/128launchweekemail] .
Here’s the goal: We plan to qualify for New York’s generous Public Matching Funds program in the next two weeks. The state matches small-dollar donations from New Yorkers at 6:1 — meaning $250 becomes $1500 .
These funds are essential to get our message to every corner of this great state.
We’re building a coalition that stretches across the East River and all the way up the Hudson.
Together, we’ll shape public finance for the public good — and ensure New York works for everyone.
Thank you for being in my corner,
Adem
Paid for by Adem for New York
Adem for New York
P.O. Box 130-427,
Brooklyn, NY 11213

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Trump is gaslighting Americans about the economy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Derek,
President Trump has been making some unbelievable claims about the economy lately:
“Incomes are rising, grocery prices are way down, energy prices are way down. Mortgage prices are down.”
And the most ridiculous one... “ Inflation has been defeated. ”
I can’t even listen to all of it because, frankly, it’s sick. The President is talking about prices being down — but he’s living in a bubble where foreign governments shower him with cash, he’s letting his kids do crypto and real-estate deals, and members of his Cabinet are making themselves rich with insider contracts. All while Virginians and Americans are suffering!
Grocery costs are up. Healthcare costs are up. Energy costs are up. Food, school supplies, building supplies — all up. Families are paying more for the holidays this year than last year.
And instead of being honest about it, Trump is firing economists at the Bureau of Labor Statistics and telling them not to release the real data. He can try to hide the numbers, but families know exactly what they’re spending at the checkout line.
Americans aren’t fooled, and neither am I.
Trump’s reckless economic policies — especially his reckless and illegal across-the-board tariffs — are driving prices up and pushing small businesses, farmers, and families to the brink.
I’ve been battling Trump’s tariff idiocy in the Senate from Day One, forcing votes to try to give families the relief this President refuses to provide. But I need your voice in this fight.
Will you add your name to say you stand with me against Trump’s economic gaslighting and out-of-control tariffs? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/GV-_thNyo0q_tuBtZfy-wQ2]
ADD MY NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/GV-_thNyo0q_tuBtZfy-wQ2]
The President can pretend all he wants, but we’re not buying it — and we’re not backing down.
Thanks for speaking out with me.
– Tim Kaine

name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: Will you take a look at my resume?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
As a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington |

---

Peter,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan **running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss.** I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota.

I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations.

clean_body: As a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington | Peter, My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss. I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota. I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations. I’m starting this race with absolutely nothing , but because of the enormity of the race's outcome, I figured there is no harm in asking for your help. At the end of the day, my request of you will end in one of two ways: 1.) . 2.) you read this email without contributing, but you at least now know who I am. I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks. I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war. Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, defunded our police , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe. This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves. If you are reading this email right now and you don’t live in Minnesota, then I’m sure you’ll agree with me that every American must be represented by individuals in Congress who want to build a better version of the America we live in today—individuals of integrity. That’s not who my opponent is. We have an incredible opportunity to elect a Republican to the U.S. Senate next year - something voters in this state haven’t done since they re-elected former Senator Norm Coleman in 2002. As a Republican, I know the odds are tough in a state that hasn’t voted red in a presidential election since 1976. But as a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington. Here’s what I stand for: Restoring law and order by supporting our police and cracking down on crime. Cutting taxes and regulations to ease the burden on retirees and small businesses. Securing our borders to protect our communities and sovereignty. Defending our Second Amendment rights and traditional values. Stopping the radical left’s agenda that’s eroding the America we love. You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation. So, . This race won’t be easy. The Democrats have deep pockets, and the radical left will stop at nothing to keep this seat. I’m running to serve you, to protect our way of life, and to ensure Minnesota remains a place where faith, family, and freedom thrive. I hope you’ll invest in me right now – any amount will help. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I will not give up on our country
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| It has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution.
Derek,
If you can believe it, things didn’t stop when Trump called for my hanging. It didn’t stop with the threat of a court-martial from Pete Hegseth, either. Because now, the FBI wants to talk to me and other members of Congress.
All for saying things the president didn’t like to hear.
If you’re feeling like this isn’t the country you grew up in, I don’t blame you. But I hope you aren’t giving up on it, Derek.
I certainly haven’t. This country has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution.
There’s no chance in hell that somebody like Donald Trump is going to stop me from serving the people of this nation. None.
If he thought all of this was going to shut me up, he’s got another thing coming.
And if you’d be willing to help support me as we gear up to fight back against the attacks coming our way from Donald Trump and his Administration, please:
**[Split a donation between Adam Schiff and me. It would mean a lot.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=q42025_abs_em_kelly.8tQuMC&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20251208_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=3&akid=9274%2E5257348%2EtR0WQe)**

Y'all, it's Jasmine.
I'm reaching out with big news, and I wanted you to hear it from me first: I'm officially running for the United States Senate here in Texas.
Let me be clear: With our current wannabe dictator in the White House, I'm not launching this campaign to play nice. I'm doing it to fight -- because Texas deserves someone who doesn't back down when the bullies come for her. It deserves someone who fights back.
But to win this race, we'll have to take on Donald Trump, the Texas Republican political machine, and all of their shady special interest donors. And to be blunt, that won't come cheap.
[That's why I'm asking you to become one of my founding donors as we launch this historic grassroots campaign. I'm counting on your support now more than ever before so that we can hit the ground running and finally flip Texas blue.
