Let me be clear: When there's a fight worth having, I don't flinch. I don't shrink. I don't back down.
Just ask the communities I've fought for as a civil-rights attorney, the defendants I've represented as a public defender, and the people of Dallas that I serve in Congress. I'm a lifelong fighter for justice.
So Donald Trump can run his mouth all he wants. All his attacks show is that he's terrified of what I represent -- and what I'm bringing to the Senate when we win this race: truth, accountability, and a future where power answers to the people.
[If you believe that insults won't silence us -- if you believe in a Texas that stands for justice, equity, and real representation -- I need you. We're launching a campaign to change the game. But real campaigns need real support. That's why I'd be so grateful if you could pitch in $10, $25, or more to help us hit the ground running. Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Bushra Amiwala?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XVFZzOxPhLTQMhqTs2u0UaE_lS8mXkDpNlv06_vTs1a0KlQRoSbvShnxmlBmBz-TEo9HuD4ukua16ToqJiIcQB856QoSFmf7vwpUaSRaj3Vqkbw8NMfwpz4WCVrBkzerLVxj5WIZD1dVXNZfjpH7_BFGSjroTpT3k7Dwp7yAjKeSqxVzbJIop6S1HnZOvKPkXGc0xnsrNk-fj_W6rlx2hMw-e1r-HqBafqi4o1XrGWUD0WPFVD4Zd72OIozUytSIzEAv0FlU7jU=&c=Rq7qKMrIKvqDHOOKc2na7bVGVIYdrLmROqbiQbr4adaZEpczyKf5vQ==&ch=qMKqZNRbJVZ1zvinkarNRSidfO6QUYjSg1VeKXNmOceawOHhogpYhQ==)

clean_body: Together, we’re going to flip Texas blue | | | | | == | Y'all, it's Jasmine. I'm reaching out with big news, and I wanted you to hear it from me first: I'm officially running for the United States Senate here in Texas. Let me be clear: With our current wannabe dictator in the White House, I'm not launching this campaign to play nice. I'm doing it to fight -- because Texas deserves someone who doesn't back down when the bullies come for her. It deserves someone who fights back. But to win this race, we'll have to take on Donald Trump, the Texas Republican political machine, and all of their shady special interest donors. And to be blunt, that won't come cheap. == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | Let me be clear: When there's a fight worth having, I don't flinch. I don't shrink. I don't back down. Just ask the communities I've fought for as a civil-rights attorney, the defendants I've represented as a public defender, and the people of Dallas that I serve in Congress. I'm a lifelong fighter for justice. So Donald Trump can run his mouth all he wants. All his attacks show is that he's terrified of what I represent -- and what I'm bringing to the Senate when we win this race: truth, accountability, and a future where power answers to the people. == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | Thank you, Jasmine | | == | | | | == | Mail checks to: Bushra for Congress PO Box 911 Skokie, IL 60076 | | == | | | | Bushra for Congress | PO Box 911 | Skokie, IL 60076 US | |

name: NH GOP
subject: FW: ICE just made a major arrest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee, Chairman Jim MacEachern
body:
Just two weeks ago, the New Hampshire State Police helped ICE Boston arrest a criminal alien offender through 287(g) cooperation.

| | | | | [|
---](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=5752f1df9f&e=f3aa6419cd)
| | | | | |

Friend,Just two weeks ago, the New Hampshire State Police helped ICE Boston arrest a criminal alien offender through 287(g) cooperation.And let’s be very clear:
[**This would NOT be possible without Republican majorities in Concord.**](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=efffc890a4&e=f3aa6419cd) While Democrats push sanctuary policies and tie law enforcement’s hands, Republicans empowered our State Police to work with federal authorities to keep dangerous offenders off our streets.This is the New Hampshire difference, and it only exists because voters put Republicans in charge.**But Democrats are already attacking the program, calling for rollbacks, already signaling that if they win in 2026, cooperation with ICE will end and New Hampshire will look a whole lot more like the states people are fleeing.**[**We can’t let that happen.**](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=461ca30cf8&e=f3aa6419cd) Republicans are defending the safest state in the nation, and this arrest proves our approach works.**But we need the resources to keep it that way.** Will you chip in right now to help us protect Republican majorities and stop Democrats from dismantling the policies that keep New Hampshire safe?
---
| [KEEP NH SAFE](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=49ae041c56&e=f3aa6419cd)
---
| [DEFEND REPUBLICAN MAJORITIES](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=7eb50bca15&e=f3aa6419cd)
---
| [STOP SANCTUARY POLICIES](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=9d8d1ef747&e=f3aa6419cd)
---
| |

Thank you for standing with us.— NHGOP
---

body:

---

[**MESSAGE FROM NAVY SEALS TIM SHEEHY, ELI CRANE, & RYAN ZINKE**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=0d0dc2edb9d84db39f19530934ed83a5&_e=DOgAIxuyOHwgIdyPEeFM7FONjGPgHKCvfrp-bIjVjLokiecjvwAf4BzgoykfA0vOLXZAm7n40D8CIF8pBGxxhABNqYdGZribHAa93H3aDWWffK6mStHuhw0lZgYtLXQSg5BALv3NvgJU-8-J2hGv3MAcCFQhUJ5Rajbj2f026l756OhyBU_qhB34lq_GitDkq4GIGLOmYINA2X9seXzd5WDapx2KQ0BePQrU19L6uNq3sN6NnU6u3MczvPfWaXseS8r25tn0F4RdLSLelbf7PaTz3UkyvrojlH_ZtVkNoY2jyV6CCvPLWll4Tb1pIoprC9iSRBbmQoomWn21kDZ2GUpwXUauGSxfB9CNkrK_P_ySwSWfcV4Who7uXvddFdH-f1cqfS-mTihbaaod_8NvSCyMTCR2QvH0NFNoIacpko6GsV6KrGpPoe9RXqy7Ob6AREAKwkxJS64_n69ZyVzhHS4Re5Dhfo6eh2Q3n6etCugsXc8pdNfToOS_6lDERnWa9jnYh6E1T4kJIgIGU2mVT0oXi5eV-IFp3zS9qWBdK9NYbzUCgT_Ppe1WIoClIAqJMMpr-b8xZt4pWKS3Hmgb5Bwjv8ZP7Wa9hXojvE_SBXKniLN00D-StJ98IzwHh3LpddhQnRgxY9uyp5XhfpwEQsl3AtMVM9SFiKX0_K4qZw7Ya7XeacIXnd1xynFlfdpRxVptR2MebH0JmDvxZyKbLg%3D%3D)
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=0d0dc2edb9d84db39f19530934ed83a5&_e=DOgAIxuyOHwgIdyPEeFM7FONjGPgHKCvfrp-bIjVjLokiecjvwAf4BzgoykfA0vOLXZAm7n40D8CIF8pBGxxhABNqYdGZribHAa93H3aDWWffK6mStHuhw0lZgYtLXQSg5BALv3NvgJU-8-J2hGv3MAcCFQhUJ5Rajbj2f026l756OhyBU_qhB34lq_GitDkq4GIGLOmYINA2X9seXzd5WDapx2KQ0BePQrU19L6uNq3sN6NnU6u3MczvPfWaXseYAm97EE20j1m5NNgbl06wEe4HaGcjctuajrFtXPbtVEI3kE0xQJkaSHhW5tKD5rPgeOla-QEjH2uNIHszJCoiSRefPbQKQv2yzawo0KBfa3AsjuHsUem-R2FA0V32JEZF-x848EIoyMJfcSKtGjYH1CDX53MKxVoyp1UO8NzR8-QSkvDCvt9RtqV0Ipe7sdhuR_OlE0-plKzj9A8qjvrZxnVwBsTrP2SfkMqHNdjaueptXjM41L_sx0fhaajxlUqK7KrK-FAfGyRlp1zbQpWi3PX-V1jBbxn88kVppcHuXv5bN0cG4iUOeRRyotVKnHK6UP8vOESWbhPBrslvgMrvMdxi6XG8IG5MkdQ0aZCy4FkT8uGzFruoeCG9v83wN_3glNSobYIO7RB07v_lsdyEar3X9CI8jXsoBZXFVwTeK9PnRUwI3rKJKrJZ3SZ-3L1J6pMSJG6XBGeK7XuEomM6Q%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: **Navy SEALs.**

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

clean_body: They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. | Fellow Conservative, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Fellow Conservative to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! -> If the media wants to attack us for having a "warrior mentality" - the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... -> If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump's MAGA movement - the movement that says we can make America great... -> If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste - which has been exposed by Trump's DOGE department... ...Then they don't understand WHY Donald J. body:
Help us celebrate our Lead Spokesperson

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ceeb1c3de4a5/tockcw1cwy-218?e=81ab29c4d2)

| | | | | | Peter,
---
| | We’re counting down to Rev. Dr. Stephany Rose’s birthday on December 16th, **and we want to make sure she feels the love from every corner of this movement.**
Stephany Rose has spent her life standing up for everyday people — defending workers’ rights, fighting for students, and lifting up communities too often ignored. She is the heart of the Movement for Freedom, and now we want to send some of that love back to her.
[**🎂 Will you take a moment to sign her birthday card?**](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=c52d9f4cf4&e=81ab29c4d2)
---
| [Sign Stephany Rose’s Card](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=15dfd69eb8&e=81ab29c4d2)
---
| | Your name — and your message — will mean the world to her. We’re gathering notes from supporters nationwide to create something truly special on her big day.
This is our chance to say: **Thank you for showing up, for fighting, and for leading with courage.**
Add your name today and help us celebrate someone who gives so much to all of us.
---
| |
_**The Movement for Freedom Team**_

clean_body: Help us celebrate our Lead Spokesperson | | | | | | | | | | | | | Peter, | | We’re counting down to Rev. Dr. Stephany Rose’s birthday on December 16th, and we want to make sure she feels the love from every corner of this movement. Stephany Rose has spent her life standing up for everyday people — defending workers’ rights, fighting for students, and lifting up communities too often ignored. She is the heart of the Movement for Freedom, and now we want to send some of that love back to her. | | | Your name — and your message — will mean the world to her. We’re gathering notes from supporters nationwide to create something truly special on her big day. This is our chance to say: Thank you for showing up, for fighting, and for leading with courage. Add your name today and help us celebrate someone who gives so much to all of us. | | The Movement for Freedom Team | | If you have saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process instantly. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2025 Movement 4 Freedom. All rights reserved.

subject: Congress is just not working for Iowans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120874559/587639684/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MThjNDg3OC03N2Q0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kJ7KpMyX2XFns3eVATKzIrW_EsX2GzcnsQoYSJx9qBw=)

Peter, it’s no secret that Congress is just not working for Iowans.

**Mariannette Miller-Meeks and her fellow politicians in Washington have been more focused on their special interest backers and their own careers rather than doing their jobs on behalf of the people they’re supposed to serve.** Christina is working to put a stop to these abuses of power by championing a tough ethics reform agenda that will force our elected leaders to serve the people rather than special interests.

**[If you've already seen Christina's plan, help her by making a donation to support her race. Chip in $5 or whatever you can afford>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120874561/587639687/-1610961223?refcode=em25_251208_reform_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_251208_reform_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=718c4878-77d4-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MThjNDg3OC03N2Q0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kJ7KpMyX2XFns3eVATKzIrW_EsX2GzcnsQoYSJx9qBw=)**

If you're not convinced yet, here are just a few reforms Christina will champion on the House floor:

✅ Ban the trading of stocks by all Members of Congress, Executive Branch Members, Supreme Court Justices, their spouses, and staff.

✅ Pass a constitutional amendment to reverse the Citizens United decision and block unlimited corporate spending on campaigns.

✅ Institute term limits and age caps.

✅ Ban family members from being paid by campaigns or official offices.

✅ Ban Members of Congress from using taxpayer dollars for first-class and business-class air travel.

**[It's time to put a stop to the revolving door of self-serving politicians and put ethics back into our politics. If this sounds like a good idea to you, make a donation to strengthen Christina's campaign>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120874563/587639689/-1610961223?refcode=em25_251208_reform_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&utm_campaign=em25_251208_reform_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&refcode2=718c4878-77d4-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MThjNDg3OC03N2Q0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kJ7KpMyX2XFns3eVATKzIrW_EsX2GzcnsQoYSJx9qBw=)**

body:
We can’t afford for Washington to stay stuck.

| |
---
Friend, You can feel Christmas starting to settle in across Massachusetts. The cold is getting sharper, lights are going up in windows on my block, and my girls are already counting down the days. It’s a time that always makes me slow down for a moment and think about what matters most. But as we head into the holidays, I’m thinking just as much about the families who are feeling the strain of rising costs, on housing, healthcare, groceries, and everything else. Parents are doing everything they can to make this season special, and Washington is still stuck in the same old routines that leave too many people behind. That’s why our team is pushing hard this month. The challenges families are facing won’t pause for the holidays, and we can’t afford to either. We need the momentum to meet the moment. **[If you’re able, will you chip in $25 today to help us keep up the pace heading into Christmas?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120874525/587639647/2090747700?refcode=251208_sm_mass_l1&smount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWRlNzczMi03N2Q0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9r3gFfKgdAlNtNP5zgx1-NBV12dQYEGhTSx40SGWXTc=)** | [CHIP IN $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120874526/587639648/1375639745?amp;refcode=251208_sm_mass&amount=25&refcode=251208_sm_mass&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWRlNzczMi03N2Q0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9r3gFfKgdAlNtNP5zgx1-NBV12dQYEGhTSx40SGWXTc=)

clean_body: The women we train today become the leaders who change everything tomorrow. We hope you’ll stand with them. | = | Peter, = | = Across the country, our alums are shattering ceilings and reshaping what leadership looks like. = 🥇Abigail Spanberger became the first woman ever elected Governor of Virginia. 🥇Nuchette Black-Burke was re-elected in Windsor, Connecticut, and chosen by her colleagues to serve as mayor — the only Black woman mayor in the entire state. 🥇Erica Deuso became Pennsylvania’s first openly transgender mayor. 🥇Michelle Wu won re-election in Boston, continuing her leadership as the first woman and first Asian-American mayor in the city’s history. = Now we’re working to raise $50,000 before the end of the year to fund the next class of women who will break barriers, flip seats, and take on MAGA extremism in 2026 and beyond. = | = The women we train today become the leaders who change everything tomorrow. We hope you’ll stand with them. — Team Emerge = | = * | | = Paid for by Emerge America Emerge America 818 Connecticut Avenue NW Suite 450 Washington, DC 20006 United States | = =

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: FEC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
The stakes are high
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1985%2E791427%2ES6dsAY)
Friend, despite all of the chaos of the last week or so, we still have a campaign to run. So here’s the deal.
At the end of the month, we are up against our final FEC fundraising deadline of the year. The stakes are high.
That’s because after December 31st, we are legally required to file a fundraising report, which will then be published for everyone and anyone to see.
**This is a major test for our campaign.**
We have been under sustained attack from the far-right. They have gone after me, my nationality and religion, my Minneapolis community, and our entire movement with racist smears and dangerous, anti-immigrant fear-mongering.
After everything we’ve done to push back on these lies and attacks, **people will be watching** to see if our campaign still has widespread grassroots support.
If we can end the year with a HUGE amount of contributions from thousands and thousands of regular folks, we can send a message that this campaign can defeat any and all challengers.
But if we fall short, we send the opposite message. We signal to Trump, the far-right, Fox News, AIPAC, and the entire political establishment that this campaign is vulnerable. That they may be able to beat us with reckless and unhinged rhetoric.
So: **[Make a contribution to my campaign as we approach the end of the year. We need everyone who is committed to fighting back to do their part by chipping in. $10 or even $5 is enough to show that you stand with us here in Minneapolis.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec25.HnwiDc&refcode=em251208-1-180&t=2&akid=1985%2E791427%2ES6dsAY)
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_
| | **[Donate $10](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/771?c0=io-em-dec25.z7r62N&refcode=em251208-1-180&t=21&akid=1985%2E791427%2ES6dsAY)**

Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=30&refcode2=1985_791427_S6dsAY&akid=1985%2E791427%2ES6dsAY)**.

name: Jasmine Crockett
subject: It’s official: I’m running for Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Colorado
body:
Together, we’re going to flip Texas blue
| | | | | [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010_0xYY0hpL0pKhin0xH0MM8Gu8-Gb5zReBUuJFwFiT-FMUjeqAyWMhM2IEzMT59_2vxUeuM4mHMLQBa3O8vxKQGDd5XDDrSvobwH7wztKjHlTJVE8FZGMwwKufe1DUk7N0tEjRa9W70XQ0yPfHr4Mv8cHclAR3L8-q1acdrBdw_anyBZJuAqoLWKIKEGYuvpWd08g0WrRThdd3djDMSx82IEnBbHVkozGWdYL7s4n1rE93RTa8ZQ7g==&c=g8cPmAAuw1WFsC1ema3qQr6BAbmlRTo_SLoo3DQmn6RHTh3Wm4mDhw==&ch=qxpaf5XkWn_aVz7DBCd6mdBOM0hDF6ORKDPbLCgUDh9rtTgzvLU5_w==)
---
Y'all, it's Jasmine.
I'm reaching out with big news, and I wanted you to hear it from me first: I'm officially running for the United States Senate here in Texas.
Let me be clear: With our current wannabe dictator in the White House, I'm not launching this campaign to play nice. I'm doing it to fight -- because Texas deserves someone who doesn't back down when the bullies come for her. It deserves someone who fights back.
But to win this race, we'll have to take on Donald Trump, the Texas Republican political machine, and all of their shady special interest donors. And to be blunt, that won't come cheap.
[That's why I'm asking you to become one of my founding donors as we launch this historic grassroots campaign. I'm counting on your support now more than ever before so that we can hit the ground running and finally flip Texas blue. Will you answer the call by splitting a donation between my campaign and Fair Fight Colorado?](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010_0xYY0hpL0pKhin0xH0MM8Gu8-Gb5zReBUuJFwFiT-FMUjeqAyWMhM2IEzMT59_e1QmiNTfQ6Cj_HMOmHqkSFAyBxo2oVHRSViADUtNirBAzF5J1loqqTCMi6D25ihMVttnOtaZw3Ow7vFKTynMZ1dEaxHkEzyY8HkW5bTBqmn_ob3Vbws4Hl7Kfzxn5UZ9FeMQ3bUHXImSRJ8zv_EsfvVojToBhYgpoMBhO1KU6sc=&c=g8cPmAAuw1WFsC1ema3qQr6BAbmlRTo_SLoo3DQmn6RHTh3Wm4mDhw==&ch=qxpaf5XkWn_aVz7DBCd6mdBOM0hDF6ORKDPbLCgUDh9rtTgzvLU5_w==)

| Let me be clear: When there's a fight worth having, I don't flinch. I don't shrink. I don't back down.
Just ask the communities I've fought for as a civil-rights attorney, the defendants I've represented as a public defender, and the people of Dallas that I serve in Congress. I'm a lifelong fighter for justice.
So Donald Trump can run his mouth all he wants. All his attacks show is that he's terrified of what I represent -- and what I'm bringing to the Senate when we win this race: truth, accountability, and a future where power answers to the people.
[If you believe that insults won't silence us -- if you believe in a Texas that stands for justice, equity, and real representation -- I need you. We're launching a campaign to change the game. But real campaigns need real support. That's why I'd be so grateful if you could pitch in $10, $25, or more to help us hit the ground running. clean_body: Together, we’re going to flip Texas blue | | | | | == Y'all, it's Jasmine. I'm reaching out with big news, and I wanted you to hear it from me first: I'm officially running for the United States Senate here in Texas. Let me be clear: With our current wannabe dictator in the White House, I'm not launching this campaign to play nice. I'm doing it to fight -- because Texas deserves someone who doesn't back down when the bullies come for her. It deserves someone who fights back. But to win this race, we'll have to take on Donald Trump, the Texas Republican political machine, and all of their shady special interest donors. And to be blunt, that won't come cheap. == | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | Let me be clear: When there's a fight worth having, I don't flinch. I don't shrink. I don't back down. Just ask the communities I've fought for as a civil-rights attorney, the defendants I've represented as a public defender, and the people of Dallas that I serve in Congress. I'm a lifelong fighter for justice. So Donald Trump can run his mouth all he wants. All his attacks show is that he's terrified of what I represent -- and what I'm bringing to the Senate when we win this race: truth, accountability, and a future where power answers to the people. == | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | Thank you, Jasmine | | | | == | | == | Donate by mail: Fair Fight Colorado == == | Paid for by Fair Fight Colorado. Registered agent: David Scott Martinez. | | | | | | Fair Fight Colorado | 1601 Arapahoe Street FL 10 | Denver, CO 80202 US | |

name: David Hogg
subject: Taking on the status quo
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Lauren is running for Congress because she believes we need a new generation of leadership that isn’t afraid to take on the status quo.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251208-1&t=1&akid=2917%2E587540%2EWCfHrC)
Big news, Peter:
**Today, I’m proud to announce that Leaders We Deserve is endorsing Lauren Babb Tomlinson for US Congress in California’s 6th District.**
[](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251208_1_lauren.toR7kD&refcode=em20251208-2917&amount=5&t=2&akid=2917%2E587540%2EWCfHrC)
Lauren has been on the frontlines winning the tough fights to defend abortion rights, expand access to affordable healthcare, and protect workers’ rights.
**[If you’re ready to elect new leaders like Lauren who will step up in this critical moment, will you split a $5 contribution to her campaign and Leaders We Deserve today?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251208_1_lauren.toR7kD&refcode=em20251208-2917&amount=5&t=3&akid=2917%2E587540%2EWCfHrC)**
Here’s why we’re backing Lauren’s campaign, Peter:
She doesn’t fit the “typical” mold. Lauren is running as a working mom who knows what it means to raise a family while the cost of living continues to skyrocket. She’s been told to wait her turn and that she shouldn’t run for office — but she’s exactly the type of leader that people have been looking for.
On top of caring for her family, Lauren has spent her career advocating for her community as a Chief Public Affairs Officer for Planned Parenthood Mar Monte, the nation’s largest affiliate. She’s helped lead efforts to provide lifesaving care to thousands of people, expand access to healthcare in rural areas, and push back against Trump’s devastating federal cuts.
Lauren has also served in state leadership. As chair of the California Commission on the Status of Women and Girls, **she helped launch California’s first Women’s Economic Recovery Grant Program** during COVID-19 and advanced work on gender equity, economic well-being, and protections for survivors of domestic abuse.
It’s simple, Peter: Lauren is running for Congress because she believes we need a new generation of leadership that isn’t afraid to take on the status quo to get results for working-class people. **In Congress, she’ll fight for your family like it’s her own as she works to make life affordable, expand access to quality healthcare, improve wages for workers, and protect our rights.**
**[With that in mind, can we count on you to split $5 between Lauren’s campaign and Leaders We Deserve right now?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251208_1_lauren.toR7kD&refcode=em20251208-2917&amount=5&t=4&akid=2917%2E587540%2EWCfHrC)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251208_1_lauren.toR7kD&amount=5&refcode=em20251208-2917&t=23&akid=2917%2E587540%2EWCfHrC)**
Thank you for your support,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251208-1&t=24&refcode2=2917_587540_WCfHrC&akid=2917%2E587540%2EWCfHrC)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=25&akid=2917%2E587540%2EWCfHrC)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2917%2E587540%2EWCfHrC)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

This groundbreaking legislation would automatically register every eligible voter in every state and allow **_all Americans to hold Trump and his MAGA Republicans accountable during elections.**_

Our democracy works best when every voice is heard, and this Bill would remove barriers that keep millions from the ballot box.

**_But Trump and MAGA Republicans are already attacking it - because they know higher voter turnout means they will KEEP LOSING._**

So we're launching an urgent 24-hour petition to show MASSIVE grassroots support for Sen. Klobuchar's bill. [**_Sign our petition to help us reach 1,000 signatures in your state before midnight!_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70816?t=6&akid=23704%2E4449941%2EcSqj02)

subject: PROFOUND insights from C.S. Lewis
body:
C.S. Lewis is one of my favorite authors, full stop.

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/TJBQPw2p1VT6C3NwbgJVLOdR21aOoZp9AI6KGHl9b-3qFIiH_L2d4QMYCGR9_gO-XVeKzXm5QgY19RLtBhxerBSioqy12mvwLt0fw6-ULz5nic_8MDX4dUbowhvo-U1eVV4FOcxzDn1TPs04mpbsZdpYNlaLFVIWV9J2_xJXD4udwgHmdb4Y_ApV/xIjxpKezpLMwgUsIj7QFQwKPFnTRBTEO/15)_
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/dW8Em0KTwzdUd52YkFq7P09FhCi48n9NxdZktAORi8ECZSlKrgks47xKNphwR30HFQORa8YL7QfzaH7hBUmysAL_LB0IiXCJ7ouoJxSasJIEzUDK4CYGbBQpFmraYRhYcEt-s_9LeEhRaIfM03IP4J6YIKt9gC0DH5ykxZdjY6k-wy4eEp6hF1qLAJLkiq-qKs8iItgP_O1gdsTvrmac8AI6D83AGUdxVlAF1PZ88EaiPqspesNLC8MW0SPXtJ5vt6O5O8mJN1bOXoIsKYRfKrQS6TDCbv4EXqNe8I-GaBiMdbTryxfBIhV1gMdvaHKLelrEFZJ83ddgkJAYG2r8QpOLHOulzj44lL8Ht5bvX2qHEZU65yLzPFBt2As1ONdlkwBW_kXIbJnCoRTtfi5J35VPPHIWh22xJgfLylfFPyitL-a1Y_NOhAXmCgbtWTT4I4XWZVLegE7X8j3vySGEve6LmQt5VLGPckmEwuoo4Wlj8rh2tifw-u9cCmnnILcv6oXq565wqD02PsMenNpLkEeyzdgUp0996bCN0H6unrunu0U1wknBoyv3zzze8bNDJaANs07jUjhQaytllkAhmrqzwUmKNEm6nsoz1tjGOm_Vf5sF8M_idh9jxTv3CdgpyuK_5oLvsoyK5s5s9Z328VYoRCLQagGc-TIUupKRtwcNMhFaWMM0HhZzq29z00fY4na4eTtZqBPHJTT0-NSBMZ5-xTF8-GDIibJci846cH_PEE84UFkCir49MbFJPw8FXV73e2r4I69ARgRQW6Yx/-mESPaJM1M8K6wsHKnFR-lIyug6XnEcK/15)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

C.S. Lewis is one of my favorite authors, full stop.

His writings were essential in deepening my faith in God and my understanding of the Bible. Maybe, since you opened my email, he has helped you, too.

Why are Lewis's words so powerful?

It's because he was a master at addressing life's most important questions. His vivid language is delightful and captivating to read.

Lewis's signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired so many skeptics to **become** believers and even more Christians to renew and deepen their faith. He is certainly the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

To help you learn more about Lewis's works related to Christianity, we produced a powerful, free course, "**C.S. Lewis on Christianity** ," which you can now own on DVD absolutely free.

**Claim your FREE DVD box set of "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" using this secure link:**

Hi folks, it’s
Jon.

If you’ve been considering chipping in to my reelection campaign, now’s

Here’s the deal: Republicans have been spending big in Georgia ... and much
earlier than usual. They’re already running ads to attack me and lie about
my record because they know flipping this Democratic Senate seat is their
best chance to lock in a pro-MAGA Senate majority for the long-term.

There’s no doubt about it: I’m the most vulnerable Senator on the ballot
in the midterm elections.

But I have you.

Together, we’ve built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in
Senate campaign history, and in 2021 that organization won Georgia and the
Senate majority.

Now, I need you more than ever: I am literally MAGA’s #1 target.

Yes, this election will be tough.

clean_body: [ ]Jon Ossoff Hi folks, it’s Jon. If you’ve been considering chipping in to my reelection campaign, now’s the time. I’ll explain more in just a moment, but if you’re ready to join the fight right now, you can split a donation between my reelection campaign and Chris Pappas here: [ ] Here’s the deal: Republicans have been spending big in Georgia ... and much earlier than usual. They’re already running ads to attack me and lie about my record because they know flipping this Democratic Senate seat is their best chance to lock in a pro-MAGA Senate majority for the long-term. There’s no doubt about it: I’m the most vulnerable Senator on the ballot in the midterm elections. But I have you. Together, we’ve built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history, and in 2021 that organization won Georgia and the Senate majority. Now, I need you more than ever: I am literally MAGA’s #1 target. Yes, this election will be tough. But we know how to win tough fights. We’ve done it before. Let’s do it again. So if you can, please chip in any amount to my campaign and Chris Pappas today. Here’s the link again: [ ] Thank you, Jon You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

name: Mark Kelly
subject: My decision.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now.
#

Hey everybody, it’s Mark Kelly.
Seven years ago, I was making a decision about whether I was going to run for the Senate.
I knew it would be a lot of work. A lot of time away from home. A lot of time away from family. I knew it wouldn’t be easy.
But after two years of Donald Trump and a Republican-held Senate doing just about everything he wanted, I knew I couldn’t sit on the sidelines. I had to do something.
So, I ran. And, somehow, we won. And then we had to turn around and run all over again to win a full term after that. But thanks to your support, we won that one, too.
I’m grateful every day that I get to wake up, walk out the door, and defend our people, our democracy, and our Constitution. It’s one of the greatest honors of my life. And I’ve never forgotten that I wouldn’t be here without your help.
We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now.
After everything you’ve already done for me, I shouldn’t have to ask you for more. But that’s what I need to do.
[**I’m asking you to make a donation, and I hope you know that I wouldn’t be asking if this wasn’t important.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=liftoff-pac-em-25/.wDfCNk&refcode=em251208-2-1mil&t=1&akid=6284%2E6688874%2Ep6UHfo)

Thank you.
Mark

| | Hi Peter,

My name is Lauren Toncich -- and for the past seven years, I've helped lead the team behind the curtain at every Turning Point USA event.

Making sure the lights hit at the right moment, the music is pumping through the crowd, and tens of thousands of people walk into something unforgettable.

I've never emailed you directly before.

But if you've ever seen the opening night of AmericaFest... felt the electricity of a Student Action Summit crowd... or watched one of our massive rallies ignite a room...

Then you've witnessed the kind of energy Charlie dreamed of -- brought to life by our incredible events team.
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=06b5d96e4a544034a784296604c6e061&_e=2B76y483UfpZ6tYdTQxYuJzcTCfU5fDUjccotEviKPmt64mYtX_mVb8sqU1YPsDzdw1hUs-uw2-UikBRSvpXepvLJZ7S58j-PSAZA6f1PvbvnWKJkAfFuotMINJMXrO67tbSpeRtYkqDl8oW4wZd1jPaVjJTwe3HYsGJYIss2Z75uB4vtcyuRdVe79jELAUbcAnXSrss2hGvXbePuzW-qgApacDuWptfVS0UYMcCaAcaqIQTk0ScXVF_CszWNcsRt0gtBUOp52ChbTmpO9hKPfqm1GyB3SlItATcu0ZcDpd1mu08AVn07-zgf6oaCn-CVP4GVvRbqurW2wlKK5Cjep6DUtVoFbgGc_s_xdguMcokFZ_vzBVnsVgVz1p-Ydu0O-5oW9oDnr7Eg0dRpBsdw7Ul8rx9KQNyTokwA7Y2mwdaIwDFIJbDauVMZdc-tTdO0KTL__5lZSHW-_kA78rbjA1XqBrn9CUu8rzLnieBpqczQ6kF_BO3wESoFa_GuH8JR5NtKHcj4-9FMhK6CviZaRJuWsdCpJY0SeN_38lLyh9oY0JJaVjgC9o7Pxmu3Gs6pypdL24ZKIgd05YSSpGkZAZiE72H9UYGsx20VRbeFVMzrJjchRTubXwwPjdVIwwpyld1yjJUSYNuLE94C91BdcJjexZmHc8tUU93lGihwzyoRBdXMvRn94XRIvdxh1QK)
---
_Above: That 's me with Charlie, backstage at last year's AmFest making sure every detail was perfect before showtime. _
---
At the heart of every single Turning Point event is this one truth: _Young Americans deserve a stage worthy of the fight they 're in. _

**And AmericaFest -- especially this year -- is our most important stage of all. **

**This December 18 -21 in Phoenix, thousands of students will walk into the most powerful conservative gathering in America. **

It will be our first AmFest without Charlie.

This is the stage he built -- with vision, grit, and sky-high standards.

Charlie poured everything into these events, because he believed students deserved more than beige ballrooms and lazy lectures.

He believed they needed to _FEEL_ the mission -- That they were part of something unstoppable... something big enough to change the world.

Backstage, I can still hear him directing the show: _" Louder music... more sparks... bigger energy... how full are we looking?" _

Not because he wanted flash for the sake of flash...

But because he knew energy moves people. Environments shape conviction.

_And atmosphere matters when you 're calling students into the fight of their lives. _
---

This year's AmFest?

Making sure the lights hit at the right moment, the music is pumping through the crowd, and tens of thousands of people walk into something unforgettable. I've never emailed you directly before. But if you've ever seen the opening night of AmericaFest... felt the electricity of a Student Action Summit crowd... or watched one of our massive rallies ignite a room... Then you've witnessed the kind of energy Charlie dreamed of -- brought to life by our incredible events team. Above: That 's me with Charlie, backstage at last year's AmFest making sure every detail was perfect before showtime. This is the stage he built -- with vision, grit, and sky-high standards. He believed they needed to FEEL the mission -- That they were part of something unstoppable... something big enough to change the world. Backstage, I can still hear him directing the show: " Louder music... more sparks... bigger energy... how full are we looking?" Not because he wanted flash for the sake of flash... We want every student walking out of AmFest equipped for the battlefield they're stepping into. Peter, that 's where you can make a difference. Every year, I see it firsthand: Students walk in with doubts, with fears, with barely enough money to afford the flight. They walk out with confidence, connection, and a new sense of calling. I've seen them go home and start chapters. I've seen them run for office. Many tell me -- even years later, that this one event changed everything. So no -- I'm not just asking you to sponsor an "event." I 'm asking you to help change the trajectory of a young patriot. Peter, I know what Charlie would want right now. He'd want every seat filled. | Hey West Michigan,

I am headed back to DC this week, ready to fight hard to lower costs and put money back in people’s pockets.

We have just three weeks left in session until the end of the year, and I’m making use of every single day.

With the year rounding to a close, that means we have a short window left to hit our final FEC fundraising deadline of 2025 — and it’s a big one.

This report is public. It’s what national groups, pundits, and yes, Republican operatives will use to judge the strength of our campaign. We have the momentum. But we need to post a strong number to prove it.

Republicans will do whatever it takes to cling to their razor-thin majority. We have to prove we have the resources and what it takes to stop them.

[_**If you’re able, will you chip in today so we can take back the House next year?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120875907/587644394/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-12-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTFkNjBlZi03YmQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IjGV1yVE5YAYcoSytTBWgoRKT6k4PA5f7r6BSy1U-AY=)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: “I welcome their hatred”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
We need the courage to shake off any instinct to show how eager we are to compromise

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2726%2E4032634%2EJOnykA)
---
During Trump’s presidential campaign, he talked a big game about helping working people. He spoke to the economic pains that families were feeling. He said that the system is “rigged” every day. Now that he’s president, has he done anything to actually make that problem better? Nope – Trump has further rigged the economy in favor of the wealthy and well-connected. In reality, he has surrounded himself with lobbyists, billionaires, and grifters who feed off government favors. In many cases, these special interests even run the government themselves — abusing their power and the public’s trust to scratch each other’s backs and turn their billions into hundreds of billions more. **In reality, Republicans passed a bill that takes meals away from hungry children and seniors, strips health care from millions, and marks the largest transfer of wealth from the poor to the rich in our history. They smiled, clapped, and cheered when it was signed into law.** In reality, Trump has done everything he can to tip the economic scales toward billionaires and corporations even more than they already were. He’s taken every opportunity to stir up racial hatred in this country and place the blame for his economy on vulnerable people. That’s his whole political strategy. What can we do about it? Democrats must earn back the trust of working people to chart a different direction for our country. And we do that by embracing bold economic policies that will make a real difference in the lives of working people. We know these ideas are popular. American voters showed up in force for Democrats who unapologetically ran on aggressive affordability agendas — like in New York City, Virginia, and New Jersey. We’ve got to keep championing those ideas and not shy away because we’re afraid of upsetting corporate billionaires. For inspiration, I think back to Franklin Roosevelt. When FDR said he would take on corporations and Wall Street, he didn’t mince words. He called out the “privileged princes” and “economic royalty” running corporate America. And when the titans of commerce went after him with vicious attacks, he didn’t back down. Instead he declared, “I welcome their hatred.” What did we get out of this approach? Social Security. Unemployment insurance. Abolition of child labor. Minimum wage. The right to join a union. Even the very existence of the weekend. **All we need today is that courage. Courage to stand up to billionaire and corporate donors. Courage to make the wealthiest and most powerful people in this country a little uncomfortable. Courage to shake off any instinct to show how eager we are to compromise and stand by a half-baked plan.** At every turn, Democrats need to expose the hypocrisy between what Trump says he’ll do for working families, and what he actually does for billionaires and corporations. We must speak to the real economic anxieties that families are feeling right now, and have the courage to fight for the policies that will make their lives easier — even if cynics say it’ll never happen. And we need to be unwavering when it comes to standing up for immigrant families, trans people, patients seeking an abortion, and everyone else who will be targeted by this administration. I know times are hard right now, and things feel scary. That is the point: Donald Trump and the Republicans want us to feel powerless, get tired, and give up. But the political position we’re in is not permanent. America does not have to be this way. Every step toward progress in American history came after the darkness of defeat. Abolitionists, suffragists, Dreamers, advocates for marriage equality, and marchers for civil rights behind Dr. King all faced impossible odds, but they persisted, and they won. Right now, a clear majority of Americans disapprove of what Trump is doing — the only president who has ever been less popular is Donald Trump in his first term. The razor-thin majority that lets Republicans control the House was decided by a little more than 7,000 votes. That’s certainly no mandate. So next year, a majority of Americans will have the chance to speak up and loudly reject Republicans in Congress in the midterm elections. And that’s a chance we can’t afford to waste with half-measures and nibbling around the edges. [**I promise you: I am going to do everything in my power to ensure that Democrats make the right choices when it comes to our priorities and our economic policies. And I’m going to fight every day to resist the far-right and billionaire agenda that harms so many people. If you believe in this fight, please pitch in $28 or anything you can so we can succeed in 2026.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3284?amount=28&t=8&akid=2726%2E4032634%2EJOnykA)

clean_body: Our momentum is their nightmare. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = = The warning signs are FLASHING for Republicans, Peter. Last month, Democrats Peter Hubbard and Dr. Alicia Johnson flipped two Georgia Public Service Commission seats — our first non-federal statewide wins here in 20 years. You know it's a big deal because Trump's own right-hand man, Steve Bannon, is publicly worried. He saw our PSC results and realized their MAGA agenda is in deep trouble. But here’s the thing: that doesn’t mean they’ll just give up on Georgia. It means the exact opposite. They’re going to double down and flood our state with millions of dollars , all in a desperate effort to stop our momentum and flip our Senate seat. We can't let them, Peter. We never say this, but Steve Bannon is right: the midterms start NOW. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = — Georgia Dems | = Help Elect Georgia Democrats. Peter, far-right extremism is threatening public education. While hate groups like Moms for Liberty face setbacks, their heavily financed campaign to dismantle our schools, ban books and inject far-right agendas into public education shows no sign of relenting. Censorship is the evidence: radical groups have pushed nearly 23,000 book bans across 45 states since 2021, according to PEN America. This wave of removal is so severe that never before in the life of any living American have so many books been systematically removed from school libraries. This unprecedented attack on education restricts students’ freedom to learn and aggressively silences marginalized voices, especially LGBTQ+ students. _They prioritize bigotry over democracy._ **We must defend the frontline. The Six PAC and Local Democracy Project are teaming up to deliver a two-part defense:**
1. **The Six PAC:** Funds brave, pro-public education candidates to win key school board seats.
2. **Local Democracy Project:** Trains and supports candidates and organizes communities to expose the extremist agenda and hold elected officials accountable.

**Your split donation ensures we fight this battle on both the electoral and organizing fronts. Help us protect our students and local democracy.** [**Split your donation today to fight book bans and extremism today!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtwcZePaDDOrOfZZjcQJYaoDx3IoFu98jtdhf9qCCw6dIxR0go0VTDoVFsAoroDI17ZXbxtE8J_Lqs60KT5DMCq8fZjGqNSaxOTop0ILj4UGE3nd2KFcG2RINTO7_euFt73Xmen-RTRCcy2-74HGtrMTAUVwuVW47k7NjHXQU8BYEIRwS3Qmms-2AukWGhn9QBXQRRs37EzGANBYZg75CvcEKHdz7B6rLS4s5gksYsJctEvq69XpboLgxSCS5gGEnNMt0ZYtvhk5cN6xbwyCYLGJF01sHsursbBHrqkZkE1sKtZo7WoHg8D-CgsV92X8Xf62puFXhEROuf_wfeqsSHU_DE3TtDFgyOk-xM-PqmXirHt-R1JJVPMdVpbG_YHBLPJl5Nz67i5hmiWNPGLE2g_mZwRMpcBTxBu6IgOlbaH-Q/4m9/fRaPH7xZTtGZ05-ktvASww/h2/h001.669F3KUQJIw3KzK6cn9d21XiWfsNMFfYyl5whgF_E7w) **** [SPLIT A DONATION

body:
I want to walk into 2026 with momentum, confidence, and a war chest that reflects the strength of this team. |
---

Fellow Patriot,

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Your rights come first
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=1105%2E181023%2EuQFaPO)
Friend,
As Donald Trump and his Republican cronies try to deny Americans their right to vote, here’s my message to them:
**I won’t let _anyone_ silence the voices of millions of citizens who deserve to be heard.**
**[I’ll explain more, but first: Will you stand with me in support of voting rights and against Trump’s harmful _SAVE Act_ by signing my team’s petition today? ](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/save-act-2512?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251208_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=1105%2E181023%2EuQFaPO)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/save-act-2512?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251208_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=1105%2E181023%2EuQFaPO)
---
President Trump continues pulling every lever he can to deny American citizens their constitutional right to vote — but the courts blocked him. But now he is re-upping calls for the United States Senate to pass the _SAVE Act_ , which would block millions of Americans from casting their ballots in future elections.
The _SAVE Act_ would create confusion for active-duty troops — and the more than 2.2 million women in Michigan whose married names are not the same name on their birth certificates — and make them jump through complicated hoops to cast their ballot, effectively stripping them of their right to vote.
Protecting that right is one of my top priorities as secretary of state. And I’m proud that during my tenure we held the highest turnout and most secure, transparent elections in Michigan’s history.
But the President and his allies are trying to undo all of our progress — **not because they care about improving elections, but because they want to rig the system and make it easier for them to win.**
**[I’m not afraid to stand up to bullies, and I will take on anyone who tries to take away your constitutionally guaranteed rights and freedoms. Join me in fighting against the _SAVE Act_ by adding your name to my petition today >>](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/save-act-2512?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251208_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1105%2E181023%2EuQFaPO)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/save-act-2512?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251208_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1105%2E181023%2EuQFaPO)
---
As the next governor of Michigan, I can promise you that I will always fight to defend our rights from any bully — no matter how powerful — who tries to take them away.
Thank you,
Jocelyn

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you.
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-jbmi/?t=6&akid=1105%2E181023%2EuQFaPO)

PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR

23133 Woodward Ave, Number 116,
Ferndale, MI 48220

clean_body: President Trump requests your presence in the 47th President Founders Club. | | | | EXCLUSIVE OFFER FROM THE DESK OF DONALD J. TRUMP Dear Patriot, President Trump requests your presence in the 47th President Founders Club. You’re not asleep! But yes, most people would dream of receiving an email like this one. I personally created the 47th President Founders Club for one reason only: To permanently honor the patriots who founded and carried the entire MAGA movement from Day One! The ones who never wavered, never surrendered, and refused to let them destroy our country twice. I had my team pull the very best files, millions of patriot names, and I went through them myself. Your name rose straight to the top. ** That’s why I’m personally inviting you to become a Charter Member of my 47th President Founders Club. Only 4,700 spots exist in the entire country. I’m holding one for you! ** Don’t miss your shot to stand with the patriots who made the greatest comeback in American history. Your name could be one of them. I am counting on you. Don’t let me down. Thank you and God bless you, President Trump | | | | | | | | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120877199/587648447/742162287?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.08_Annie-Outraised_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmYzYzY4OS04MGQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oiK1EFRxRydaYYG92SeufsLdF4k_Zq_Q_wLgZdvV-VQ=) Team, I wanted you to hear it directly from me: Our fundraising numbers for last quarter became public and **_we outraised Lindsey Graham!_**

**In fact, this grassroots team raised more in just one month than Lindsey Graham did from individuals the entire quarter with an average donation of less than $30!**

Lindsey Graham has been raising money for more than half my life, cozying up to millionaires and corporate special interests, and yet we’re still crushing him, and I know that with this team behind me we can continue. (Clearly those backroom deals in Washington aren't holding up like they used to!).

Before deciding to run for office a few years ago, the only money I ever remember raising was from selling Girl Scout cookies. And now, here we are, putting Lindsey Graham’s feet to the fire all while I continue to raise my kids and work full time as a pediatrician.

Because of you, our message is loud and clear – Lindsey Graham’s time in the Senate is up, and South Carolinians are ready for leaders who put them first.

**But the truth is that Lindsey had a 25 year head start on fundraising – so he still has a lot more in the bank than us.**

[**We’ve proven that we have the momentum behind us, but if we’re going to send Linsey packing once and for all, I need your support. | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

clean_body: Just the truck—stationary at first—before it initiated autonomous movement.| | | | December 08 | | | | | Media Is Mocking Elon, But Wait Until They See This Demo | | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." name: Eleanor Baumgartner
subject: Help Us Celebrate Michael’s Birthday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www
body:
Saturday December 13 we will be celebrating a big milestone - Michael turning 50!

| | | | | |
---
| |

**This Saturday December 13th we will be celebrating a big milestone - Michael turning 50!**
The children and I are extremely proud of the work that Michael is doing in Congress, and we know how much Eastern Washington means to him. From growing up in Palouse wheat country, attending high school in Spokane and college at WSU, to working overseas in Iraq and Afghanistan - Michael has always found his way back home. This first year in Congress has been very busy - in DC and at home - and each day I’ve appreciated Michael’s thoughtfulness, civility, integrity and great love for America.
Michael is more determined than ever to keep fighting to lower costs for families, stop crime, pass responsible budgets, and to defend the Eastern Washington way of life. But this race will be competitive, and your support right now is crucial.
If you’re able, would you consider a [**$50 gift in honor of his 50th birthday**](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=b864c65393&e=5a45b9550e) (or any amount meaningful to you)?
🎁 [Chip in $50 for Michael’s 50th](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=5333e8dbe3&e=5a45b9550e)
🎁 [Chip in $25](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=9e48ecdc32&e=5a45b9550e)
🎁 [Chip in $100](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=4d96f01ea6&e=5a45b9550e)
🎁 [Give another amount](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=1c7cdc62d2&e=5a45b9550e)
Your generosity keeps Michael focused on doing the job you elected him to do — not endless fundraising. And it truly means the world to our family.
**If you’d like to say “Happy Birthday” in person** , we _are_ hosting a Campaign Christmas Open House the evening of December 13th in Spokane. It’s not a birthday party — just a warm gathering where supporters can stop by. Details are in the attached invite, and the **4:30 PM main event is $50/person**. We’d love to see you there. Click[ ](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=04c174631d&e=5a45b9550e)[here](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=98086b2695&e=5a45b9550e) to RSVP!
Thank you for your friendship and for being part of this journey! Warmly, Eleanor Baumgartner

name: DC Daily Journal
subject: The long roots of America’s political divide
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *

| | | | [](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/8e2155c356c94e0bb3dbc31cce037882-bd96485e4d4d4e5886bb2dac25dfc314/63)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

In recent decades, leaders across the political spectrum embraced a familiar set of priorities: global trade, open markets, and rapid social change.

But as factories closed, borders blurred, and entire communities were left behind, many Americans—particularly in the heartland—began to feel that national priorities no longer reflected their values or interests.
---
|
[](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/8e2155c356c94e0bb3dbc31cce037882-bd96485e4d4d4e5886bb2dac25dfc314/63)
---
| | This shift didn’t happen overnight. And its origins reach further back than most realize.

In one of our most popular free eBooks, _Dueling Populisms_ , historian and Hoover Senior Fellow Victor Davis Hanson draws a powerful connection between today’s unrest and centuries of political upheaval. And I’d like to send you a digital copy.

Inside, you’ll uncover:
* Why two rival populisms are rising at the same time—and why both reject the status quo
* What ancient revolts can teach us about our own political realignment
* How elites ignored the heartland for too long—and what the backlash tells us

Victor Davis Hanson brings his expertise in classical history and military affairs to bear on a question that remains central: What will be the response when millions of citizens feel elites have written them off?

Download your free copy of Dueling Populisms here:
👉 [Get Your Free eBook](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/8e2155c356c94e0bb3dbc31cce037882-bd96485e4d4d4e5886bb2dac25dfc314/63) Best,
Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University
With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world.

name: Still bad news (via VPP)
subject: The stakes couldn’t be higher to pass the No Kings Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
If we don’t act now, Trump gets EVERYTHING he wants.
| | **Donations are _still_ plummeting and we have nowhere else to turn...** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/98532?t=6&akid=22143%2E878179%2EwerlJq) | [WE CAN’T LIMIT OUR MOMENTUM TO A SINGLE DAY. RUSH $7 TO TELL DONALD TRUMP THERE ARE NO KINGS IN AMERICA >>](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/98532?t=7&akid=22143%2E878179%2EwerlJq)
---
The stakes could NOT be higher, friend:

→ Trump is militarizing our cities and threatening Democrats with arrest.
→ He’s going after every single news outlet and trying to control the press.

Fellow Conservative,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: **Navy SEALs.**

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

clean_body: They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. | Fellow Conservative, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Fellow Conservative to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! -> If the media wants to attack us for having a "warrior mentality" - the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... -> If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump's MAGA movement - the movement that says we can make America great... -> If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste - which has been exposed by Trump's DOGE department... ...Then they don't understand WHY Donald J. Trump and ALL of us were elected! As SEALs, we all shoot straight with each other. We're going to shoot straight with you, too: This hit piece was horsesht and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us. If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you. Thank you so much for your time, Tim Sheehy Eli Crane Ryan Zinke Three Navy SEALs Serving in Congress | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Use of Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

clean_body: Your invitation from Trump might rot soon. Accept asap! | | | | EXCLUSIVE OFFER FROM THE DESK OF DONALD J. TRUMP Dear Patriot, President Trump requests your presence in the 47th President Founders Club. You’re not asleep! But yes, most people would dream of receiving an email like this one. I personally created the 47th President Founders Club for one reason only: To permanently honor the patriots who founded and carried the entire MAGA movement from Day One! The ones who never wavered, never surrendered, and refused to let them destroy our country twice. I had my team pull the very best files, millions of patriot names, and I went through them myself. Your name rose straight to the top. ** That’s why I’m personally inviting you to become a Charter Member of my 47th President Founders Club. Only 4,700 spots exist in the entire country. I’m holding one for you! ** Don’t miss your shot to stand with the patriots who made the greatest comeback in American history. Your name could be one of them. I am counting on you. Don’t let me down. Thank you and God bless you, President Trump | | | | | | | | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
