**_The Washington Post: “EPA to abandon air pollution rule that would prevent thousands of U.S. deaths”_** **[Scientists warn this decision will mean dirtier air, more asthma attacks, and thousands of preventable deaths. Trump’s EPA is _knowingly_ putting our lives at risk. We need every person reading this email to sign our emergency petition to demand Congress stop Trump’s fossil fuel giveaway >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120878210/587652376/-737942839?source=email&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjane-bax-email-ja%3Frefcode%3Dea.c86ef525-83d4-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa%26ms%3Dea.c86ef525-83d4-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&refcode=ea.c86ef525-83d4-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.c86ef525-83d4-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4NmVmNTI1LTgzZDQtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=C5XLHv2apfLPxLxpgEh-vpikyOLdg1KNC_1nS5AXkLE=&emci=abba4dad-0ed2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=c86ef525-83d4-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=4823105)** | [**CONDEMN TRUMP’S FOSSIL FUEL GIVEAWAY →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120878211/587652377/-737942839?source=email&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjane-bax-email-ja%3Frefcode%3Dea.c86ef525-83d4-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa%26ms%3Dea.c86ef525-83d4-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&refcode=ea.c86ef525-83d4-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.c86ef525-83d4-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4NmVmNTI1LTgzZDQtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=C5XLHv2apfLPxLxpgEh-vpikyOLdg1KNC_1nS5AXkLE=&emci=abba4dad-0ed2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=c86ef525-83d4-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=4823105)

* * *
We’ve come to expect the worst from the Trump administration. But even for them, undoing a rule designed solely to _save human lives_ crosses a terrifying line. Here’s what you need to know:
**_The situation:_** Trump’s EPA is gutting a Biden-era protection that limits fine-particle pollution — microscopic soot that comes from oil refineries, power plants, and vehicles. **This pollution invades the bloodstream and leads to heart attacks, strokes, lung cancer, and asthma.**
**_Why it matters:_** The Biden administration strengthened these protections to finally address the pollution burden placed on vulnerable communities who have been breathing dirty air for generations. The benefits were undeniable, and the science was clear.
**_What the data shows:_**_The EPA's own analysis showed this rule would prevent**4,500 premature deaths by 2032.**_
But fossil fuel companies and Republican attorneys general fought to stop it. And Trump’s EPA just sided with them by refusing to defend these life-saving protections in court.
Think about what this means for the children walking to school, breathing toxic air. Seniors whose lungs can’t withstand another spike in pollution. Communities living next to refineries and highways are forced to inhale soot day after day.
This isn’t just another policy rollback. For some of these frontline communities, it’s life or death.
**And it’s exactly why JanePAC fights to elect climate champions who will stand up to Donald Trump’s toxic agenda — and why your voice matters in these crucial moments.**
**[We're gathering as many signatures as we possibly can before the end of today from Cresco and around the country. Will you join them and tell Congress to step in and stop Donald Trump’s fossil fuel giveaway? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120878212/587652378/-737942839?source=email&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjane-bax-email-ja%3Frefcode%3Dea.c86ef525-83d4-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa%26ms%3Dea.c86ef525-83d4-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&refcode=ea.c86ef525-83d4-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.c86ef525-83d4-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4NmVmNTI1LTgzZDQtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=C5XLHv2apfLPxLxpgEh-vpikyOLdg1KNC_1nS5AXkLE=&emci=abba4dad-0ed2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=c86ef525-83d4-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=4823105)**

clean_body: We refuse to stay silent about this. | The Washington Post: “EPA to abandon air pollution rule that would prevent thousands of U.S. deaths” | We’ve come to expect the worst from the Trump administration. But even for them, undoing a rule designed solely to save human lives crosses a terrifying line. Here’s what you need to know: The situation: Trump’s EPA is gutting a Biden-era protection that limits fine-particle pollution — microscopic soot that comes from oil refineries, power plants, and vehicles. This pollution invades the bloodstream and leads to heart attacks, strokes, lung cancer, and asthma. Why it matters: The Biden administration strengthened these protections to finally address the pollution burden placed on vulnerable communities who have been breathing dirty air for generations. The benefits were undeniable, and the science was clear. What the data shows:The EPA's own analysis showed this rule would prevent4,500 premature deaths by 2032. But fossil fuel companies and Republican attorneys general fought to stop it. And Trump’s EPA just sided with them by refusing to defend these life-saving protections in court. Think about what this means for the children walking to school, breathing toxic air. Seniors whose lungs can’t withstand another spike in pollution. Communities living next to refineries and highways are forced to inhale soot day after day. This isn’t just another policy rollback. For some of these frontline communities, it’s life or death. And it’s exactly why JanePAC fights to elect climate champions who will stand up to Donald Trump’s toxic agenda — and why your voice matters in these crucial moments. Let’s do this. Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

Y'all, it's Jasmine. I'm reaching out with big news, and I wanted you to hear it from me first: **I 'm officially running for the United States Senate here in Texas.** Let me be clear: With our current wannabe dictator in the White House, I'm not launching this campaign to play nice. **I 'm doing it to fight -- because Texas deserves someone who doesn't back down when the bullies come for her. ****_It deserves someone who fights back._** But to win this race, we'll have to take on Donald Trump, the Texas Republican political machine, and all of their shady special interest donors. _And to be blunt, that won 't come cheap._ [**That 's why I'm asking you to become one of my founding donors as we launch this historic grassroots campaign. I'm counting on your support now more than ever before so that we can hit the ground running and finally flip Texas blue. Will you answer the call by splitting a donation between my campaign and Shawn Harris?**](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/YfkmiQlRINNxP85gSpzdzQ~~/AAPPABA~/vs5DNYm2vPlSmh5WAbmoyMuiqeL7943RxPlEguUo9AG9bwu1YFG_0hOA1YArxkzq58CR08Wdg55dMY2tANwb881UYx5tZYI0yvleL1RZfaotz43KdIidB1qbYwDVlnVvp_NLaw3mL7NWLVJFznjA4UXVq9_SyWHtghNKVdzvt5-wL8d4sBvOho4ETxLqrW1a4k5Lj9XE08UZ-9f74oN5FcVv1QV2mDD28Z1a0paMp_RlJRzzxiDqQFx2wHhMSl8_EmltOUZOtr_Tb93XOsXISrHRm6fjmK0ux8pqbtWBbGuzz-gLTzCpyY76tseldyWEoG76xAsJFCTX1G4_E5ph-w~~)

Let me be clear: **When there 's a fight worth having, I don't flinch. I don't shrink.****_I don 't back down._** Just ask the communities I've fought for as a civil-rights attorney, the defendants I've represented as a public defender, and the people of Dallas that I serve in Congress. **I 'm a lifelong fighter for justice.** So Donald Trump can run his mouth all he wants. All his attacks show is that he's terrified of what I represent -- and what I'm bringing to the Senate when we win this race: **truth, accountability, and a future where power answers to the people.** [**If you believe that insults won 't silence us -- if you believe in a Texas that stands for justice, equity, and real representation -- I need you. We're launching a campaign to change the game. But real campaigns need real support. That's why I'd be so grateful if you could pitch in $10, $25, or more to help us hit the ground running. Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Shawn Harris?**](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/YfkmiQlRINNxP85gSpzdzQ~~/AAPPABA~/vs5DNYm2vPlSmh5WAbmoyMuiqeL7943RxPlEguUo9AG9bwu1YFG_0hOA1YArxkzq58CR08Wdg55dMY2tANwb881UYx5tZYI0yvleL1RZfaotz43KdIidB1qbYwDVlnVvp_NLaw3mL7NWLVJFznjA4UXVq9_SyWHtghNKVdzvt5-wL8d4sBvOho4ETxLqrW1a4k5Lj9XE08UZ-9f74oN5FcVv1QV2mDD28Z1a0paMp_RlJRzzxiDqQFx2wHhMSl8_EmltOUZOtr_Tb93XOsXISrHRm6fjmK0ux8pqbtWBbGuzz-gLTzCpyY76tseldyWEoG76xAsJFCTX1G4_E5ph-w~~) Thank you, Jasmine Crockett

He disclosed sensitive military plans in an unsecured group chat. He kicked journalists OUT of the Pentagon for asking questions he doesn't like. He's targeting Senator Mark Kelly. And now, legal experts say he may have committed war crimes.

Hegseth's leadership has been reckless, politically-motivated, and dangerous -- and even Senate Republicans are starting to worry about his performance. But we need to confirm what Democrats think, so **we've launched an URGENT Poll to hear from you by MIDNIGHT:**

name: Senator Jennifer Boysko
subject: Boysko Bulletin: Session Prep - Getting Ready for Richmond
body:
| | |
---
**Boysko Bulletin: ****Session Prep - Getting Ready for Richmond**
---
Dear Peter, As promised during the 2025 elections, the incoming Spanberger Administration, House, and Senate Democrats will be prioritizing policies that make life more affordable, strengthen economic stability, and ensure every Virginian has access to the tools they need to build a secure future. This early action reflects months of outreach, community conversations, and feedback from Virginians who are calling for meaningful relief and long-term solutions. Voters will see bills pertaining to housing affordability, economic fairness, and health and education access. My bill [SB2](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120878683/587653874/-1030786773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmU1Y2MwNDgtODZkNC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZarzLb1rPASSefrTB5_DnrmSIiOAXJm6iuEoSXkhJ-k=&emci=8da176c2-90d0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=be5cc048-86d4-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=22486556) is on our priority list. It will establish a Paid Family and Medical Leave insurance program. There are six bills I have sponsored for years that have been passed by the House and the Senate but vetoed repeatedly by Governor Youngkin. I will be reintroducing them.
1. Paid Family and Medical Leave will establish a universal PFML insurance program to provide up to 12 weeks of paid leave for employees
2. safe gun storage to require that guns are locked up in homes where children and prohibited persons are present
3. a bill to protect people with intellectual and developmental and mental health disabilities, providing an affirmative defense to a charge of assault or assault and battery where the behavior was the result of the disability, when there is a physical contact with police officers when the officer is not harmed in the interaction
4. a bill updating Virginia's Equal Pay Act to ban employers from asking for or using wage history to set wages
5. a bill that would allow for the regulation of psilocybin in Virginia only after it is approved by the Food & Drug Administration (FDA) and rescheduled by the Drug Enforcement Agency (DEA) at the federal level to treat those suffering with PTSD and other mental health issues, especially drug-resistant depression in clinical settings
6. a bill to strengthen protections for captive-born mammalian wildlife by making it unlawful/illegal to prematurely separate nursing babies from their mothers.

In addition, I am chief patron of [SJ1](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120878684/587653875/-626977958?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmU1Y2MwNDgtODZkNC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZarzLb1rPASSefrTB5_DnrmSIiOAXJm6iuEoSXkhJ-k=&emci=8da176c2-90d0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=be5cc048-86d4-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=22486556) the Constitutional Amendment to establish the fundamental freedom to access the full scope of reproductive healthcare that includes contraception, fertility treatment, miscarriage management, and abortion. I will also bring back an anti-rent gouging bill that will give localities additional tools to protect their residents from extremely high rent increases. I will bring back a bill to supplement pay for our National Board Certified teachers and staff, with additional pay for those working in Title I schools. I will carry anti-bullying legislation to establish policies in our private k-12 schools similar to the work I have done over the years at the public school and college level to reduce bullying and hazing. I will be carrying some healthcare-related bills, environmental protection bills, victim protection, and criminal justice reform bills as well. To answer your question about the Tyson’s Casino issue, nothing has changed. It’s my understanding that the bill will be re-introduced. I have not changed my strong opposition to the proposal. In poll after poll, as well as feedback I regularly receive in my community, there continues to be overwhelmingly strong opposition among voters, especially in Dranesville and Hunter Mill, communities I represent. Rarely has there been a more unifying issue bringing Democrats, Republicans and Independent voters together than in saying No to a Casino in Northern Fairfax County. There are so many other urgent issues that the General Assembly must address around affordability, education, healthcare, transportation and changes in federal funding. I look forward to addressing the real issues facing our voters and to a productive 2026 session focusing on the needs and priorities of the people of our Commonwealth.
---

Please rsvp to receive the address: [http://bit.ly/dec18townhall](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120878686/587653877/637918530?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmU1Y2MwNDgtODZkNC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZarzLb1rPASSefrTB5_DnrmSIiOAXJm6iuEoSXkhJ-k=&emci=8da176c2-90d0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=be5cc048-86d4-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=22486556). Kindest regards,

Jennifer B. BoyskoMember, Senate of Virginia Representing the 38th Senate District making up the northernmost portions of Fairfax County (Great Falls, Herndon, McLean, Reston, WolfTrap, parts of unincorporated Vienna and a slice of Falls Church) PS If you would like to support my work, please visit [my fundraising page](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120878687/587653878/1617457950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmU1Y2MwNDgtODZkNC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZarzLb1rPASSefrTB5_DnrmSIiOAXJm6iuEoSXkhJ-k=). **Photo Gallery**

Take Your Legislator to School Visits: Hutchinson Elementary School, Terraset Elementary School and Dogwood Elementary School. Senator Boysko met with students, teachers, school board members Robyn Lady and Melanie Meren, and administrators. She met with Assistant Principal White who worked with her to pass anti hazing legislation for both higher education institutions and for high school students.

**Transportation Updates** **Earn Rewards with VDOT’s GoMyWayVATM Mobile App** [The mobile app](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120878700/587653891/1669258937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmU1Y2MwNDgtODZkNC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZarzLb1rPASSefrTB5_DnrmSIiOAXJm6iuEoSXkhJ-k=&emci=8da176c2-90d0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=be5cc048-86d4-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=22486556) incentivizes and rewards commuters and travelers who change their travel patterns in a way that helps improve the efficiency of the transportation network as a whole and benefits those traveling from, to, or through northern Virginia. These behavioral changes are especially critical during traffic incidents, construction delays, and peak congestion periods to help maintain network mobility. The new mobile app aims to improve traffic flow and reduce congestion in northern Virginia by incentivizing commuters to:
* Change Travel Modes: Shift from single-occupancy vehicles to more transportation network efficient options like public transit, carpooling, vanpooling, biking, or walking.
* Change Route or Departure Times: Modify travel plans to bypass and ease congestion.

“What truly sets this app apart is its ability to alert drivers to incidents and delays in real time, provide a smarter, easier alternative to sitting in traffic, and even reward them for choosing a solution that helps ease congestion on our roads,” said Zach Trogdon, Chief of Public Transportation, Department of Rail and Public Transportation (DRPT). The app is a project of the Regional Multi-Modal Mobility Program (RM3P),which includes the Virginia Department of Transportation (VDOT), Northern Virginia Transportation Authority (NVTA), Virginia Department of Rail and Public Transportation (DRPT), and Fredericksburg Area Metropolitan Planning Organization (FAMPO). Let us know if the app helps with your commute. **495Next Express Lanes Now Open** The Virginia Department of Transportation (VDOT) and Transurban, the Commonwealth’s private partner and operator of the 495 Express Lanes, have opened the 495Next Express Lanes. The extension includes two new express lanes in each direction of I-495 (the Capital Beltway) between the Dulles Corridor Interchange and the George Washington Memorial Parkway (GWMP) Interchange, as well as new express lanes access at both interchanges. This extension will provide more capacity, new connections with major commuter and business routes, and new travel options for people who face daily gridlock and congestion in this section of the Beltway.

clean_body: | | | Boysko Bulletin: Session Prep - Getting Ready for Richmond Dear Peter, As promised during the 2025 elections, the incoming Spanberger Administration, House, and Senate Democrats will be prioritizing policies that make life more affordable, strengthen economic stability, and ensure every Virginian has access to the tools they need to build a secure future. This early action reflects months of outreach, community conversations, and feedback from Virginians who are calling for meaningful relief and long-term solutions. Voters will see bills pertaining to housing affordability, economic fairness, and health and education access. My bill is on our priority list. It will establish a Paid Family and Medical Leave insurance program. There are six bills I have sponsored for years that have been passed by the House and the Senate but vetoed repeatedly by Governor Youngkin. I will be reintroducing them. 1. Paid Family and Medical Leave will establish a universal PFML insurance program to provide up to 12 weeks of paid leave for employees 2. safe gun storage to require that guns are locked up in homes where children and prohibited persons are present 3. a bill to protect people with intellectual and developmental and mental health disabilities, providing an affirmative defense to a charge of assault or assault and battery where the behavior was the result of the disability, when there is a physical contact with police officers when the officer is not harmed in the interaction 4. a bill updating Virginia's Equal Pay Act to ban employers from asking for or using wage history to set wages 5. a bill that would allow for the regulation of psilocybin in Virginia only after it is approved by the Food & Drug Administration (FDA) and rescheduled by the Drug Enforcement Agency (DEA) at the federal level to treat those suffering with PTSD and other mental health issues, especially drug-resistant depression in clinical settings 6. a bill to strengthen protections for captive-born mammalian wildlife by making it unlawful/illegal to prematurely separate nursing babies from their mothers. In addition, I am chief patron of the Constitutional Amendment to establish the fundamental freedom to access the full scope of reproductive healthcare that includes contraception, fertility treatment, miscarriage management, and abortion. I will also bring back an anti-rent gouging bill that will give localities additional tools to protect their residents from extremely high rent increases. I will bring back a bill to supplement pay for our National Board Certified teachers and staff, with additional pay for those working in Title I schools. I will carry anti-bullying legislation to establish policies in our private k-12 schools similar to the work I have done over the years at the public school and college level to reduce bullying and hazing. I will be carrying some healthcare-related bills, environmental protection bills, victim protection, and criminal justice reform bills as well. To answer your question about the Tyson’s Casino issue, nothing has changed. It’s my understanding that the bill will be re-introduced. I have not changed my strong opposition to the proposal. In poll after poll, as well as feedback I regularly receive in my community, there continues to be overwhelmingly strong opposition among voters, especially in Dranesville and Hunter Mill, communities I represent. Rarely has there been a more unifying issue bringing Democrats, Republicans and Independent voters together than in saying No to a Casino in Northern Fairfax County. There are so many other urgent issues that the General Assembly must address around affordability, education, healthcare, transportation and changes in federal funding. I look forward to addressing the real issues facing our voters and to a productive 2026 session focusing on the needs and priorities of the people of our Commonwealth. You are invited to share your thoughts at a town hall on December 18 at 6:30 pm with Delegates Irene Shin and Karen Keys-Gamarra and me. Please rsvp to receive the address: . Kindest regards, Jennifer B. BoyskoMember, Senate of Virginia Representing the 38th Senate District making up the northernmost portions of Fairfax County (Great Falls, Herndon, McLean, Reston, WolfTrap, parts of unincorporated Vienna and a slice of Falls Church) PS If you would like to support my work, please visit =. Photo Gallery Holiday Open House for Supervisor Alcorn's Hunter Mill District Just a few of the many meetings with advocates to work on legislation and learn more about their 2026 General Assembly Session priorities 2025 Reston Town Center Parade Senate Finance and Appropriations Committee Meeting at Radford University - including a visit from Governor Elect Spanberger 2025 Virginia Commission on Civic Education Teacher Summit Senator Boysko serves as Chair of the Commission which welcomed nearly 150 educators from around the Commonwealth. The presenters discussed election analysis, the role of media in elections, interpretation of news, and the use of museum resources for teaching civic education. Take Your Legislator to School Visits: Hutchinson Elementary School, Terraset Elementary School and Dogwood Elementary School. Senator Boysko met with students, teachers, school board members Robyn Lady and Melanie Meren, and administrators. She met with Assistant Principal White who worked with her to pass anti hazing legislation for both higher education institutions and for high school students. Senator Boysko joined community members at the Great Falls Freedom Memorial event to thank our veterans for their service. Senator Boysko enjoyed spending time at the 2025 Fairfax County Kimchi Festival Long Day at the Polls, worth every minute - much thanks to the candidates and their staff, election day volunteers, and you - the voters! Hope to see you in Richmond as we work to deliver on promises made. Legislative Updates Work continues on my 2026 legislative We are limited to 25 bills plus any bills recommended by a commission. So far, I have introduced one bill and one resolution - two of my highest priorities. I have drafted more than 30 bills and will introduce 26 total and then transfer the rest to other legislators. The final changes are due by early January and most bills will be filed by the opening day of session, January 14th. Status: In Committee Status: In Committee I’ve been meeting with advocates in Richmond and in my district office and virtually. Please reach out to me by email at mailto:SenatorBoysko@senate.virginia.gov if you would like to share your priorities. Be Prepared - Storm Resources While we've not had the snow that has fallen in other parts of Virginia, it's always good to be prepared. VDOT Road Conditions: or the 511 mobile app for traffic conditions and lane closures. VDOT Report a Road Problem: Police, Fire, Ambulance Emergency: call or text 911Public Safety Non-Emergency: (703) 691-2131 | TTY (703) 204-2264 Report and Check on Power Outages: or call 1 (866)-366-4357 | TTY 711 Washington Gas: 1 (800)-752-7520 or (703) 750-7944 | TTY 711 NOVEC (Northern Virginia Electric Cooperative): 1 (888)-335-0500 or (703) 335-0500 | TTY 711 Fairfax Water: 703-698-5800, after hours: 703-698-5613 Customers can now visit constant, up-to-the-minute updates on the status of all bus routes and maps of bus detours. Each route listed will show Regular Service, Snow Detour, or Temporarily Suspended. Customers are encouraged to bookmark the site for future reference. Transportation Updates Earn Rewards with VDOT’s GoMyWayVATM Mobile App incentivizes and rewards commuters and travelers who change their travel patterns in a way that helps improve the efficiency of the transportation network as a whole and benefits those traveling from, to, or through northern Virginia. These behavioral changes are especially critical during traffic incidents, construction delays, and peak congestion periods to help maintain network mobility. The new mobile app aims to improve traffic flow and reduce congestion in northern Virginia by incentivizing commuters to: Change Travel Modes: Shift from single-occupancy vehicles to more transportation network efficient options like public transit, carpooling, vanpooling, biking, or walking. Change Route or Departure Times: Modify travel plans to bypass and ease congestion. “What truly sets this app apart is its ability to alert drivers to incidents and delays in real time, provide a smarter, easier alternative to sitting in traffic, and even reward them for choosing a solution that helps ease congestion on our roads,” said Zach Trogdon, Chief of Public Transportation, Department of Rail and Public Transportation (DRPT). The app is a project of the Regional Multi-Modal Mobility Program (RM3P),which includes the Virginia Department of Transportation (VDOT), Northern Virginia Transportation Authority (NVTA), Virginia Department of Rail and Public Transportation (DRPT), and Fredericksburg Area Metropolitan Planning Organization (FAMPO). Let us know if the app helps with your commute. 495Next Express Lanes Now Open The Virginia Department of Transportation (VDOT) and Transurban, the Commonwealth’s private partner and operator of the 495 Express Lanes, have opened the 495Next Express Lanes. The extension includes two new express lanes in each direction of I-495 (the Capital Beltway) between the Dulles Corridor Interchange and the George Washington Memorial Parkway (GWMP) Interchange, as well as new express lanes access at both interchanges. This extension will provide more capacity, new connections with major commuter and business routes, and new travel options for people who face daily gridlock and congestion in this section of the Beltway. | | For detailed information on constituent services offered by my office, see my website, . Information available includes: Resources for Those Impacted by the current federal administration Additional Resources for Federal Employees Facing Unemployment Help Paying Bills Transportation Discounts: 50% Off Metrorail and Metrobus for SNAP Recipients Reach Out for Mental Health Support - Addiction Recovery Know Your Rights - Resources for Immigrants Give Back The mission of Shelter House is to prevent and end homelessness and domestic violence by engaging the community, building effective relationships and providing crisis intervention, safe housing and supportive services. They are working toward a future free of homelessness and domestic violence. Keep in Touch** It’s been a busy year back and forth from Herndon to Richmond. Here in District 38, I work with my Chief of Staff Karen Harrison, and aides, Kathy Shupe, Juliet Morro, and Aditi Goel. For constituent services and to schedule meetings with your community group, please call (703) 437-0086 or email SenatorBoysko@senate.virginia.gov. Team, This is a grassroots-powered campaign – built by and for the great people of Arizona. And today, we’re inviting YOU to join our team by endorsing Marlene! We know it’ll take a ton of grassroots momentum to beat Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate and flip this seat – and we know Marlene will be so proud to have your endorsement now. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120878749/587654085/1601566096?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.12.08_Endorse-Marlene_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzZkMDEwODAtODZkNC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5FHhtOcFoNz14KtDHn_LHM066E54FMTqYF3N54NN52Q=&emci=3e0dbbb7-92cf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=76d01080-86d4-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=626985) Since Trump endorsed Gina Swoboda, MAGA megadonors and Super PACs have been _flooding_ her campaign with cash. Because they know she’ll be a rubber stamp for Trump’s extreme agenda in Congress. But Marlene is running to be the leader our families deserve. She’ll tackle the problems facing our communities and advocate for real solutions that will make our lives _better_. She spent her career as a broadcast journalist calling out corruption when she saw it, and she raised her five kids right here in Arizona. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: The reality is, we have to take our Republican challengers seriously.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
We debated whether or not to send this email.
When it comes to campaigning, our motto has always been to focus on our record, and not give any extreme right-wing opponents any free publicity.
But even if we don’t talk about them much, the reality is we have to take our Republican challengers seriously. Even when our challengers don’t win, the disinformation they spread can discredit our movement if we don’t fight back.
Now, we officially have a MAGA challenger for 2026, and she's fundraising.
[We’re now asking if you will contribute $5 today to support Alexandria and ensure we have the resources to win next year? When thousands of people give what they can, it shows the power of this movement.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251208.NkSZfT&refcode=em20251208-10361-P_FND_EGR_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10361%2E2526796%2ELJiSMf)
Here are a few facts about our opponent:
* **She paid George Santos a lot of money to consult on the 2022 election.** She paid George Santos’ consulting firm $110,320 and hers was the only campaign to ever report working with the firm.
* **Her campaign may have been part of a scam run by George Santos.** A donor who gave to Santos had their credit card charged for additional, unauthorized donations — including two maxed-out $2,900 contributions to her campaign. 1
* She participated in the **January 6 Insurrection rally.**
* **She is associated with the white supremacist Proud Boys** and proudly posted a photo of herself with their leaders.

With MAGA extremists emboldened, we need the resources to fight misinformation like never before and defeat our challenger in 2026.
We know that the 2026 elections are far away but our work to keep Alexandria in the House, fighting for all of us, starts now. [Can you chip in $5 or whatever you can today to help us prepare for the inevitable attacks from our opponent?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251208.NkSZfT&refcode=em20251208-10361-P_FND_EGR_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=10361%2E2526796%2ELJiSMf)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251208.NkSZfT&refcode=em20251208-10361-P_FND_EGR_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=10361%2E2526796%2ELJiSMf)**
Together we can keep winning and send Alexandria back to Congress for another term to keep fighting for social, economic, racial, and environmental justice for all.
Thank you for being with us,
Team AOC

1 - [**TalkingPointsMemo** : Campaigns Linked To Santos Left Donors Feeling Ripped Off After Questionable Credit Card Charges](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/19176?t=22&akid=10361%2E2526796%2ELJiSMf)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20251208?refcode=em20251208-10361-P_FND_EGR_OPP&t=23&refcode2=10361_2526796_LJiSMf&akid=10361%2E2526796%2ELJiSMf)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20251208-10361-P_FND_EGR_OPP&t=24&akid=10361%2E2526796%2ELJiSMf)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=10361%2E2526796%2ELJiSMf) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=10361%2E2526796%2ELJiSMf) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=10361%2E2526796%2ELJiSMf) | [](https://bsky.app/profile/aoc.bsky.social?t=28&akid=10361%2E2526796%2ELJiSMf)
---|---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [¿Hablas español?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/espanol-2025/?source=em20251208-10361-P_FND_EGR_OPP)
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=29&akid=10361%2E2526796%2ELJiSMf)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=30&akid=10361%2E2526796%2ELJiSMf)

name: Wes Moore
subject: Why I need this team
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1032%2E1086043%2E8c9Zk-)
Hi Peter, it’s Wes.

Maryland is going to be targeted by Republicans in 2026, and they’ll do everything they can to make me a one-term governor. **I need a strong grassroots team on my side to stay competitive.**

name: Powered by People
subject: Texas is grabbing headlines today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Texas is grabbing headlines today. People are paying attention, both in
the state and across the country.

While statewide races like Senate and Governor get a lot of attention, the
future of Texas will also be decided by critical down-ballot races next
year — from the State House and State Senate, to key local offices that
affect our daily lives. And we can win these down-ballot races.

In 2024, there were seven State House races won by Republicans where the
Democratic candidate got more than 44% of the vote. That’s on top of a
State Senate race that came down to a narrow 1% margin. We can close the
gap and flip these seats in 2026—if we organize right now.

down-ballot races?

body:
Marie's ICE votes just injured someone in OUR district | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87ITSxjytRqnk5Se65PvvR0SC1Vi60eIcmGaf4kR6MPJnbRGd2XwIrhDn8ZZ-Z4PPuO0Vx2PdmM8zh_l0Ht__s0eBPiittxkfyz_1k09625Gr61zlr97kM0hgmpEvZmyDb-xKJl99hE8hUIgUp4qLbtm8S1qq-a7KxCzdaoaf28Vof0/4m9/jb27h-OKRfuqguMAhgDXKg/h0/h001.miZ8fZkTRCj2Rh_umh2pzJDp6nizp_OZn87ZIk19gpw)
---
Peter,

On Friday, I shared about the horrors ICE is inflicting across America. The six-year-old boy disappeared into federal custody. The newlywed snatched at her routine appointment. The Navy sailor detained despite showing his military ID.
**Now it's happened here. In Vancouver. In our district. In the city I live in**.
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUCrGz4dwl6KSTN1X1-GpvzSCS5izm7UU0x-zQMDm2UQ3nUyoxIZZSxSbizMA-LpltyfHQ5ODXWA-Jg2t-DCedQazzYQvj6jflWshbo-uLKPYptY8cV9m7fv5chjYDonciQKRd9Qsk20Rj74QVCi3gvLvdAPP0a2XxGus2SrBXqpnHzOUDz6OzcMC2X7D52KJnVz0zmmi1EQ7OfZZQCh59HWw3vaxlBal-hW-PO5FS-W9c_lFTRBebrEH7Joo6tPiInYMYYF0SPxVEr29E_YsVbB/4m9/jb27h-OKRfuqguMAhgDXKg/h1/h001.D7UBeMAN20yAIT-LAV2lFA9hyq4eiDBqG-Cbczk90-s)
---
Last Thursday, ICE agents detained a man in Vancouver. According to multiple witnesses, video evidence, and his family, ICE agents smashed his car window, dragged him to the ground, and then an ICE agent got into the man's car and drove over his foot. Video footage captured the man screaming in pain. As of this weekend, his family still could not see him or get any update on his medical condition. And what did the Department of Homeland Security say about a man screaming in pain after their agents ran over his foot? DHS spokesperson Tricia McLaughlin called it "**pure theater.** " Despite video and eyewitness accounts, they deny it happened. His family can't see him. Can't confirm he's getting medical treatment. And DHS calls his screams "theater." **This is what happens when you vote to supercharge ICE and then thank them for a "job well done."**
---
[ **HOLD ICE ACCOUNTABLE** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUCrGz4dwl6KSTN1X1-GpvzSCS5izm7UU0x-zQMDm2UQ3nUyoxIZZSxSbizMA-LpltxsGGKwtO-xWmemoLCP2BNqgsb7rITr5CFwW52j-3-2qHc6ObXJpdYnNhloADrcWJ2hqAWViuwAvHghDiSnl0FMuI4UGZLQgLrVPByMsRS9YvGzBUZtfs4vIU9_pMjt9UGHSjTD49An0J1Rs8Z0XpMimGiypSsuIU6S1bEW0cwVHXnnnvWh4Anae0iJYw80EXG6_cB5qCPHL9nPloyqT0OV/4m9/jb27h-OKRfuqguMAhgDXKg/h2/h001.ELYVQGskgfKz88sECILBdD1zmAYdi0MExveTEoD7d80)
---
Marie voted for the Laken Riley Act that removed guardrails on ICE enforcement. She repeatedly voted to increase their budget. And when they rampage through our streets, she votes to praise them for their "excellent work." **How many more people will be maimed because Marie sided with Republicans to supercharge this agency?** **How many more will be abused in our own district?** **How many more families will be denied basic information about their loved ones?** While families in WA-03 struggle to afford groceries and rent, Marie votes to give ICE more power to brutalize our neighbors. She claims these raids reduce fentanyl - even though 90% of fentanyl trafficking is done by U.S. citizens, not immigrants. **Marie Gluesenkamp Perez has enabled Trump's ICE to become a rogue paramilitary force**. Someone in our community has been maimed because of it. When I get to Congress, I will fight every day to defund this agency and hold them accountable. No excuses. No political calculations. No thanking agents while they injure our neighbors. [**Can you chip in $10, $25, or $50 right now to help replace Marie with someone who will actually defend our community?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUCrGz4dwl6KSTN1X1-GpvzSCS5izm7UU0x-zQMDm2UQ3nUyoxIZZSxSbizMA-Lpltz8VpKYJ_YHuXPywdIIbvGEQMpOsmBb0KjQh9VkUcT8EWmw-9ho3HRjbQfyOVrkGy6fQV349bOH0hyeVvVYcdhEz2mXvztHg_NnBqCnbPaiWJZ2JBGMtozvfn2dICh6HuEKr2pCL5HYaxR2zZeYNAhIZNRYCx_tKMMEQRnBXFNt8cNrl0vfJa_9d8suUYBZquoeUsOWaO6buE1ByToa-ZVO/4m9/jb27h-OKRfuqguMAhgDXKg/h3/h001.dQgMuFBWp8KvJowq6otc_h9PUyR6FI6uIpKD-X54U5o) I live in Vancouver. These are our neighbors. And I will never stop fighting for them. We must VOTE BLUE, BUT IT MATTERS WHO! Let's Heal Washington!

Brent Hennrich
---

name: Roy Cooper
subject: My opponent doesn’t care who the far-right’s policies will harm
body:
I’m fighting back.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1898?t=1&akid=130%2E124072%2EQyHloP)
Peter — I didn’t plan to go to Washington. After devoting my life’s service to North Carolina and its people, I couldn’t imagine standing by while the far-right rips away health care access, tears down the middle class, and slashes resources for students and teachers. **None of that makes this country stronger. It only hurts us.** I won’t sit back and watch this happen. I will do everything in my power to fight for a better future that all Americans deserve, but I need your help. **[I’m running in the most competitive Senate election of 2026. Right now, it’s rated a _toss-up_ , but we know that it could go either way — and that the polls will get even closer as we near Election Day. A contribution from you could make all the difference in a race this tight. Can I count on you to pitch in?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2346?t=7&akid=130%2E124072%2EQyHloP)** Peter, there’s not much that really riles me up. Watching Carolina Hurricanes hockey is one thing. Watching politicians make dirty deals to secure their own power at the expense of everyone else — that’s another. We know exactly what my opponent will do. We know that his priority isn’t doing right by Americans: It’s doing whatever Republican leadership wants. **He’s ready to hurt our country to further the GOP’s political agenda.** _That’s just wrong._ **[I’m ready to fight back, but I know I can’t do it alone. Please give whatever fits in your budget to help defeat my far-right opponent and the GOP agenda that’s already causing so much harm. Click here to give.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2346?t=8&akid=130%2E124072%2EQyHloP)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2347?t=9&akid=130%2E124072%2EQyHloP)
---
[DONATE $10](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2348?t=10&akid=130%2E124072%2EQyHloP)
---
[DONATE $25](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2349?t=11&akid=130%2E124072%2EQyHloP)
---
[DONATE $50](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2350?t=12&akid=130%2E124072%2EQyHloP)
---
[DONATE $100](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2351?t=13&akid=130%2E124072%2EQyHloP)
---
[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2352?t=14&akid=130%2E124072%2EQyHloP)
---
Thank you,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2346?t=15&akid=130%2E124072%2EQyHloP)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=130%2E124072%2EQyHloP)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=3&akid=130%2E124072%2EQyHloP)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?t=4&akid=130%2E124072%2EQyHloP)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=130%2E124072%2EQyHloP)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=130%2E124072%2EQyHloP)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602

The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. name: Amanda Sherman Baity, EMILYs List
subject: Red districts. Blue potential.
body:
Our path to a House majority runs straight through these three districts. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120879091/587655342/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEL15_20251208_CAOppo_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1057416&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2U5MGQ2OS04OGQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=08-Ng-7RBGkw5Wd9JJu46FMluU5pp7mOBXa34qPEKpk=) Hi Peter,

2025 made one thing crystal clear: When we elevate leaders who understand the frustration in their communities — and respond with real solutions, not political theater — voters respond. EMILYs List candidates across the country are proving that honest, practical leadership is powerful. And in California, they’re opening the door to three consequential red-to-blue opportunities.

Because while Californians are fighting for basic stability — access to health care, functioning local hospitals, representatives who show up — too many of their elected officials have lost sight of the people they’re supposed to serve.

[**Peter, will you chip in today to help power our work in California?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120879094/587655345/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEL15_20251208_CAOppo_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1057416&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2U5MGQ2OS04OGQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=08-Ng-7RBGkw5Wd9JJu46FMluU5pp7mOBXa34qPEKpk=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120879097/587655348/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEL15_20251208_CAOppo_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1057416&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2U5MGQ2OS04OGQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=08-Ng-7RBGkw5Wd9JJu46FMluU5pp7mOBXa34qPEKpk=)
---
Here’s what we’re up against:

**CA-01: Audrey Denney (D) vs. Rep. Doug LaMalfa (R)**

A rural hospital in LaMalfa’s district shut its doors, cutting off emergency care, cancer treatment, and maternity services. Instead of fighting for his community, LaMalfa cast votes that contributed to the crisis. Audrey Denney is running because families in Northern California deserve a representative who understands what this loss means — and who will step up when it counts.

**CA-22: Dr. Jasmeet Bains (D) vs. David Valadao (R)**

Over 61,000 residents in Valadao’s own district are at risk of losing health coverage because of his votes. Rather than protecting his constituents, Valadao voted for the legislation that puts their care in jeopardy. Dr. Jasmeet Bains has spent her career making sure families get access to the care they need. She knows what’s at stake.

**CA-48: Marni von Wilpert (D) vs. Darrell Issa (R)**

Darrell Issa is so disconnected from his district that he’s reportedly considering running in Texas instead. He’s not focused on San Diego — he’s focused on himself. Marni von Wilpert is fighting to give her community a representative who is present, accountable, and committed to the people she serves.

These races are early, strategic opportunities to build a real federal check on the Trump administration by flipping the House in 2026. And EMILYs List women will be at the center of that effort.

********[**To take back real power, we need to ensure Audrey, Jasmeet, and Marni have the early support that turns strong campaigns into winning ones. Donate today to help Democratic pro-choice women FLIP critical red-to-blue seats:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120879099/587655351/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEL15_20251208_CAOppo_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1057416&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2U5MGQ2OS04OGQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=08-Ng-7RBGkw5Wd9JJu46FMluU5pp7mOBXa34qPEKpk=)********

clean_body: Our path to a House majority runs straight through these three districts. | = Hi Peter, 2025 made one thing crystal clear: When we elevate leaders who understand the frustration in their communities — and respond with real solutions, not political theater — voters respond. EMILYs List candidates across the country are proving that honest, practical leadership is powerful. And in California, they’re opening the door to three consequential red-to-blue opportunities. Because while Californians are fighting for basic stability — access to health care, functioning local hospitals, representatives who show up — too many of their elected officials have lost sight of the people they’re supposed to serve. = | = Here’s what we’re up against: CA-01: Audrey Denney (D) vs. Rep. Doug LaMalfa (R) A rural hospital in LaMalfa’s district shut its doors, cutting off emergency care, cancer treatment, and maternity services. Instead of fighting for his community, LaMalfa cast votes that contributed to the crisis. Audrey Denney is running because families in Northern California deserve a representative who understands what this loss means — and who will step up when it counts. CA-22: Dr. Jasmeet Bains (D) vs. David Valadao (R) Over 61,000 residents in Valadao’s own district are at risk of losing health coverage because of his votes. Rather than protecting his constituents, Valadao voted for the legislation that puts their care in jeopardy. Dr. Jasmeet Bains has spent her career making sure families get access to the care they need. She knows what’s at stake. CA-48: Marni von Wilpert (D) vs. Darrell Issa (R) Darrell Issa is so disconnected from his district that he’s reportedly considering running in Texas instead. He’s not focused on San Diego — he’s focused on himself. Marni von Wilpert is fighting to give her community a representative who is present, accountable, and committed to the people she serves. These races are early, strategic opportunities to build a real federal check on the Trump administration by flipping the House in 2026. And EMILYs List women will be at the center of that effort. ******=****** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Talk soon, Amanda Sherman Baity (she/her/hers) Chief Communications Officer, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

name: Stop ICE via Our Revolution
subject: Trump just crossed a new line in his campaign of hate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

Last week, Donald Trump crossed a new line in his campaign of hate.

In a cabinet meeting, he went on a vitriolic, racist rant, calling
immigrants from Somalia "garbage" and saying "they've destroyed our
country." Almost immediately, he deployed ICE to ramp up raids in
Minneapolis – ripping families apart and spreading terror in the largest
Somali community in the United States.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34853?source=email-20251208&t=1011&akid=9948%2E5885482%2EnAz4xl ]Headline: ICE targets Somalis in Minneapolis as Trump calls them
'Garbage'

This isn’t just vile hate speech. It’s coordinated cruelty using OUR tax
dollars – and it’s happening in our streets, schools, and neighborhoods
right now. But Congress can stop it if enough of us speak out.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34853?source=email-20251208&t=1012&akid=9948%2E5885482%2EnAz4xl ]We cannot afford to sit silent. Add your name: Tell Congress to stop
funding ICE’s racist terror campaigns NOW.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34853?source=email-20251208&t=1013&akid=9948%2E5885482%2EnAz4xl ]ADD YOUR NAME

More than 84,000 Somali Americans call Minnesota home. Overwhelmingly,
they are citizens – neighbors, teachers, health workers, parents. Now,
with his racist outburst, Trump has painted a target on their backs.

And he isn’t stopping there. ICE has also descended on New Orleans in
recent days to ramp up raids, terrifying communities.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34853?source=email-20251208&t=1014&akid=9948%2E5885482%2EnAz4xl ]Headline: 5,000 Arrests? ICE descends on Louisiana to carry out raids
in world's 'incarceration capital'

Let’s be clear: ICE is terrorizing our communities — hunting immigrants
and citizens alike. And as Congress SUPERCHARGES ICE’s budget, it’s
turning our neighborhoods into police states and our schools and
businesses into targets.

But here’s the thing. With a stroke of a pen, our lawmakers can cut off
the billions of dollars Trump uses to fuel this machine of deportation and
hate.

Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team is working to organize rapid response
protests to fight back – calling out corporations like AT&T and Avelo
Airlines that are collaborating with ICE. But our voices are even more
powerful when we speak together across every city, every state.

Trump is counting on Congress to quietly keep funding these violent
campaigns – but we can make sure their phones and inboxes are flooded with
outrage. It’s time for Congress to listen – not to Trump’s unhinged rants,
but to the thousands of voices demanding change.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34853?source=email-20251208&t=1015&akid=9948%2E5885482%2EnAz4xl ]Take urgent action now: Demand your representatives stop funding
Trump’s cruel ICE raids that are ripping our communities apart. Will you
send an urgent email directly to Congress now?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34853?source=email-20251208&t=1016&akid=9948%2E5885482%2EnAz4xl ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=9948%2E5885482%2EnAz4xl ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=9948%2E5885482%2EnAz4xl ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=9948%2E5885482%2EnAz4xl ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=9948%2E5885482%2EnAz4xl ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=9948%2E5885482%2EnAz4xl ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=9948%2E5885482%2EnAz4xl ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20251208.KqNo0z&t=1007&akid=9948%2E5885482%2EnAz4xl ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20251208.Jzl7xr&t=1008&akid=9948%2E5885482%2EnAz4xl ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20251208.PkL7ja&t=1009&akid=9948%2E5885482%2EnAz4xl ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20251208.M5Z2iJ&t=1010&akid=9948%2E5885482%2EnAz4xl ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=9948%2E5885482%2EnAz4xl

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are

# **[Trump's Reset Can Give Birth To America's Greatest Era Yet](https://substack.com/redirect/17d2713c-8888-42be-9b14-3be172e3094e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
**A 90-Year cycle may end soon, creating real wealth for early adopters**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/17d2713c-8888-42be-9b14-3be172e3094e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**In 1933, Executive Order 6102 forced everyday Americans to hand over their gold at a fixed rate.**
Everyday citizens lost a sizable amount of their hard earned wealth at the stroke of FDR's pen.
**Now, 92 years later,[President Trump has focused his energy on making things right.](https://substack.com/redirect/17d2713c-8888-42be-9b14-3be172e3094e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
His next move has the power to trigger a financial reset that could shift trillions of dollars into the hands of the people.
**A provision buried in the U.S. Code Title 31, Section 5117 allows the U.S. Treasury to revalue America 's gold reserves from an outdated $42 per ounce to today's market price.**
That's a 72x increase!
**If activated, it could**
* **Reinforce America 's financial dominance**
* Reignite trust in value-backed money, making the dollar valuable again
* **Spark a modern day gold rush once the public understand their choices**

And the best part...
**Over 60 Million Americans are eligible to become a first wave benefactor in Trump 's Gold Reset.**
However, only those who download a copy of our **2025 Wealth Protection Guide** will know the simple steps needed to take part in this historic wealth reset.

* * *
_**(Piece continues below)**_
Once they smuggled the victims into the United States, Cadena and his family members imposed a smuggling debt and used brutal physical force and violence, sexual assaults, and threats of death and bodily harm to the victims and their families to compel the victims to engage in prostitution 12 hours a day, six days a week. Cadena accepted a plea deal and was convicted of involuntary servitude in 2015.
"The crimes against humanity and atrocities he committed against young girls are unspeakable," said Homeland Security Assistant Secretary Tricia McLaughlin about the arrest. "Yesterday's arrests also include human smugglers, drug dealers and cocaine smugglers. Despite facing an 8,000% increase in threats against their lives, ICE is NOT backing down."
_**Other arrests made by ICE this past week included:**_
* Lucia Sanchez-Barrientos, a criminal illegal alien from Mexico, convicted of smuggling of persons in Hondo, Texas.
* Jose Luisa Vazquez-Olvera, a criminal illegal alien from Mexico, convicted of manufacture/delivery of a controlled substance in Freestone County, Texas.
* Miguel Reynoso-Alfonso, a criminal illegal alien from Cuba, convicted of cocaine smuggling in Jesup, Georgia.
* Carlos Garcia-Martinez, a criminal illegal alien from Mexico, convicted of larceny after breaking and entering in Mecklenburg County, North Carolina.

These arrests are a small sampling of who needs to be removed from the country, made all the more sickening with the latest stabbing that took place on Charlotte, North Carolina's light rail system.

**[Oscar Gerardo Solarzano-Garcia](https://substack.com/redirect/c4e2e7ee-4234-499b-9a7b-7beb448e4b10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** is the suspect for the stabbing and he has quite the lengthy history for violating U.S. immigration law.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c4e2e7ee-4234-499b-9a7b-7beb448e4b10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
He is an illegal alien from Honduras who has already been previously deported from the United States. He was deported during President Trump's first term, but illegally re-entered the United States through the Texas border in March 2021. After being deported a second time, Solarzano-Garcia illegally re-entered at an unknown date and time.
Solarzano-Garcia has convictions in the United States for robbery and illegal re-entry, in addition to prior arrests for aggravated battery with a deadly weapon, resisting arrest, and false ID.
He is now being charged with attempted murder for the stabbing. While still in local custody, ICE has put a detainer on him.

clean_body: | Friends, As you read this, Jon Ossoff is getting absolutely pummeled by attack ads in Georgia. Republicans have spent more than $10 million on TV and online already. It’s ridiculous. Why so much money, this far from Election Day? Because Jon Ossoff is the only Democratic Senator running for reelection in a state won by Trump. That is why Republicans are hitting him so hard, so early in the campaign. And it’s why we’re coming to you with this request to help fight back. If Jon is going to defend this seat, we really need to keep hitting our fundraising goals, and donations to emails like this are a huge part of how it happens. = | | = We wish we didn’t have to ask at all, but Citizens United opened the dam for limitless dark money to flood into our elections. That’s a big part of why Congress is broken and corrupted. It’s why we have really expensive elections. And also it’s why campaigns like ours have to build serious grassroots fundraising operations from the very start. Because if we don’t, we run the risk of our message getting drowned out by a flood of Super PAC spending. So here’s the truth: Jon needs our help today. He is literally MAGA’s #1 target. They will spare no expense and try every dirty trick in the book. So yes, this election will be tough. But this team knows how to win tough fights. We’ve done it before. Let’s do it again. = | = | = Thank you! \- Team Ossoff © 2025 | Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC

name: Mark Kelly
subject: President Trump is calling for me to be hanged.
body:
[1]LeftNet

President Trump is calling for me to be hanged.

I put out a video, alongside veterans of the military and former members
of the intelligence community. It had a simple message: If you are serving
in the military, you have an obligation to refuse illegal orders.

Trump’s friends in the White House didn’t like that. They accused us of
insurrection.

At some point, the President heard about it, and he hasn’t stopped posting
and reposting about us since — accusing us of sedition, calling for our
arrest, calling for us to be hanged.

It is no small thing for the President of the United States to call for
your execution. Elon Musk called me a traitor. Trump’s advisor, Roger
Stone, called for me to be executed. And now Trump himself has called for
me to be hanged.

As someone whose family has faced political violence before, I know you
have to take words like this seriously, and that’s why I’m writing to you.

There’s no telling what kind of storm we’re heading into right now.
Unfortunately, we need to be prepared for any outcome.

[ https://act.leftnet.org/go/21450?c0=leftnet_em20251208.GNSbbl&refcode=em20251208-1388&amount=5&t=1001&akid=1388%2E2118727%2EaU9stZ ]Can you make a donation of $5 to help us raise the
resources we’re going to need to stand against Trump and the threats
coming our way from him and his Administration?

[ https://act.leftnet.org/go/21450?c0=leftnet_em20251208.GNSbbl&refcode=em20251208-1388&amount=5&t=1002&akid=1388%2E2118727%2EaU9stZ ]DONATE $5 ››

I really appreciate this.

Thank you,

Mark

[ https://act.leftnet.org/go/21583?c0=leftnet_em20251208.7VLXpB&refcode=em20251208-1388&t=1003&akid=1388%2E2118727%2EaU9stZ ][IMG]

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.leftnet.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1388%2E2118727%2EaU9stZ

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Ski-son's greetings!⛷️🗻
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
Can I count on your help to keep Colorado the best ski destination worldwide?
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120880069/587658592/-2054079050?refcode=jtk1012-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmVjYTA1MS04YWQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uruIt4llm5aLgmaedFGiu-akl7gWQO3Cx_3GSrPrKGs=)
---
Winter won't officially start for a few more weeks, friend – but in Colorado, ski season is in full swing.
There's _snow_ better way to get outside and witness our state's breathtaking beauty than by hitting the powder – **but anyone who spends this time of year on the slopes, or relies on them to make a living, has already felt the impacts of our changing climate.**
Up until a major storm last week, Colorado’s weather had been warm and dry statewide. Snowpack levels are far below average, with the South Platte at 25% of normal for this time of year. More and more, ski resorts are relying on snowmaking machines and year-round, all-season offerings to survive.
**It's clear climate change isn't waiting for Washington Republicans to come to grips with Colorado's reality, so neither can we.****_[If you agree, will you rush $5 or more now to help me win the governor's race and deliver the meaningful climate solutions Colorado urgently needs?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120880070/587658620/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1012-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmVjYTA1MS04YWQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uruIt4llm5aLgmaedFGiu-akl7gWQO3Cx_3GSrPrKGs=)_**
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120880080/587658622/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1012-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmVjYTA1MS04YWQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uruIt4llm5aLgmaedFGiu-akl7gWQO3Cx_3GSrPrKGs=)
---
This isn't only a threat to our way of life or the water supply for millions across the Mountain West – **it's also a huge risk to our economy, since the ski industry drives over 500,000 jobs and $58 billion in revenue each year.**
But after Big Oil donors propelled Donald Trump to the White House last year,___here’s what Trump and Republican leaders in Washington are doing, instead of protecting Colorado's vital outdoor economy:_
•Showering the fossil fuel industry with massive tax breaks •Scrapping environmental standards to boost their corporate donors' profits •Gutting hundreds of billions in clean energy investments I helped pass
**And it's everyday working Coloradans who pay the price.**
So as the threats of climate change grow more urgent each year, I'm running to be a governor who acts with the same urgency to ensure the strength of our communities, our outdoors, and our economy.
I'm running to stop Big Polluters from raking in record-breaking profits by endangering public health and raising prices on Colorado's working families.
I'm running to protect Colorado's winter landscapes from Trump's climate-denying, greed-fueled policies for generations to come.
**And I'm running because I know that, together, we can keep Colorado the best ski destination in the world.** But since I'm running a people-powered campaign, I can't win in the first place without you on my team.
**_[So if that sounds like the kind of leadership Colorado needs, friend, can I please count on you to contribute $5, or anything you can spare, today to power this campaign to victory?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120880083/587658643/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1012-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmVjYTA1MS04YWQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uruIt4llm5aLgmaedFGiu-akl7gWQO3Cx_3GSrPrKGs=)_**

clean_body: Can I count on your help to keep Colorado the best ski destination worldwide? | | | = Winter won't officially start for a few more weeks, friend – but in Colorado, ski season is in full swing. There's snow better way to get outside and witness our state's breathtaking beauty than by hitting the powder – but anyone who spends this time of year on the slopes, or relies on them to make a living, has already felt the impacts of our changing climate. Up until a major storm last week, Colorado’s weather had been warm and dry statewide. Snowpack levels are far below average, with the South Platte at 25% of normal for this time of year. More and more, ski resorts are relying on snowmaking machines and year-round, all-season offerings to survive. It's clear climate change isn't waiting for Washington Republicans to come to grips with Colorado's reality, so neither can we.= | | = This isn't only a threat to our way of life or the water supply for millions across the Mountain West – it's also a huge risk to our economy, since the ski industry drives over 500,000 jobs and $58 billion in revenue each year. But after Big Oil donors propelled Donald Trump to the White House last year,here’s what Trump and Republican leaders in Washington are doing, instead of protecting Colorado's vital outdoor economy: •Showering the fossil fuel industry with massive tax breaks •Scrapping environmental standards to boost their corporate donors' profits •Gutting hundreds of billions in clean energy investments I helped pass And it's everyday working Coloradans who pay the price. So as the threats of climate change grow more urgent each year, I'm running to be a governor who acts with the same urgency to ensure the strength of our communities, our outdoors, and our economy. I'm running to stop Big Polluters from raking in record-breaking profits by endangering public health and raising prices on Colorado's working families. I'm running to protect Colorado's winter landscapes from Trump's climate-denying, greed-fueled policies for generations to come. And I'm running because I know that, together, we can keep Colorado the best ski destination in the world. But since I'm running a people-powered campaign, I can't win in the first place without you on my team. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for everything – I hope to see you out on the slopes. ⛷️🗻 \- Michael | Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States Paid for by Bennet for Governor. name: Brianna Titone
subject: Protecting our blue-collar workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brianna for Treasurer
body:
Hey Peter, it’s Brianna. Today is National Blue Collar Day, a day that resonates with me so personally. | | | [](http://links.briannaforco.com/s/c/byLI9k2p1P_gHAgOFKOibfXBcwAjIPkqUli9C-R8u_KdLtU4QRQDneX7TwD4v43FOn3RuTOWF9j1sGU4E3IgV2WFdRGwX01j0e7EuGWHFpcasK0FVBp18RQf__a2bEgTJsSo2gz8XqpTTgQLzk0UYl1QXAbjScfVcn7Ig6kZ5196NDLrxPI5Tr0igDieJVqvSS_KhILCHTcrCD20f-HGb91FiFEAJgOqy1_frSSf7x4fxfH0rlXEpfXNgAPp2sWmN2l7DXarKJYdvQMt4Bpufv419GQ_D241hfnJFH5FdtdJWC6h1mKqIhOvAPtJ5FXvXIA2HTrTnfMUkT9HfhLy-h6_ml6khP0ryoFGvhb8GLSYp1xYUl3sUMeoKkfkM3pNQOZHnFNriGvrkrTS5TljTqkUlxy1i3V14Hyu7MaOSZM7C3J78j8uuzP8d7fPXy3xgpUTAjKgXBLjEam3gZECTDnOao_4LF8YMjLM9HkHlZG69v2wpwavpC7HRbqRp8Qozn49CbVQo-myKqAfPfw-8Rb6y-hhnAUuXL4hRVmzkbELyqoU8wcvUsP-Gkacht3whmEXuA87Ec_m4hX4lU3ZIpismnJPpzrIsIIyPSt9myZ3wxXXD7OePc2wTrwElB-GYSzVn-ung3JknJh1ADfHBDivq-H4uomkIlAOefx50Dw09BUXCDrItVDnqFpF6ac2E5Rm7AJB21DYIFWrJdynQCxX5OeD8-lp8VlS439qBa5xDYMeX1yeQHAryVuL0M9S4CM4xY5GdS6jxdiBUm4-2bemFT9x0nFB0nqI4uIXbkOSZ81UBWQ_r3FVIWVNO-Jsau7ghOzqcGKKPLtSMup1UKtW3GdgoNz46ap5bn6WpH4q3aKiP_pUc0P4pZRYx4-P0DcZ9EYSZtAvh8dxB3VzeEeQQOCuuLV6jmV44EIWodKe4Vz2qMckMJC_/6UwNTeeX0BJJs1LqXTBPa9U5QLr949DE/15) Peter, Hey Peter, it’s Brianna. Today is **National Blue Collar Day** , a day that resonates with me so personally. My father was a state tax collector and a union leader. He served as the president of his union and fought for fair benefits and worker protections. He also literally built our family home with his own hands. [](http://links.briannaforco.com/s/c/pXIoeWxrPAEpXNJe8xqELIoDKXd4ac9BZ6oyf-6Ty41dykhwl6LvbeWmiQJJ9lOpRL-Q40_NRJj66vObRT01GIaJmhw3pkHurcmg6hWCbY1C_Y0HXsssdLR1EqA8VK9VnkVT0FGuZwvXDUFWjHsDl_RAPAsyfPdEWoxlZqD9M-krOAbd2fSW51qtD41pNmE698gQIy61WKsYiNRyfvmIsBfyzzuTd8gkPDPBlPxzTK2YhIUfc0nzNW-L3xm6TEPnNuarho2x7FG0M1B5LK7ySmrz8mz2BBALIUOTVhGT4ytL2FnmO_AK8M9t80IwwZW4rQzQ0JKmBTYHqIroo6LtNjLEI3b8o3GWdLyj3Z4293Q791ZmJwXBsX6V0ypO5Z-vZbcPWmtByIGSGZvszbw8G8gYFyv842WBR5SYb76wlqifQhvEpv2aiARwVrLALJGA6D1GwZGhjtZW1zKetHzATF6HI9L_OkOn-HdulmI6JTHzi-w7JA7nfFZdfaVccSvUPZXkfbDaeyL46LWi6E4gJT7tPAEgmNKIeLLdE-QW_47FEzhnQPsf4k4vp1FVMSpIch_ALo757zHkx-aSiGNAnTyqjYMlcFgI-qHJ3ncWwtJFVBmgSWv6O87rt-dMrQ-I0POMEqo_cCQ1OOlzLbv9ZPzbbBfUM4CD3-6czubPQ88nbea6Xsyjz1ObaG-gaa6m-IHRWxDljJSzn7qzeCN4sbBgdE93Yzhei2oKgAUwLmuBMTCXTjd86xZNzc0gUelJDtNQqHd_G4gSjAvAoJHOlYByL4Z_Rcmw5V8I8w5augy-_V2q3WcjZvdYG7AO6sIOn4m8ZQNQSS_6PMDQd5OJNKVwieVVLdU5-3A0ZH0SxvDIMkiefdYKi_9F9xXCeFDN2xvfmHqEWtFyQ9Dr14ALW22mZJ9vlum4mE-3vYqryywZ9966pmRA2QzD/3WZkha3JSiI0mwkR1JdMrDg9uzhjlXRw/15) Not only did I come from a blue-collar, union household, but I also worked blue-collar jobs from a young age. Watching my parents and grandparents work hard to provide for my family instilled the values of integrity and service, which led me to begin working at the age of 14. From washing dishes to landscaping, to working at the airport, to becoming a volunteer firefighter at 16, I know the long hours and physical demands that come from blue-collar work. clean_body: Hey Peter, it’s Brianna. Today is National Blue Collar Day, a day that resonates with me so personally. | | | Peter, Hey Peter, it’s Brianna. Today is National Blue Collar Day , a day that resonates with me so personally. My father was a state tax collector and a union leader. He served as the president of his union and fought for fair benefits and worker protections. He also literally built our family home with his own hands. Not only did I come from a blue-collar, union household, but I also worked blue-collar jobs from a young age. Watching my parents and grandparents work hard to provide for my family instilled the values of integrity and service, which led me to begin working at the age of 14. From washing dishes to landscaping, to working at the airport, to becoming a volunteer firefighter at 16, I know the long hours and physical demands that come from blue-collar work. From one of my old job sites Today, and every day, I will always acknowledge the hard work our blue-collar community does, and do everything I can to advocate for fair wages, safe workplaces, and the respect working families deserve. **** ****************** Thank you, Brianna Fighting for working families, consumer protections, and small businesses in the House of Representatives has been the honor of Brianna's lifetime. Brianna is running to be your next Colorado State Treasurer to support small businesses, and fight hard to save hard-working Coloradans money. ****** Follow Brianna Online: ** Paid for by Brianna for Treasurer. Registered Agent Brianna Titone.

name: Chris Taylor HQ
subject: Who our extreme opponent answers to
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251208-895&t=1&akid=897%2E294397%2EGsrOjH)
Folks,
Our extreme opponent, Maria Lazar, is a member of the **Federalist Society** — a group that acts as a pipeline to advance their extreme members to courts across the country.
And Maria Lazar fits their mold perfectly.
She’s sided with election deniers, backed efforts to restrict reproductive healthcare access, and aligned herself with extremists who want our courts to serve right-wing special interests.
If the Federalist Society and their dark money network succeed in electing Maria Lazar, Wisconsinites will have to live with her decisions for the next _10 years._
Luckily, there’s a better option: **Judge Chris Taylor has spent her entire career — as an attorney, public servant, and now a judge — standing up for people and protecting their rights.** She believes courts must treat everyone with dignity and ensure every voice is heard.
But with dark money groups already lining up behind Maria Lazar, we have to build our defenses up now before they drown out our campaign’s message .
[**Will you pitch in $10 today so we can defeat extremist influence and elect Judge Chris Taylor?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251208_1_ak.Hyw6sN&amount=10&refcode=em20251208-895&t=3&akid=897%2E294397%2EGsrOjH)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251208_1_ak.Hyw6sN&amount=10&refcode=em20251208-895&t=22&akid=897%2E294397%2EGsrOjH)**
Thanks,
Team Taylor
