name: Katie Porter
subject: My minivan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
My opponents don’t drive an old minivan and worry about whether a car repair would blow up their whole budget.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40543%2E3422442%2EDpwnr2)
Peter,
A lot of you know that I still drive my old minivan. As a single mom of three, my minivan has gotten me through years of grocery trips, late-night practices, road trips to state parks, and everything in between.
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251208_1_ak.eKCQts&refcode=em20251208-40543&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40543%2E3422442%2EDpwnr2)
Now that I’m running for governor, my minivan is helping me get around to meet the working-class Californians I’m running to serve. And in these conversations, I hear the same thing over and over: families are struggling with the cost crisis, and they need a governor who actually understands what that feels like.
I’m not a self-funding billionaire or a corporate-backed candidate who needs a team of consultants to explain affordability to me. My opponents don’t drive an old minivan and worry about whether a car repair would blow up their whole budget.
But I understand those worries because I’ve experienced them too.
**[If you want to help elect a single mom who knows what it’s like for working families, please chip in $5 or more to my campaign today. I am so grateful for your support as I fight to lower costs for Californians.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251208_1_ak.eKCQts&refcode=em20251208-40543&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40543%2E3422442%2EDpwnr2)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251208_1_ak.eKCQts&refcode=em20251208-40543&t=23&akid=40543%2E3422442%2EDpwnr2)
Thank you,
Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251208-40543&amounts=&t=24&refcode2=40543_3422442_Dpwnr2&akid=40543%2E3422442%2EDpwnr2)**

name: Team Mazie
subject: Even Fox News admits it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Prices are up across the board, but don’t just take our word for it. _Even Fox News admits it:_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120880607/587660414/-2102770619?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251208_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODEzYjZkOS04Y2Q0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0bUppzeVjQDesu1DhMYSeAi9KtGFty4YhYFwaUrhhTs=) Donald Trump promised to lower costs on Day One of his administration. **It’s now Day 322 — and everyday goods are as expensive as ever.** Energy costs are up. Grocery prices are up. And at the end of the year, health care costs are set to skyrocket for millions of Americans if Republicans continue refusing to work with Democrats to extend the ACA subsidies. There’s only one person to blame, Peter — Donald Trump. His tariffs have made life more expensive for families across the country, and this regime continues to prioritize delivering for billionaires over lowering costs for hardworking Americans. clean_body: | Peter, Prices are up across the board, but don’t just take our word for it. Even Fox News admits it: = Donald Trump promised to lower costs on Day One of his administration. It’s now Day 322 — and everyday goods are as expensive as ever. Energy costs are up. Grocery prices are up. And at the end of the year, health care costs are set to skyrocket for millions of Americans if Republicans continue refusing to work with Democrats to extend the ACA subsidies. There’s only one person to blame, Peter — Donald Trump. His tariffs have made life more expensive for families across the country, and this regime continues to prioritize delivering for billionaires over lowering costs for hardworking Americans. Mazie hears from people in Hawaii every day who tell her they cannot afford to pay more out of their pockets, which is why she’s fighting every day in the Senate to lower costs for working families. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Team Mazie Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States mailto:info@mazieforhawaii.com | Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: My name means “servant leader”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Some people see my name as a political liability. But to me, it’s always
been a source of strength.

Peter, my
name means “servant leader,” and when your name is Abdul El-Sayed, you
take nothing for granted. Let me explain:

Growing up, I’d spend summers splitting my time between my grandmother,
Teta Suad, in Egypt, and my grandma, Judy, here in the States. They
couldn’t have a conversation if they wanted to, but when they kissed me on
the forehead, it was the same love.

That experience showed me that across cultures, languages, or differences,
love is the common thread.

In our politics today, love is rare. Corporate PACs have bought the
loyalty of politicians who should be working for us.

And while they get richer, working people are left struggling to pay for
the basics — groceries, rent, and healthcare.

This campaign is about rewriting that story and building a politics rooted
in dignity, fairness, and love.

Passing Medicare for All so no one has to skip a doctor’s visit.
Increasing wages so that one good job is enough. And making sure our
taxpayer dollars go toward improving life here at home, not endless wars
overseas.

But we can’t do this without you. Our campaign doesn’t take a dime from
corporate PACs. We depend entirely on people like you to power this fight.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=aes-em-jayapal.OEdrMu&refcode=em20251208-5692&amount=3&t=1001&akid=5692%2E420207%2E9yj-W_ ]If you believe that someone with a name like mine belongs in the U.S.
Senate — not because of what it means to me, but because of what it means
for all of us — then please, split a donation of $3 toward
our campaign and Pramila Jayapal's today:

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=aes-em-jayapal.OEdrMu&amount=3&refcode=em20251208-5692&t=1020&akid=5692%2E420207%2E9yj-W_ ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Abdul

Contribute to Pramila Jayapal: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20251208-5692-footer&t=1021&refcode2=5692_420207_9yj-W_&akid=5692%2E420207%2E9yj-W_

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.pramilaforcongress.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=5692%2E420207%2E9yj-W_

Paid for by Pramila for Congress.

name: Haley S.
subject: What’s on YOUR mind, null?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Will you take my December Priorities Survey?

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1577%2E49239%2EuyoDlY)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10109?t=2&akid=1577%2E49239%2EuyoDlY)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10110?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=1577%2E49239%2EuyoDlY)
Hi null, it’s Haley – just thinking back on my _Made in Michigan_ tour!
I had the chance to speak with so many incredible Michiganders, and each conversation reminded me why I’m running for Senate: to fight for the hardworking people who make this state great.
But I can’t talk to everyone in person, and that’s why I’m reaching out: **[Will you take 60 seconds to fill out my December Priorities Survey?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10110?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=1577%2E49239%2EuyoDlY)**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10110?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=1577%2E49239%2EuyoDlY)
---
From rising costs to protecting Social Security to defending Michigan’s manufacturing jobs, I’ve heard a lot about what is keeping people up at night. But I genuinely want to know:**What’s on YOUR mind, null?**
[**We’re hoping to get 30 more responses from 18326 before midnight tonight –** can I count on you to take the survey now?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10110?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1577%2E49239%2EuyoDlY)
Grateful you're on this team,

Haley
|

name: James Talarico
subject: Jasmine Crockett
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
This campaign was never going to be easy. From the start, we knew it would take an unprecedented grassroots effort to win this U.S. Senate seat for Texas.
And we’ve made tremendous progress.
Over the past three months, we’ve shattered grassroots fundraising numbers and built an infrastructure of 10,000 volunteers who are already putting in the work to defeat the billionaire mega-donors and puppet politicians who have taken over our state.
Today, the field changes and the race gets more expensive with Congresswoman Jasmine Crockett’s announcement that she’s entering the Democratic primary.
We’ve built this movement on unity over division, and it is with that spirit that we welcome Congresswoman Crockett into this race.
But this news makes today a big day for our campaign — an important moment to prove we have what it takes to win.
We’ve faced tough fights before. My neighbors and I flipped a Trump district that no one thought was winnable. And in a Republican-dominated legislature, I continued to win victories for working people — capping insulin copays, bringing down the cost of housing and childcare, and standing up to Republican extremism.
What we’ve built on this campaign puts us in the strongest position to win in November. We have the organizing infrastructure to mobilize and turn out voters in every part of the state. We have a message that can both inspire Democrats and also bring people over to our side. Winning will require a big tent.
It’s going to take a lot of resources to see this fight through to the finish in November.
That is why I am asking — especially today:
[**Please make a $5 contribution to our campaign today. This is a critical moment for our campaign. Help us rise to the occasion.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251208-1-ak&t=1&akid=301%2E1347274%2EEw9M-H)**
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251208-1-ak&t=2&akid=301%2E1347274%2EEw9M-H)
We can do this.
James

Paid for by Talarico for Texas
Talarico for Texas
PO Box 14508
Austin, TX 78761

[**Check out our online store!**](https://store.jamestalarico.com?utm_source=em_footer&utm_campaign=em_footer) This is a grassroots movement to take back Texas for working people. [**Please consider making a contribution to support our fight today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jt-em-launch?refcode=em_footer&t=4&refcode2=301_1347274_Ew9M-H&akid=301%2E1347274%2EEw9M-H)
James is grateful to have you in our movement. We try to send only the most important updates and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.jamestalarico.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=301%2E1347274%2EEw9M-H).

With 2025’s key races barely in the rearview mirror, and with our democracy on the line in the 2026 midterms, we must keep fighting back against MAGA extremists to defend the freedom to vote.
**The Trump Regime and their Republican allies want to silence the will of the people because they’re afraid of being held accountable.** They’re willing to dismantle our very democracy if it lets them cling to power.
**But when they try to suppress the vote, when they race to rig political maps in their favor, and when they attempt to cement autocracy — we fight back.**
Thanks to committed supporters like you, we can keep responding to threats like Georgia’s recent voter purge by making sure people have the facts about how they can protect their vote.
We can keep organizing alongside partners throughout the South as extremists use our region as a laboratory for voter suppression.
And we can keep electing voting rights champions to state, local, and federal offices with power over our elections.
[**But we’re counting on this movement to power this work. As one of Fair Fight’s strongest supporters, will you chip in any amount today to strengthen our Fight Back Fund and protect the freedom to vote?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120881327/587662795/-291334846?refcode=emm_ff_20251208_T1_EmailStats_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzc4NGRiMy05MGQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y-rsxtt9hbaAevbvmg3_8t9Z5-GO47X7p0xo4EHgnpU=)

name: Mark Kelly
subject: President Trump is calling for me to be hanged.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
| | |
---
President Trump is calling for me to be hanged.
I put out a video, alongside veterans of the military and former members of the intelligence community. It had a simple message: If you are serving in the military, you have an obligation to refuse illegal orders.
Trump’s friends in the White House didn’t like that. They accused us of insurrection.
At some point, the President heard about it, and he hasn’t stopped posting and reposting about us since — accusing us of sedition, calling for our arrest, calling for us to be hanged.
It is no small thing for the President of the United States to call for your execution. Elon Musk called me a traitor. Trump’s advisor, Roger Stone, called for me to be executed. And now Trump himself has called for me to be hanged.
As someone whose family has faced political violence before, I know you have to take words like this seriously, and that’s why I’m writing to you.
There’s no telling what kind of storm we’re heading into right now. Unfortunately, we need to be prepared for any outcome.
**[Can you split a donation with Deb Haaland and I to help us raise the resources we’re going to need to stand against Trump and the threats coming our way from him and his Administration?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1511?t=1&akid=6073%2E400544%2E1MrXa9)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately _and be split between Mark Kelly and Deb Haaland_ :_ | | | [Donate $10](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1542?t=2&akid=6073%2E400544%2E1MrXa9)

---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1511?t=5&akid=6073%2E400544%2E1MrXa9)
---
I really appreciate this.

Thank you,

Mark

name: Demand Justice PAC
subject: re: today’s Supreme Court oral arguments
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Demand Justice PAC
body:
[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20251208-60975&t=1001&akid=60975%2E1407376%2EjT7a8e ]Demand Justice PAC[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20251208-60975&t=1002&akid=60975%2E1407376%2EjT7a8e ]Demand Justice PAC

Today, the Supreme Court heard oral arguments in the Trump v. Slaughter
case, which could undermine the Federal Trade Commission (FTC) by
overturning 90 years of legal precedent, giving Trump even more power in
his march toward oligarchy for him and his billionaire friends.

For generations, independent federal agencies like the FTC have proven
essential to the long-term stability of our country and markets. They
benefit workers, consumers, and businesses alike, and they’ve always been
protected from presidential interference. That is, until now.

By firing two FTC members last spring, Donald Trump is challenging the
separation of powers and insisting in this court case that he should have
full authority over federal agencies.

Like Demand Justice President Josh Orton said, “There is grave danger in
what the Supreme Court appears willing to do today: hand giant
corporations and Donald Trump's billionaire class unchecked power over our
economic system, gutting one of the few institutions left that's charged
with ensuring fairness, stability, and competition in our economy.”

A Supreme Court that enables Trump's corrupt march toward oligarchy is
simply not a sustainable or legitimate institution. We MUST fight back,
now.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20251208.rYWlC1&refcode=em20251208-60975&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=60975%2E1407376%2EjT7a8e ]Fuel our work to hold Trump and the Supreme Court accountable to the

name: Jasmine Crockett
subject: It’s official: I’m running for Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Swalwell for Governor 2026
body:
Together, we’re going to flip Texas blue. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120881337/587662857/-80565656?&refcode=E16608-20251208-JasmineCrockett-Image-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDhlZjEzOC05MWQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=diTi2ChhOLAju_0JKaFwHfASQudCh5i-6t5dkq8Ow-4=) Y’all, it’s Jasmine. I’m reaching out with big news, and I wanted you to hear it from me first: **I’m officially running for the United States Senate here in Texas.** Let me be clear: With our current wannabe dictator in the White House, I’m not launching this campaign to play nice. **I’m doing it to fight — because Texas deserves someone who doesn’t back down when the bullies come for her._It deserves someone who fights back._** But to win this race, we’ll have to take on Donald Trump, the Texas Republican political machine, and all of their shady special interest donors. _And to be blunt, that won’t come cheap._ [_**That’s why I’m asking you to become one of my founding donors as we launch this historic grassroots campaign. I’m counting on your support now more than ever before so that we can hit the ground running and finally flip Texas blue. Will you answer the call by splitting a donation between me and Eric Swalwell?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120881338/587662858/-80565656?&refcode=E16608-20251208-JasmineCrockett-SL-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDhlZjEzOC05MWQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=diTi2ChhOLAju_0JKaFwHfASQudCh5i-6t5dkq8Ow-4=) | [DONATE $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120881339/587662859/-80565656?&refcode=E16608-20251208-JasmineCrockett-SB-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDhlZjEzOC05MWQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=diTi2ChhOLAju_0JKaFwHfASQudCh5i-6t5dkq8Ow-4=)
---
Let me be clear: **When there’s a fight worth having, I don’t flinch. I don’t shrink. I don’t back down.**
Just ask the communities I’ve fought for as a civil-rights attorney, the defendants I’ve represented as a public defender, and the people of Dallas that I serve in Congress. **I’m a lifelong fighter for justice.**
So Donald Trump can run his mouth all he wants. All his attacks show is that he’s terrified of what I represent — and what I’m bringing to the Senate when we win this race: **truth, accountability, and a future where power answers to the people.**
[_**If you believe that insults won’t silence us — if you believe in a Texas that stands for justice, equity, and real representation — I need you. We’re launching a campaign to change the game. But real campaigns need real support. That’s why I’d be so grateful if you could pitch in $5, $10, or more to help us hit the ground running. Can I count on you to split a donation between me and Eric Swalwell?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120881340/587662860/-80565656?&refcode=E16608-20251208-JasmineCrockett-SL-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDhlZjEzOC05MWQ0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=diTi2ChhOLAju_0JKaFwHfASQudCh5i-6t5dkq8Ow-4=)
